Name: Uber
Description:
We are Uber. The go-getters. The kind of people who are relentless about our mission to help people go anywhere and get anything and earn their way. Movement is what we power. It’s our lifeblood. It runs through our veins. It’s what gets us out of bed each morning. It pushes us to constantly reimagine how we can move better. For you. For all the places you want to go. For all the things you want to get. For all the ways you want to earn. Across the entire world. In real time. At the incredible speed of now.

The idea for Uber was born on a snowy night in Paris in 2008, and ever since then our DNA of reimagination and reinvention carries on. We’ve grown into a global platform powering flexible earnings and the movement of people and things in ever expanding ways. We’ve gone from connecting rides on 4 wheels to 2 wheels to 18-wheel freight deliveries. From takeout meals to daily essentials to prescription drugs to just about anything you need at any time and earning your way. From drivers with background checks to real-time verification, safety is a top priority every single day. At Uber, the pursuit of reimagination is never finished, never stops, and is always just beginning.

Name: Jobgether
Description:
Jobgether is an AI-powered career coach and matching platform fixing the broken job search. Remote professionals no longer waste hours applying blindly; instead, they receive a personalized job search strategy, stronger visibility, and curated matches aligned with their skills, flexibility preferences, and career goals.

We flip the hiring model by connecting talent only to roles that truly match, reducing noise for employers and eliminating wasted effort for candidates. Jobgether combines AI coaching, profile optimization, Match Score insights, and the world’s largest remote job database to help people land opportunities faster and with less bias.

Our purpose is to make remote job search guided and intentional. 
Our mission is to become the world’s reference platform for remote talent, ensuring no professional remains invisible and every match is meaningful.

Name: foodpanda
Description:
At foodpanda, we're on a mission to redefine how food, people, culture and tech are connected. Our panda family consists of problem solvers, designers and thinkers, working around the clock to make foodpanda the most powerful online tool for food convenience in the universe- and we’re just getting started!

foodpanda operates in 11 locations worldwide. Through the energy of our teams in all of our offices, we connect lovers of food to our brilliant partners through our amazing riders. We're changing the way food convenience is viewed and experienced worldwide.

If you're passionate about good food and great work, you're in the right place.

Name: Rebel Foods
Description: Founded in 2011 by Jaydeep Barman and Kallol Banerjee, Rebel Foods is the world’s largest and fastest-growing internet restaurant company, home to brands such as Faasos, Behrouz Biryani, Oven Story Pizza, Mandarin Oak, The Good Bowl, SLAY Coffee, Sweet Truth, Wendy’s and more. With over 450+ kitchens across 70+ cities, Rebel Foods has developed its full-stack technology - Rebel OS - through which multiple brands are launched and scaled up in a very short period. Through the Rebel Launcher, powered by Rebel OS, the company has launched over 25 brands. Rebel Foods currently operates 45+ brands across multiple countries - India, the United Arab Emirates (Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah), and the United Kingdom.

Name: Professional.me
Description:
Professional.me is an agentic-AI powered talent management platform built on proprietary expert systems. Think of us as the Google Maps of Talent Management- designed to help organizations truly understand, grow, and retain their workforce.

We replace static résumés and job descriptions with structured, AI-enriched talent intelligence. Our platform creates a shared language between candidates and employers by training custom large language models (LLMs) that capture context, capability, and potential on both sides of the hiring equation.

Professional.me supports the entire talent lifecycle, from AI-powered sourcing and shortlisting to internal mobility, upskilling, and career path planning. By integrating seamlessly into existing recruitment workflows, we help organizations make faster, fairer, and more informed decisions- all from within their current talent workflows.

Name: Pepperfry
Description:
Ambareesh Murty and Ashish Shah embarked on a journey called Pepperfry in 2011 without a precedent or a template to follow, armed only with a mission to spark a feeling called home across the world. They imagined a supercharged lovechild between technology and homely comfort to help them achieve exactly this. 

11 years later with a dominant online presence and over 200 offline studios, Pepperfry has blurred the lines between online and offline.

Warm and fuzzy feelings aside - Pepperfry is a pioneer with a penchant for taking on difficult problems. Whether it's designing a sofa that can survive a nuclear apocalypse or creating a lamp that doubles as a margarita maker or creating India's biggest big-box logistic network covering over 500+ cities, we've always tried to push the boundaries of what's possible.

We've long embraced and injected our eclectic tastes and quirky personality into everything we do. 

Fun fact: Our 200 'offline studios' don't actually sell anything, yet they contribute to 50% of the business.

And when we're not MacGyver-ing the furniture world, we're looking to use technology to change the way our discerning customers shop for their homes, be it through reimagining the overall UX on how our discerning consumers buy for their homes or leveraging AR / VR to help them visualize products before buying or just using ML / Deep tech to build efficiencies in our internal processes.

Name: XpertDirect
Description:
XpertDirect is a Direct Marketplace for Tech Xperts Worldwide. Find the best local and global tech talent in days!

- Pricing is based on Job Posts only, so no placement fees or subscriptions required. Pay under $100 per job post instead of a typical recruitment fee of 20/25%, typically $20K to 30K for new employees or freelance margins of $3K to 5K per month.    
- Unlike most tech skills marketplaces, XpertDirect offers permanent employees as well as freelancers.
- Advanced UI displays Profile Cards instead of CV for easy/fast candidate selection with click- based actions for speed along with direct messaging capability. 
- Xpert data is captured through online interview with a focus on Xperts’ strongest, most-recent skills and experience. Instant alerts for new applications, matches and messages.
- Advanced matching algorithms to ensure companies only see top matching Xperts to save valuable time.

Find the best Xperts in days instead of weeks or months!

Name: Uptalent.io
Description:
We build top Remote Teams with unique skills -  in less than a week.

Uptalent is a network of top talent in Architecture, Engineering, Business, Marketing, and Design, enabling companies to access the skills they need, on demand.

Get access to the best in their fields of expertise, and start working with them in less than a week.

At Uptalent, we are committed to taking away the risk of outsourcing offshore talent by bringing you a trusted network of top candidates to work remotely, saving you countless hours of research, interview, and thousands of dollars in a potential bad hire.

Ready to learn more? Let’s grab a virtual coffee  to chat about your needs. 

Select a time at www.uptalent.io

Name: Moladin
Description:
Moladin is Indonesia’s leading mobility marketplace platform with end to end financing solutions for all players in the used car and MSME ecosystems. Moladin empowers its rapidly growing network of over 8,000 used car dealers, used car consumers, and MSMEs with better financing access through digitized loan underwriting. 

This is supported by its strong operational capabilities to underwrite loans secured by used cars and property, wide network of branches and warehouses covering more than 100 cities, industry-leading AI/IoT, partnerships with all top auto financing companies across Indonesia, and through its OJK-regulated and licensed multi-finance company, PT Moladin Finance Indonesia (“MOFI”). 

Moladin’s vision is to be a positive driving force in the physical and social mobility of all the people it touches (“Mobility for all”).

Name: MyJobs Myanmar
Description:
MyJobs Myanmar is a leading online job portal based in Myanmar. It serves as a platform that connects job seekers with employers, providing a convenient and efficient way to match talent with job opportunities. Myjobs Myanmar is dedicated to revolutionizing the recruitment process in Myanmar by leveraging technology and digital solutions.

Key Services:

Job Search Platform: Myjobs Myanmar offers a user-friendly online platform where job seekers can search for the latest job openings across various industries and sectors in Myanmar. The platform provides comprehensive job listings, enabling candidates to find suitable employment opportunities.

Resume Creation and Job Application Assistance: Myjobs Myanmar assists job seekers in creating professional resumes and offers guidance on job application strategies. The platform provides tools and resources to optimize candidates' chances of securing job interviews and landing their dream jobs.

Employer Services: Myjobs Myanmar also caters to employers by offering a range of services to facilitate their recruitment process. Companies can post job vacancies, access a large talent pool, and utilize advanced search filters to identify qualified candidates. The platform streamlines the hiring process, saving time and effort for employers.

Career Advice and Resources: Myjobs Myanmar provides valuable career advice, articles, and resources to job seekers, helping them enhance their skills, stay informed about industry trends, and make informed career decisions. The platform aims to empower individuals with the knowledge they need to succeed in their professional journeys.

Mobile App: Myjobs Myanmar offers a mobile application that allows users to access job listings, update their profiles, and apply for jobs on the go. The app provides a seamless and convenient experience, enabling users to stay connected to the job market anytime, anywhere.

Name: Wing Assistant
Description: Wing provides small businesses, startups, execs, and enterprises with the top 1% of remote talent to take over recurring work such as Social Media Management, Executive Assistance, Data Entry, Sales Calling, etc. Wing is your incredible, yet super affordable, team member to whom you can delegate excess work while you do the important things to grow your business.

Name: Styli
Description:
Born in 2019 out of Landmark Group’s bold vision, Styli is the Group’s first eCommerce-only fashion venture – and we’ve been rewriting the rules of fashion in the GCC ever since.

In just a few years, Styli has become one of the fastest-growing online fashion & lifestyle destinations across Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar and India – and we’re only getting started. 

Apart from being one of the largest eCommerce only fashion brands, Styli is one of GCC’s fastest-growing marketplaces, connecting global sellers and creators to millions of fashion-forward customers. Every day, we bring the freshest trends, the best value, and unbeatable convenience right to your doorstep. Think same-day to 48-hour delivery, easy returns, and flexible payment options.

 What drives us? A mission to make style accessible, aspirational, and exciting for everyone. From head-turning fashion to must-have beauty, Styli is where trends live first.

But our story isn’t just about products. It’s about people. Our passionate team is building more than a platform – we’re building a culture where creativity thrives, ideas spark, and innovation shapes the future of fashion retail.

 Discover Styli today – and discover the style in you.
And if you’re ready to be part of something bold, inspiring, and game-changing… Styli is waiting for you.

Name: Wiingy
Description: Wiingy is a trusted tutor marketplace where students search, connect, and learn from top-rated tutors across 350+ subjects, including math, science, languages, music, coding & test prep.

Name: JobNet Myanmar
Description:
JobNet Group is Myanmar's #1 online job search platform which effectively matches employers with the most suitable candidates to fill their jobs. In addition to delivering advanced online recruitment technologies, JobNet supports the advancement of Myanmar’s human capital industry, hosting an annual calendar of career conferences and educational seminars. JobNet is also the founding sponsor of the annual Myanmar Employer Awards that encourage and recognize best practice in human resource management.

Are you a company and looking to expand your team? Contact us at support@jobnet.com.mm

Name: DesignRush
Description:
Over 40K+ global agencies specializing in branding, marketing, web design, technology, and business services

 Submit your best designs and discover award-winning brands and agencies.

 Post your projects for free and get matched with top agencies that match your needs

 Get the latest trends from industry leaders, stay updated on top competitors, and explore success stories with actionable insights to help grow your brand

Name: italki
Description:
What We Do
italki is the global language learning marketplace that brings students and teachers together for 1-on-1 and Group-class online language lessons. There’s nothing we’re more passionate about than helping our over 10 million language learners to become fluent in the language of their choice. Our 30,000+ teachers from 180 countries take learning beyond grammar tables and vocab lists. 

Our Vission
To help people become fluent in foreign languages by building connections with people from other cultures.

Our Mission
To build the world's best community-driven language education platform.

Who We Are
Joining italki means you’ll become part of a fast-paced tech company with a global mindset. Our team of diverse experts from 16 countries uses their wealth of knowledge and experience to bring a wide array of cultures together to build a global language learning community. We want people with a can-do, never-give-up attitude who can bring something special to the table. italki gives you space to grow both professionally and personally. We have a dynamic and fast-paced environment and are always looking for ways to improve, change and innovate. 

What We Offer
We give our team members the tools for success and provide a space to help you achieve your full potential. We love to share ideas and knowledge with one another and cultivate a culture of open discussion. 

Our Office’s Location: Shanghai, China and Madrid, Spain

Name: Booksy
Description:
From empowering entrepreneurs to build successful businesses, to supporting their clients to arrange 'me time' moments, we’re in the business of elevating people - helping them to thrive and feel fantastic. Lifting others up can be hard, heavy work, and we passionately believe that the sense of purpose and personal satisfaction this brings are worth it.

What started in Poland is now an international, cloud-based marketplace that’s scaling quickly. We bring together entrepreneurs in the beauty, health and wellness industry with their customers on a product that connects creative communities and opens up worlds of opportunities.

Name: Expat-Dakar
Description: Expat-Dakar est une entreprise qui propose des petites annonces via un site web et une application mobile au Sénégal, permettant aux utilisateurs d'acheter, de vendre et de trouver une variété d'articles et de services, et elle est devenue une plateforme incontournable pour les expatriés et les locaux cherchant à réaliser des transactions en toute simplicité. Avec un service client disponible 24 heures sur 24, plus de 40 000 annonces actives, et étant l'un des sites les plus visités au Sénégal, Expat-Dakar s'impose comme un acteur majeur dans le domaine des petites annonces en ligne.

Name: ABOUT YOU
Description:
The ABOUT YOU Group is an international e-commerce group, organized into different strategic business units: The online fashion store ABOUT YOU represents the Group's business-to-consumer business. With over 13 million active customers, ABOUT YOU is one of the largest online retailers for fashion and lifestyle in Europe and the leading provider of a personalized shopping experience on smartphones. In the award-winning ABOUT YOU app and on aboutyou.com, customers find inspiration and a range of around 750,000 items from nearly 4,000 brands. The Group's business-to-business operations are largely handled by SCAYLE GmbH. SCAYLE offers a modern, cloud-based enterprise shop system that enables brands and retailers to scale their digital businesses quickly and flexibly, and adapt to growing customer needs. Around 300 online stores choose SCAYLE's Commerce technology under a license model, including leading brands and retailers such as Harrods, Manchester United, Deichmann, Fielmann, and FC Bayern. The newest subsidiary of the ABOUT YOU Group, SCAYLE Payments GmbH, complements the Group's portfolio of payment services. The payment service provider received the payment services license from the German Federal Financial Supervisory Authority (BaFin) in October 2024 and is currently being rolled out across various European markets. SCAYLE Payments enables the seamless integration of modern payment solutions and helps to scale customers' digital business models.

For further information, please visit: corporate.aboutyou.de/en.

Name: Bazaar Technologies
Description:
At Bazaar, we are making everyday life more affordable and effortless. Our e-commerce and financial services platform provides everyday low pricing on all essentials for your home and businesses, with next day delivery, an unmatched customer experience and flexible payment terms. 

Bazaar was founded in 2020 and has since grown into a team of over 400 colleagues with unparalleled ambition to create Pakistan’s next big story. 

Here, it’s always day 1.

Name: Ninja  نينجا
Description:
Born from big dreams in 2022, Riyadh, Ninja quickly leaped from concept to reality, fueled by the trust and loyalty of our vibrant community. From the start, we've been more than a delivery service; we're your go-to Ninjas for everything essential — grocery, bakery, coffee, beauty and hygiene products, and more, all delivered in stealth mode, in less than 30 minutes, thanks to our network of dark-stores and swift last-mile service. Through listening, learning, and relentlessly refining, today Ninja has become a symbol of efficiency and speed.

Craving a delivery service that matches your dynamic lifestyle, available at the swipe of a finger? Enter Ninja. With our app, a world of tens of thousands of products awaits your command, ready to be delivered with an unmatched speed. Whether it's a feast for tonight or the essentials for everyday life, we've got you covered, offering a seamless, hassle-free experience that is as fast as it is reliable.

Ninja's quest did not end in Riyadh. Our operations extended to cover all of Saudi Arabia (Jeddah, Eastern Province, Mecca, Madina, Kharj, Tabuk, Hail, Buraidah, and much more); and then beyond Saudi Arabia, we’re bringing Ninja to other GCC countries, like Qatar and Bahrain. This expansion isn't just growth; it's our pledge to provide everyone with Ninja's promise of speed, reliability, and convenience.

With Ninja, every delivery is an adventure, and every order is a mission accomplished. Join us on this exhilarating journey. Download the Ninja App! www.ananinja.com/app

Name: Back Market
Description:
Founded in 2014 by Thibaud Hug de Larauze, Quentin Le Brouster, and Vianney Vaute, Back Market is a global marketplace for premium refurbished electronics. We’re here to help make refurbished tech trustworthy, reliable, and affordable. 

As a certified B-Corp, Back Market’s mission is to do more with what we already have. Because, well, what we already have is pretty great. That’s why all the tech you find on Back Market is better than new — because not only is it in perfect working condition, independent scientific research shows that refurbished electronics have a significantly smaller footprint on the environment than brand new. Every time someone chooses refurbished tech, we avoid additional environmental impact on the planet.

Of course, it’s not just about the tech sold by sellers on our marketplace, it’s also about how we run our business — we hold ourselves to high standards when it comes to our own sustainability practices, too. We work across the refurbishment industry to develop new technologies, support environmental initiatives related to electronic waste (e-waste), and work with local governments across the globe to pass legislation that supports sustainability and the Right to Repair in the tech industry. 


We know we’re not alone in our vision for a world where tech respects the planet. With 884M€ raised to date and over 10 million customers around the world, we’re well on our way to the joyful revolution of Tech Reborn. 

Are you ready to join us? 

— 

Learn about the environmental impact of refurbished tech: https://www.backmarket.com/en-us/c/news/impact-of-refurbished-on-environment

Name: StockX
Description:
In a world where consumers increasingly value self-expression and individuality, the market for hard-to-find fashion, collectibles, and electronics has never been hotter.  

Our global platform offers unique access to current culture while our data-driven, bid-ask model provides buyers with the real-time visibility to know they’re getting a fair price. 

With key leadership and an inspiring vision in place, we believe we’re poised for significant growth: into new product verticals, new audiences, and new geographies. To get there we’re looking for flexible, all-in teammates who are excited by ownership and the opportunity to take on emerging challenges. 

If you’re a doer who’s ready to solve tough problems with plenty of laughs along the way, we’d love to hear from you. We welcome, embrace, and respect all dimensions of diversity. We’re committed to creating an inclusive environment where all team members are valued, supported, and respected—and no, you don’t need to know a thing about sneakers or fashion.

To learn more and check out open roles, head to careers.stockx.com.

Name: Reebelo
Description: Reebelo is the premier marketplace for refurbished tech devices and certified pre-owned lifestyle products. We empower consumers to save up to 70% on their favorite brands while contributing to a sustainable future with every purchase. Our ambitious vision is to lead the circular economy, transforming how people think about consumption. Headquartered in the San Francisco Bay Area, we also have offices in New York, Salt Lake City, Toronto, Melbourne, and Singapore. Join our VC-backed startup - having raised over $50M - if you’re ready to be part of a dynamic, high-growth team dedicated to making a meaningful impact!

Name: Soum
Description:
At Soum, we're on a mission to build a marketplace that enables users to buy and sell anything online with convenience, trust, and ease starting in the MENA market. We began with second-hand electronics in KSA, becoming market leaders, and are now expanding to used cars and collectibles. In just two years, we've facilitated hundreds of thousands of transactions across 150+ locations in the Kingdom, maintained 10,000 active listings at any given time, earned the distinction of being the 10th most downloaded e-commerce app in KSA for 2023, and received more than 5 million app downloads.

Our team, Soumers, have worked in over 14 countries from the US to South Korea. We are always on the look out for the best and brightest to join. We look beyond resumes and titles, we look for the innovators, the hungry, the go-getters. We offer them the autonomy to experiment, learn, fail, and grow. 

Every transaction on Soum is guaranteed; we hold funds until the item is delivered and confirmed by the buyer, thanks to our proprietary fulfillment and payment systems. This ensures a secure and reliable marketplace experience.

Soum has pioneered a solution that have transformed digital commerce for sellers in the wider region:

Individuals: Enjoy unique home pick-up and delivery services, secure payments, and transaction guarantees for worry-free selling.
Small Businesses: Sell faster and reach a wider audience with our dedicated "Merchant App."
Teleco and retail partners: Gain optimal returns with bulk-selling options, comprehensive inspections, and efficient warehouse management.

We deploy AI models to power our marketplace with personalized recommendations, dynamic pricing, predictive analytics, and fraud detection, ensuring a smarter, safer, and more efficient platform for our users.

Soum is backed by local and regional investors including, amongst others, Jahez Group, Isometry Capital, and Al Rajhi Partners and have raised $22Mn to date.

Name: Adevinta
Description:
Adevinta is a leading online classifieds group and champion for sustainable commerce with a focus on Europe.

Our portfolio of digital marketplaces spans consumer goods, mobility, real estate, holiday rentals and jobs. Every month, our industry-leading technology enables more than 120 million people and over a million businesses across Europe to connect and trade. Loved local brands include leboncoin in France; mobile.de and Kleinanzeigen in Germany; Fotocasa and InfoJobs in Spain, Subito in Italy; Marktplaats in the Netherlands and the Canadian marketplace Kijiji. 

Our international team of diverse individuals are united in their purpose to make a positive impact on the environment, the economy and society every single day. 

Adevinta - Changing commerce together.

Name: Çiçeksepeti
Description:
Where Celebration Meets Technology: Çiçeksepeti
Celebrations are life’s most special and heartfelt moments. Since 2006, we have been on a mission to combine the joy of gifting with the power of technology. Every flower delivered, every gift shared, carries our signature.
Our purpose is to transform the flower and gift experience—from production to delivery—while positioning Türkiye as a global hub in this industry. 

 From Using Tech to Shaping Its Future
We go beyond simply taking orders. From our software infrastructure to logistics optimization, every stage is driven by data. By developing our own products and integrating technology into every step, we continuously elevate the customer experience. 

 100% Local Capital, Global Vision
Between 2011 and 2021, our partnerships with Amazon and Hummingbird Ventures fueled rapid growth. In 2021, we became fully Turkish-owned—an independent brand driven by our belief in Türkiye’s potential. 

 From Türkiye to the World
Our production journey began in 2019 with lilies and has grown to include orchids, chrysanthemums, roses, and sunflowers. Next is our state-of-the-art rose greenhouse in Kütahya, set to become Europe’s largest enclosed facility. 

 We Produce Together, We Grow Together
Together We Go Beyond is more than a motto for us — it’s how we work, grow, and succeed. We push boundaries through teamwork, curiosity, speed, and data-driven decision-making. We believe in learning together, achieving together, and celebrating together.
If you’re ready to be part of a fast-growing, award-winning, and impactful company, join us and help shape the future of celebration.

 Highlights & Achievements
 Best Employer Brand – LinkedIn Turkey Talent Awards (2019 & 2022)
 The world’s most visited floral and gifting website (SimilarWeb)
  Türkiye’s largest gift platform with the widest supplier network

Name: triedge.in
Description:
An integrated career platform for the ambitious professional. 

Our Talent Acquisition Services - Campus Hiring Solutions, Lateral Talent Acquisition, Career Fairs,  Diversity Hiring.

Training & Up skilling Services - Trainings & Webinars, Interview Skill Workshops, Recruitment Skill Training, Negotiation Skills and more.

Other Services - Events & Contests, Blogs, Career Advisory Services, Resume Writing, Employer Branding etc.

We are a dedicated team of senior management professionals with diverse industry experiences. Our multiple delivery formats - remote and face-to-face help facilitate a seamless, flexible and impactful experience.

Name: Legal.io
Description:
Legal.io is the all-in-one legal spend and hiring platform helping enterprise legal teams control costs and scale smarter. With flexible staffing, law firm rate benchmarking, and streamlined panel management, we help legal departments move faster, spend less, and get more done.

Over 100 in-house legal teams – from leading growth-stage tech companies to the Fortune 500 – trust Legal.io to deliver measurable savings and high-caliber legal talent with speed and precision.

Name: OLX Pakistan
Description: One of the world’s biggest Consumer-Driven Platform!

Name: Dastgyr
Description:
Dastgyr is a B2B e-commerce marketplace connecting buyers to sellers across the world. We are re-engineering the conventional retail business with empowering technologies and innovative supply-chain solutions to help businesses grow faster.

Dastgyr's Buyer app allows business owners to purchase a wide assortment of products from various local and international sellers at competitive prices with reliable, doorstep delivery, all with a few clicks from their smartphones. 

Dastgyr's Seller app enables suppliers of all sizes to upload their inventory, manage their orders, and ultimately, increase their overall throughput.

Our business thrives in the FMCG, Construction, Chemicals, and Agricultural Goods verticals.

We are on a mission to build the biggest B2B e-commerce solution for emerging markets worldwide.

Name: Clipboard
Description:
Clipboard connects healthcare facilities and schools with local professionals who can work unfilled shifts. Patients and students get improved care, and professionals get more flexibility and higher pay. Professionals can compare work details and pay rates (or negotiate for more) in an open, transparent marketplace.

Today, healthcare facilities and schools are understaffed, which can result in poor patient care, student outcomes, and employee burnout. Meanwhile, local professionals have time and want to pick up extra shifts. These two parties don’t know each other and aren’t sure if they can work together (licenses, qualifications, or even trust might get in the way). Clipboard exists to solve this problem.

Name: Vahan.ai
Description:
Vahan is at the forefront of leveraging AI to create meaningful solutions for over 300 million blue-collar workers across India. With the backing of Y Combinator, Khosla Ventures, Airtel, and visionary entrepreneurs like Vijay Shekhar Sharma (CEO, Paytm), we are committed to transforming the livelihoods of millions. 

Our goal is to build a comprehensive platform that not only offers earning opportunities but also provides the tools, benefits, and support that blue-collar professionals need to thrive. As we continue to grow, our focus remains on creating a ripple effect of economic prosperity that extends beyond borders, that could potentially impact over a billion lives worldwide.

Name: Starfish
Description:
Engage vetted talent at 20% the cost of US equivalents. Get matched to the top 1% of talent from the Philippines, India and Latin America.

- Marketing: Social Media Managers, SEO Strategists, Growth Marketers, Performance Marketers
- Design: Graphic Designers, Illustrators, Animators, Video Editors

- Operations: Virtual Assistants, Executive Assistants, Bookkeepers, Project Managers, Customer Service Personnel

Name: Lead Masters AI
Description:
LeadMasters.ai is an innovative AI-driven lead generation and ad optimization platform designed to help businesses harness the power of data to drive growth and efficiency. Our platform leverages advanced artificial intelligence algorithms to analyze top-performing ads across various social media platforms, providing actionable insights and automated ad template suggestions that optimize marketing strategies.

Our Mission
At LeadMasters.ai, our mission is to empower businesses of all sizes to maximize their marketing potential through intelligent lead generation and data-driven ad optimization. We believe that by leveraging AI and machine learning, we can help businesses make informed decisions, improve their ad performance, and ultimately achieve greater success.

Our Vision
We envision a future where businesses can seamlessly integrate AI into their marketing efforts, transforming the way they generate leads and optimize their advertising campaigns. Our goal is to become the go-to platform for businesses seeking innovative, AI-powered solutions to drive their growth.

Description:
Baton Rouge (French for red stick) is a relatively large city located in the state of Louisiana, with a population of nearly 229,000 people. Projected population figures show that Baton Rouge will have a phenomenal growth in future decades, and one can only guess what Baton Rouge will be like tomorrow, but from all accounts, it seems certain that the future will be bright.
Baton Rouge is the second largest community in the state, and real estate is some of the most expensive in Louisiana, although Baton Rouge house values don’t compare to the most expensive real estate in the country, and one reason it’s considered a vibrant and affordable place to live for Millenials, baby boomers, and seniors alike. 
From its origin as the site of an Indian village, through many years as a sleepy river town, Baton Rouge has emerged as a major educational, governmental and industrial center of the south; Baton Rouge truly is a city of change and diversity. Baton Rouge is the state and parish seat of government, the key industrial city in the area and the center of an immense chemical and petroleum complex on the Mississippi River.

Name: ReFact
Description:
A Refact é uma plataforma pioneira no segmento de gestão em marketplace, nascida no Rio de Janeiro em 2020. Crescemos com o conceito de factory-to-consumer no DNA e tendo enfoque absoluto na busca por escalabilidade + performance de vendas. 

Nossa ideia inicial era muito simples: levar a indústria até o varejo sem criar embaraços.

No decorrer dessa jornada, enquanto todo o estudo de MVP era executado, desenvolvemos nosso produto, inteiramente com tecnologia proprietária, que é o resultado de um amplo trabalho realizado junto aos nossos clientes e aos principais portais e integradoras do mercado de e-commerce e marketplace do país.  

Com o trabalho árduo de uma equipe multidisciplinar, com atuação em diversas áreas do conhecimento de tecnologia e gestão, com formação distinta, tais como de engenharia, ciência da computação, design de produto, administração, economia, dentre outras, atingimos a marca, ainda em nosso terceiro mês de atuação, de 1 milhão de reais em vendas em 7 mil pedidos processados. 

Era ainda um pequeno, porém importante, passo, para a consolidação da empresa. 

De lá para cá, nos estruturamos e acompanhamos a todos os movimentos do superaquecido mercado de e-commerce.  

Somos uma Retail Tech pronta para assumir a gestão dos seus canais de venda online já abertos, ou que ainda precisem ser desenvolvidos. Queremos ser um departamento integrado em sua empresa que possibilite novas receitas ao seu negócio.

Name: ScrapC Marketplace
Description:
ScrapC is a revolutionary matchmaking platform that aims to connect buyers and sellers in the scrap and stocklot industry. Our platform is designed to simplify the buying and selling process for both parties, making it easier to find and acquire the materials they need.

Our beta version, which will be available for free starting August 15th, 2023, offers an intuitive and user-friendly interface that allows buyers and sellers to interact with each other. Buyers can like, follow, and chat with sellers to discuss available materials and make inquiries. Similarly, sellers can follow buyers and respond to requests, making the buying and selling process more interactive.

Our platform offers the easiest way to sign up, update products, and request available materials. Suppliers can easily update their offers for various materials such as paper, plastic, fabric, metal, old machinery, and wood. Buyers can browse through the offers posted on the platform and purchase the materials they need. Additionally, buyers can also post their demand for specific materials, which suppliers can then fulfill.

ScrapC provides a comprehensive listing of all scrap and stocklot items available on our platform, making it easier for both buyers and sellers to find what they need. Our platform is accessible through a website and mobile applications available on both iOS and Android platforms.

We are committed to providing a seamless buying and selling experience for our users. Our platform offers a range of features that facilitate interactions between buyers and sellers, making it easier to find and acquire the materials they need.

Join us on August 15th, 2023, and experience a new way of buying and selling scrap and stocklot materials. With ScrapC, the buying and selling process has never been easier.

Dagelijks blijven machines stilstaan, loopt capaciteit niet vol, blijft restmateriaal liggen en wordt waardevolle vakkennis niet gedeeld. Staal Optimaal brengt dit samen. Op één plek. In één netwerk.

Wij verbinden metaalbedrijven met:
	•	beschikbare productiecapaciteit

	•	vakkennis en ervaring uit de praktijk

Zo ontstaan nieuwe samenwerkingen, kortere doorlooptijden en minder verspilling zonder onnodige tussenlagen of ingewikkelde systemen.

Staal Optimaal is geen marktplaats in de klassieke zin en geen sociaal netwerk. Het is een zakelijk platform vóór en dóór de metaalwereld. Gericht op vertrouwen, transparantie en praktische oplossingen die werken op de werkvloer én in de planning.

Of je nu capaciteit over hebt, extra werk zoekt, restmateriaal wilt benutten of kennis wilt delen: één klik is genoeg om de juiste verbinding te leggen.

Slimmer samenwerken begint hier.

Benieuwd wat samenwerking binnen Staal Optimaal voor jouw bedrijf kan betekenen?
Sluit je aan en ontdek het netwerk.

Name: Appear Here
Description:
Appear Here is the leading online marketplace for retail space. The mission: to create a world where anyone, anywhere can find space for their ideas. 

Over 250,000 industry-leading brands, designers and creative entrepreneurs are using Appear Here to find and book retail space. Appear Here lists over 10,000 spaces in the top retail destinations across the world, including London, Paris and New York.

Everyone from global brands such as Apple, Chanel and Net-a-porter to innovative startups like Supreme, Spotify and Made.com, plus 1000’s independent brands and designers have used Appear Here to launch their ideas. To date, Appear Here has launched over 10,000 new stores.

Appear Here is building a global network of the best retail spaces and working exclusively with some of the biggest landlords in the world including Land Securities, Hammerson and Westfield. Spaces listed on Appear Here include prime high street shops, underground stations, unique venues, major shopping malls and historic buildings. In 2015, Appear Here launched In Residence: a collection of spaces inside some of the world’s best boutiques, hotels and gyms. 

All spaces are exclusive to Appear Here and can be booked by the week or month. Traditionally it takes on average 3-6 months to book a shop. With Appear Here, it takes just 3-6 days to book a shop. The current record is seven minutes.

The company was launched in February 2013 by 20-year-old Ross Bailey. The idea came from a pop-up shop Ross launched for the Queen’s Diamond Jubilee called Rock and Rule. Realising how many people, like him, wanted a solution to renting retail space flexibly, Ross used the proceeds from Rock and Rule to launch Appear Here. 

To date, Appear Here has raised over $20 Million in funding from backers including Europe’s largest Venture Capital firm Balderton Capital, Octopus Ventures, MMC Ventures and Meyer Bergman. The team has grown to over 80 people with offices in London, Paris and New York.

Silver

Gold

Name: Salvex
Description:
Salvex has designed an efficient and comprehensive asset recovery program for major corporations to manage the sale of all surplus and end-of-life assets. Our online tools and comprehensive global database has given asset managers, procurement departments and CFO’s the ability to maximize the recovery of un-needed assets. For the first time in history, bidders from around the world can all view and bid on an item in real time. The global reach we provide allows our company to direct equipment and commodities to places where they are needed the most. Salvex has commodity traders positioned around the world that will assist in the logistics and payment schedule to ensure that the cultural business gaps are bridged. This brings a higher level of success when commencing international trades.

Most products are commercial from all 16 major sectors of commerce. The retail products are usually large quantities that require special types of buyers. Salvex has found innovative ways to match buyers and sellers through sophisticated database categorization, which pairs the right products for sale with the best potential buyers. The suppliers enjoy quick and easy access to the global secondary markets by creating a legible, easy-to-read listing with accurate and comprehensive information, enabling the potential buyers to easily access global salvage opportunities and reintroduce these unfortunate products back into the world of commerce. This entire 'exercise' is recycling at its optimum level, reaching all corners of the world.

After handling over 20,000 salvage deals globally, Salvex has developed relationships with adjusters, inspectors and marine surveyors. Salvex has utilized these contacts and experts to offer back inspection work from our major clients. The experience with these individuals, backed by an enterprise claims software, allows Salvex to offer tools that give their clients a competitive advantage.

Our purpose is to eliminate the word waste from the dictionary, to create a reliable source of secondary materials, ranging from steel plates to textile fibers. We are one of the few marketplaces that facilitates transactions across sectors and industries. We match materials with the help of AI,  safely exchanging sensitive data via blockchain and spurring innovation around material reuse. We are tapped into a global knowledge network of circular economy experts. This enables companies to become more resource resilient, decrease their environmental footprint and improve their bottom line by turning their waste into wealth.

Description:
Nous avons créé la première plateforme et méthodologie pour lancer un programme de mentorat entre pairs qui cartonne dans l'enseignement supérieur ! Membre EdTech 


Chez Constel Education, on a constaté que les écoles et universités ne parvenaient plus à offrir une expérience d’onboarding et de formation adaptée à chacun de leurs étudiants

Avec l’hybridation des cours, la diversité des opportunités et le volume croissant d’apprenants, la qualité de l’expérience étudiante s’est largement dégradée

Alors même que c’est un critère essentiel pour recruter ses futurs étudiants, afficher de bons taux de réussites académiques et d’employabilités

On a donc créé Constel pour aider les écoles et universités du sup à bien accompagner leurs étudiants à l’ère du digital !

On complète leur parcours de formation classique avec un accompagnement personnalisé des étudiants grâce au mentorat entre pairs

Cela permet à chaque étudiant d’être accompagné par un autre étudiant de son école sur ses difficultés, ses questions d’orientation ou tout autre challenge qu’il rencontre

Concrètement, on a construit une méthodologie et une plateforme de mentorat qu’on intègre en marque blanche dans leur ENT pour lancer le dispositif !

Si le sujet vous intéresse, je prends les appels.

Name: Ncredin
Description:
Ncredin was founded in July 2021 with its headquarters in Chennai, driven by a vision to harness the power of technology and the Internet to support manufacturers, merchants, brands, and product-based startups in delivering innovative products that resonate with customers. Our mission was to establish Ncredin as India’s Largest Online Marketplace dedicated to promoting and supporting the latest innovations.

In recent years, numerous groundbreaking innovations have struggled to reach their full potential due to challenges such as inadequate planning, limited marketing techniques, and insufficient investment strategies. Ncredin aimed to address these barriers by serving as a catalyst within a global network. Ncredin was envisioned as a pioneering marketplace connecting sellers and customers through innovative intermediary services. Despite our passionate efforts, unforeseen challenges have led us to the difficult decision of permanently suspending Ncredin's operations.

After thorough introspection, we have decided to cease operations, reflecting our commitment to delivering value with integrity and transparency. We extend our heartfelt gratitude to our supporters, followers and team members who believed in our vision.

While Ncredin's journey may end here, our spirit of innovation and entrepreneurship continues. We remain inspired by the experiences and lessons learned, exploring new avenues to make a meaningful impact in the future.

We have removed all other posts made from this page apart from the final post, due to privacy issues. Thank you for being part of our journey. For any inquiries or further conversations, please send us a message (DM) to our page inbox.

Name: Gleevery
Description:
Gleevery to innowacyjna platforma, która daje Ci dostęp do sprzętu, kiedy go potrzebujesz i na tak długo, jak go potrzebujesz. Umożliwiamy wynajem sprzętu biurowego, elektronicznego i codziennego, bo wierzymy, że w dzisiejszym świecie warto stawiać na elastyczność, efektywność i zrównoważony rozwój.

 Dla biznesu zapewniamy sprawne wynajmowanie sprzętu biurowego bez zbędnych formalności. 
 Dla pracowników udostępniamy realny benefit, z którego chcą korzystać, bo łączy wygodę, oszczędność i zrównoważony rozwój.
 Dla osób indywidualnych oferujemy wynajem na własnych zasadach, na wybrany czas i za faktyczne użytkowanie. 

Rozwiązujemy największe wyzwania związane z użytkowaniem sprzętu:
 Zamiast kupować, wynajmujesz na potrzebny czas – oszczędzasz miejsce, pieniądze i czas, a sprzęt nie zalega w szufladach.
 Dbanie o środowisko – zwrócony sprzęt trafia z powrotem do obiegu, co redukuje odpady i nadprodukcję.
 Spokój w razie uszkodzenia – większość kosztów pokrywa nasz program ochrony GleeverySafe.

Tworzymy rozwiązania zarówno dla firm, które chcą działać mądrzej, jak i dla osób, które cenią sobie wygodę i prostotę. Gleevery to wolność wyboru, korzystanie bez ograniczeń i krok w stronę lepszego, bardziej zrównoważonego świata. 

Sprawdź nas i przekonaj się, że lepiej wynajmować niż kupować

Name: Udibox
Description:
Business, udito e tutto quello che sta “nel mezzo”: Udibox non è una semplice azienda, ma un multiverso dedicato al benessere uditivo. Dalla consulenza marketing destinata agli esperti del settore alla vendita di hearing medical devices/accessories sia a privati, tramite piattaforme di e-commerce, sia a centri acustici, la nostra realtà offre soluzioni a 360°.

Provando a spiegare in maniera sintetica di cosa ci occupiamo, accendiamo i riflettori sull’udito e sui professionisti che ne promuovono il benessere attraverso un approccio fortemente orientato al mondo digital e a tutte le opportunità che offre, in un’ottica di armonia ed integrazione con i canali tradizionali.  

CONSULENZE MARKETING

Da oltre 12 anni, il nostro team, collaborando con i migliori produttori di apparecchi acustici del mercato, offre consulenze marketing specializzata (B2B e B2C) a centri acustici, ORL, foniatri, logopedisti, audiologi e audioprotesisti in ogni fase del progetto, dalla strategia preliminare al supporto operativo.

LEAD GENERATION

Tramite il portale di Specialistidelludito.it mettiamo in contatto i professionisti dell’udito, provenienti da tutto il territorio nazionale, con potenziali clienti attraverso attività di lead generation per la raccolta di contatti altamente profilati e la successiva presa di appuntamento. 

CANALI E-COMMERCE

Negli ultimi anni, con grande lungimiranza e anche con un pizzico di coraggio, abbiamo intrapreso la strada della vendita online di dispositivi acustici, accessori e prodotti per la pulizia, riscontrando degli eccellenti risultati.

Risultati ottenuti grazie alla fiducia dei nostri clienti e alla sinergia di un team affiatato e sempre pronto a mettersi in gioco. Ogni persona che lavora in Udibox, infatti, è parte integrante di un armonioso e fluido ecosistema fatto di creatività, innovazione, orientamento al risultato e, perché no, anche di amicizia.

Name: Minutly (Minute-ly)
Description:
When you open a book, the first thing you do is check the index page. Why? The index page gives you a sneak peek, helping you quickly assess the content of the book. Similarly, when you sit down at a restaurant, you ask for a menu to find dishes that match your taste and preferences. And when you visit a movie theater, you instinctively look at the showings to choose a movie that aligns with your mood or interests.

All these everyday tools—the index page, the menu, the movie screen—serve as service catalogs, making it easier to choose the right options and make decisions that best suit your needs.

At Minutly, we recognize the importance of a service catalog for your service business. Whether you're an individual, a team, or a business, if you offer any type of service to employees, customers, or partners, a service catalog is essential.

Minutly makes it easy to catalog your services, share them, deliver them, and scale your business—all within one platform. Visit https://www.minutly.com for more information.

Name: RideAlike
Description:
RideAlike is an AI-powered fintech car-sharing platform that transforms underused vehicles into shared community assets. Our mission is to make urban mobility more affordable, sustainable, and accessible while helping cities, property developers, and residents reduce the costs and challenges of car ownership.

Through our mobile and web apps, vehicle owners can list their cars and earn income, while renters enjoy convenient, on-demand access to vehicles where they live. The platform integrates secure payments, trust scoring, and AI-driven recommendations to deliver seamless, personalized, and cost-effective user experiences. Our AI models power features such as dynamic pricing, telematics-based verification, and smart mobility insights, ensuring transparency, safety, and optimized fleet utilization.

RideAlike is more than just car sharing—it is a fintech ecosystem designed to expand into adjacent services including vehicle purchase and resale, insurance, and maintenance. This creates a full-stack mobility and ownership solution that maximizes customer lifetime value while supporting long-term partnerships with insurers, OEMs, and property managers.

Headquartered in Ontario, Canada, RideAlike builds partnerships with municipalities, universities, developers, property management companies, and automakers to integrate sustainable transportation into multi-residential communities. We are expanding into other major North American cities and actively exploring future growth in Europe, Asia, and the MENA region.

Recognized with the UN SDG badge, RideAlike delivers measurable impact by reducing parking demand, lowering carbon emissions, cutting traffic, and enabling sustainable urban growth. Positioned at the intersection of fintech, proptech, mobility, and green innovation, RideAlike is pioneering the future of community-driven transportation.

Name: Closer Claus
Description:
Closer Claus is a SaaS marketplace for Agencies and businesses, catering in the B2B service industry.

A little more context: Closer Claus is an Aggregator platform that brings small and medium scale B2B service agencies and professional sales teams, ready to work on a 'Commission-only' basis, together.

Client Acquisition with Closer Claus requires only 5 simple steps:

1. Create a 'Company Account' for Free.
2. Post a Job and set your commission rate (for example 5%)
3. Build out a team of Professional Sales representatives
4. Sit back, relax, and let your new team close new deals every month.
5. Pay your set commissions (5%) only after the deal is closed. 

YES! This Means:

1. NO time spent on outbound marketing.
2. NO more money spent on Leads.

Name: Suprevida Inventory Cloud
Description:
Suprevida is a multilateral e-commerce and group buying platform designed to cater to various market segments. Our innovative solution leverages inventory connected through a geolocation-based backend network (inventory cloud), allowing for efficient and optimized resource management. With the ability to create customized territorial rules and operate distributed inventories at multiple points, we offer a modern and effective alternative to traditional platforms, ensuring maximum resilience and logistical efficiency.

Our model has been extensively validated through the Suprevida medical products portal, where we demonstrated the effectiveness of our technology. With over 32,000 transactions and 90,000 quotes completed, we have provided a transparent, coordinated, and balanced shopping experience. Our platform facilitates collective negotiations with suppliers, resulting in significant cost reductions and the creation of new revenue models for participants.

In addition to optimizing logistics and ensuring greater operational efficiency, Suprevida stands out for its traceability and transparency in all transactions. These features are crucial for regulated markets and segments requiring high levels of compliance. Our solution allows participants to maximize financial returns, reduce costs, and improve customer satisfaction in a secure and highly efficient environment.

Suprevida's technology addresses the inefficiencies in inventory management and collective purchasing negotiations for cooperatives of suppliers. By offering a platform that integrates inventory connected in a backend network by geolocation, we ensure transparent, coordinated, and efficient operations. This approach not only reduces costs but also enhances logistical efficiency and financial returns.

Moreover, our platform is adaptable to a wide range of segments, providing a robust solution for markets that demand high compliance standards.

Name: Faircado
Description:
Faircado reinvents second-hand shopping with AI precision. Navigate the second-hand universe with tailored suggestions in a browser plugin. Marrying cost-effectiveness with planet-love, one find at a time.

Faircado is your sustainable shopping assistant that aggregates and compares all second-hand offers to make you save time, money and CO2. 

We won't save the world. At least, not alone. 

But we are convinced that transforming our linear economy into a circular economy will only be possible by making sustainable choices accessible to all. 

We need system change, not climate change. 

What's good for the planet should be cheaper, more convenient and more attractive than what f*cks it up. That's it.

That is why we have developed a browser plugin that automatically finds you the best second-hand alternatives for exactly what you're looking for online. No need to search for hours anymore. No need to sacrifice your savings to buy sustainable products anymore. No need to finance any ego trips to space anymore. We help you save time, money, and CO2.

Our second-hand shopping assistant is now (beta) live. Download it, and let us know your feedback. Cheers!

Name: Randstad Digital | Torc
Description:
Work is changing. We’re making it better.

Remote and hybrid models are the future. The increased flexibility creates tremendous benefits for freelance developers and companies alike, but the path forward isn’t always clear. We’re building Torc because we believe work can be better: more productive, more free, and more secure. For everyone.

Torc is a talent marketplace bringing the most productive freelance developers to the enterprise through an AI, security, and culture-first platform.

Why AI?

Using AI and automation to match developers with company needs is just the start. Torc is pioneering the use of data to understand and improve productivity. Customers want insights to manage better; top developers want feedback to grow and be recognized.

But great matches start before the match. Torc pre-vets every developer through technical assessments, communication screenings, and real-world coding challenges. AI then leverages performance data to refine fit and ensure only elite talent reaches our clients.

Why security?

Torc is built for enterprise. Our team has been doing this for two decades, not two years. We understand the needs of procurement, HR, legal, and security—and use simplicity, automation, and tech to eliminate barriers to using freelance developers.

Why culture?

The best developers are leaving traditional jobs for flexibility, personalization, and control over their careers. Our hands-on, community-driven approach supports them in building sustainable freelance careers—not just landing the next gig. Torc is a community of developers, not just a roster.

Torc is led by pioneers in distributed talent models, including leaders from Topcoder, Deloitte, Cognizant, Catalant, Atomic Ventures, and Harvard.

Description:
Snooplay is building the future of play in India, where discovery is intelligent and toys never go to waste.

We’re India’s only PlayTech app, solving two of the biggest pain points in the toy industry:
1). Discovery – Most parents don’t know what to buy.
2). Waste – Most toys are underused and discarded too soon.

Our proprietary AI Toy Finder replaces search fatigue with smart discovery - matching every child’s unique personality, age, and developmental needs with the right toy across 35,000+ SKUs. It's like a personal play expert at scale.

And we close the loop with India’s first AI-led Toy Buyback Program, making play circular. Families can now donate or recycle their old toys for Snooplay Rupees - fuelling repeat engagement while reducing waste. Donated toys are routed to children in need - no waste, no clutter, just better use.

With a pan-India customer base of over 2 lakh families, and a growing Play Intelligence Database, we’re creating deep behavioral data flywheels that power personalization, retention, and sustainability.

We’re not just another toy brand. We’re building the infrastructure layer for India’s $5B+ toy economy - where discovery, data, and delight converge.

Snooplay is how India plays. Now and next.

So far e-commerce has primarily benefited residents of the top 8 metropolitan cities in India. Key reasons for this are lack of trust, lack of familiarity with browsing and transacting online, low average order values (which makes economic viability a challenge for the platforms), lack of credit in online channels (which neighbourhood stores offer). We at CityMall are trying to solve this problem for Bharat.

CityMall is a highly efficient channel to serve these consumers through "Community Leaders". They are the "Social" & "Geographical" connectors between end consumers and CityMall. They help us in customer acquisition, localised sales & marketing to capture customers' share of wallet, and the last mile logistics in their communities, thus making the community-led model more suitable for small towns, cities, and villages. 80% of our consumers transact for the very first time on CityMall’s app. We are enabling thousands of people to start their small business without any investment.

Founded by IIT Delhi and IIT Roorkee alumni with 8+ years of entrepreneurial experience, CityMall aims to create hundreds of thousands of such micro-entrepreneurs and empower them to create the go-to e-commerce platform for Bharat.

Krishify is India's leading digital platform transforming agriculture through farmer-centric technology and services. Founded in 2019, Krishify has built a trusted network of over 12 million farmers across key agricultural regions.

We specialize in delivering scalable SaaS solutions and phygital engagement models that help enterprises connect with farmers, drive demand generation, implement sustainable sourcing, and unlock real-time agricultural insights.

Farmverse: A powerful farmer intelligence platform offering insights into crop distribution, sowing trends, and disease alerts to drive smarter business decisions.

Farmtrac: An end-to-end farm management and traceability system enabling sustainable, certified sourcing and managed cultivation programs.

Cluster Management Suite: Digital tools to efficiently manage hyperlocal farmer clusters, integrate physical advisory, and track engagement.

Advisory and CRM Systems: Customizable modules for crop advisory, package of practice dissemination, farmer engagement, and performance tracking.

Alongside technology, Krishify offers full-stack services:

- Building and managing phygital farmer communities

- Designing and executing Go-To-Market strategies for agri-input companies

- Driving traceable procurement of key commodities like cumin, chilli, and litchi

- Supporting carbon and sustainability initiatives with farmer-level integration

What sets Krishify apart is our ability to blend digital scale with on-ground execution — creating high-trust farmer ecosystems, enabling data-driven interventions, and delivering measurable business impact for our partners.

At Krishify, we are committed to digitizing agriculture, empowering farmers, and building the future of resilient, sustainable agri-value chains.

Description:
Welcome to GrowHub, a Social Tech Enterprise born from the rich landscapes of Guwahati, Assam. Our mission is simple yet profound: to transform India's remarkable natural resources into handcrafted treasures that tell a story of beauty, tradition, and purpose.
We work directly with talented local artisan groups, whose expertise brings out the inherent elegance of materials. Picture the intricate detail of bell metal, the warm embrace of cane furniture, the innovative forms of bamboo, and the captivating preservation of eternal wildflowers. Each piece is a unique expression of the region's diverse craftsmanship and our commitment to authenticity.
At our core, GrowHub is about creating a meaningful impact. We are dedicated to providing sustainable livelihoods for our artisan partners and championing environmental responsibility. This means prioritizing sustainably sourced materials and ingeniously utilizing agricultural byproducts to reduce waste and foster a true circular economy.
Our growth is proudly nurtured by our incubation at BioNEST IIT Guwahati, Assam Startup, and Atal Incubation Centre-GGSIPU. We've also earned national recognition, including the prestigious Startup Maharathi Challenge 2025, affirming our drive to blend heritage with innovation for a better tomorrow.
When you choose GrowHub, you're not just acquiring an item; you're investing in a more beautiful, sustainable, and equitable world. Experience the authentic spirit of Northeast Indian craftsmanship with us.

Name: Laborup
Description:
Laborup is the #1 AI powered talent platform for America’s industrial workforce. We use AI to create jobs, not take them away. We help HR and plant leaders hire and keep the skilled workers who keep plants running: machinists, welders, maintenance techs, operators, industrial electricians, and engineers. USA Today called us the “LinkedIn for blue collar workers,” and Forbes profiled our work in “How AI Is Solving America’s 1 Trillion Dollar Manufacturing Labor Crisis.”

Today we work with manufacturers from 50 person shops to large public companies with tens of thousands of employees, and the story is the same everywhere. It is hard to find talent, hard to keep good people, and staffing costs keep rising. In a market where filling critical industrial roles can take months and turnover is constant, Laborup helps teams move qualified workers from first contact to on site interview in days instead of weeks and keep them on the floor longer.

Most of the workers our customers need are not on LinkedIn or the usual job boards. Laborup uses AI to find this hidden workforce, call and text them, screen and qualify them, build real profiles, and match them directly to the plants and roles where they can succeed. For workers, that means real, permanent roles at serious manufacturers, not one off gigs. For companies, it is durable infrastructure for hiring and retention at scale in a labor market that will stay tight for years.

We work across nuclear, defense, and advanced manufacturing, as well as sectors like aerospace, automotive, and food production. Teams that use Laborup hire 5 to 10 times faster, see around 3 times better retention, and cut cost per hire by up to 50 to 70 percent. That turns into fewer empty shifts, fewer missed orders, more stable teams, and more capacity without more headache.

We are building the modern talent system for America’s industrial base with a simple long term goal: put a billion industrial workers to work in good jobs that matter.

Name: Emergi Mentors PTY LTD
Description:
Emergi Mentors is an innovative digital marketplace that connects Australian students and professionals with seasoned mentors from around the globe. Specializing in emerging technologies like AI, data science, machine learning, and software development, our platform is designed to close the skills gap between academia and industry. By offering personalized, one-on-one mentorship, career roadmaps, and a suite of resources tailored to real-world needs, we empower Australians to become future-ready tech professionals.

Our mission is simple yet ambitious: to prepare Australians for tomorrow’s job market by leveraging today’s global expertise. We aim to build a highly skilled workforce in Australia, making critical tech knowledge accessible to local talent through mentorship by world-class experts. At Emergi Mentors, we believe in bridging the gap between education and industry, contributing to a resilient and tech-savvy Australian workforce.

Our platform offers:

Personalized Mentorship: Connect with global mentors in emerging tech fields for career guidance and skill development.

Career Roadmaps: Access curated career paths that align with your professional goals in AI, data science, and beyond.

Innovative Tools: Enjoy seamless communication through video calls, direct messaging, progress tracking, and secure payments.

For mentors, it’s an opportunity to expand their global reach, earn additional income, and make a meaningful impact on the next generation of tech talent in Australia.


Why Emergi Mentors? As technology advances, the demand for tech skills grows. Australia is projected to need 200,000 AI professionals by 2030. Emergi Mentors fills this gap by connecting local learners with top-notch global mentors, enabling mentees to gain the skills needed to thrive in high-demand tech roles. By empowering local talent, we’re fostering a future-ready workforce that supports Australia

Remote work goes without saying. There is no dress code but a bunch of dogs trolling around in the office. We benefit from yoga lessons, fresh fruit and a subsidised fitness studio membership. Name: Our Better Planet Private Limited
Description:
A curated online marketplace for all things sustainable! 

A sustainable product or service is one that involves processes that maximize benefits to people and communities while minimizing impact on the environment.

Its easy to feel overwhelmed when reading about ways to make your daily life more sustainable. If you are taking your first baby steps towards eco-friendly practices, there's so much information out there that its hard to know where to start.

It would be amazing if everyone immediately made all the necessary changes to reduce their carbon footprints, but even small steps count when enough people make them. "Start small and aim high" is the mantra behind our curated marketplace that aims to offer products from all walks of life alongwith services that can help you lead a more sustainable life.

We are the conscience minded. We care about our planet. We care about its people. We support the new generation of intelligent and conscious consumerism. We believe we can make the world a more beautiful place by holding ourselves to a higher ethical standard. We put artistry above efficiency. Fair wages above profits. Sustainability above mass production. Quality craftsmanship above mindless consumption. And transparency above everything, as we painstakingly hand-select only the most beautifully-designed, ethically-made goods that put people and our planet first.

We seek to empower artisans around the world. We are comitted to upholding the dignity of artisans, celebrating their cultural techniques and traditions, and bringing attention to social justice and human rights issues faced by their communities.

The venture is being initiated under the mentoriship of Dr. Srinivas Chunduru, Founder - Vans Group(Vans InvestmentsI Vans Skilling). Member of the Board - OSPL (OLA)I CrowderaI AF Finance. He is a Business Leader with over two decades of diverse experience and brings in extensive knowledge to manage teams and partner closely with founders/promoters.

This rapidly changing landscape is creating intense competition, forcing ICT businesses to not always engage their services ecosystem to receive design input, availability and competitive pricing, before committing proposals. 

Ideally, these businesses would like to rely on robust data backed by real time market intelligence to make informed decisions to bid with confidence. 

> Do we have the capacity and competencies in house to deliver?
> Which partners/suppliers can augment our capacity and competencies and provide design input?
> How do we know we are getting the price from the most qualified supplier/partner? 

Unfortunately, the answers to these and many more questions are buried in spreadsheets, emails and ad-hoc sales processes. Answers which are typically out of date and require considerable time and effort to find. 

Now ICT businesses have a fast, easy, seamless way to engage their services ecosystem early in the sales cycle, commit proposals they can deliver, avoid walking away from opportunities and stop leaving money on the table.

Por una parte, partimos de la premisa de que la contratación de los servicios legales no puede seguir dependiendo del “boca a boca”. Desde hace tiempo existen muy diversas plataformas en otros sectores en las que el usuario dispone de multitud de opiniones confiables para formarse un criterio propio antes de contratar un profesional, un producto o servicio, lo que, sin duda, redunda en una elección más informada, satisfactoria y acertada.

Por otro lado, entendemos preciso también la democratización de los servicios legales en cuanto a garantizar un verdadero acceso, universal y gratuito, en el que cualquier usuario pueda resolver sus primeras consultas legales con el profesional de su elección, así como valorar sus servicios para que otros usuarios puedan considerar en mejores condiciones su contratación. 

Sí, todo esto será posible próximamente mediante nuestro buscador y su chat integrado, al igual que los profesionales -y las empresas- podrán: expandir su huella digital destacando su perfil, participar en el primer foro de debate online de profesionales del sector, publicar artículos de opinión, anuncios de empleo, formación o eventos, así como permanecer informados de las últimas  novedades jurídicas... Name: Sociocharge
Description:
More than 60% #graduates in India do not get jobs when they graduate.

About 2/3rd campuses in India are in tier 2/3 cities where fewer companies visit for campus hiring.  Many small companies and startups are not able to afford to manage on premises campus hiring due to financial and operational constraints.

Companies find it hard to spot the right early talent that match skills required for the jobs. 

That means many students inspite of having requisite #skills & #competencies go jobless just due to asymmetric access to opportunities. That also means that students inspite of having potential to learn miss opportunities to bridge the skill gap & end up going jobless or under-employed.

An opportunity loss at the extent of $30b per year.

All early talent should be able to build their best career. And for that to happen, we believe there has to be open access to opportunity. At Sociocharge, we are making it happen. 

Sociocharge is a career network for early talent.

It helps students & recent graduates find personalised career building opportunities and jobs. Students showcase their skills via competing on skill based tests & solving real world business problems of businesses. Students love peer-to-peer engagements on career related matters at Sociocharge. 

Companies at Sociocharge find pre-matched & pre-screened candidates to hire. Companies engage with early talent in the network through business competitions, hiring challenges and job posts. 

At present, LinkedIn is the default platform for professional networking and growth, but it is not suitable for early talent who lack previous work experience & connections. Sociocharge is bridging the gap by connecting companies, campuses, and students on one platform.

We are making opportunities democratised, accessible and personalised for early talent. Students regardless of campuses they go to or who they know get equal opportunities to find personalised jobs based on their skills, preferences.

Description:
Dooka’s vision is for businesses throughout Africa to use Africa’s digital marketplace for their purchases.

The way companies buy products and services is changing fast, accelerated by the realization, borne from the Coronavirus pandemic, that the status quo had to change. Paper and old-fashioned processes are out. Digital is in. A new way is urgently needed, and it needs to be flexible, it needs to be intuitive, and it needs to be digital. One of the big winners of recent changes was marketplaces (e.g. Takealot, Jumia and Amazon) as people moved to the convenience of online shopping. Finally, large enterprises are joining this trend and have access to marketplaces. Dooka is providing Africa’s first B2B marketplace for large enterprises.

Dooka is a business-to-business marketplace designed for and targeted specifically at the African continent. This marketplace provides an intuitive “shopping” style user interface for businesses to buy goods and pair this with the corporate controls needed by large enterprise. Dooka's technical partner is Tradeshift - a global procurement platform used by some of the world’s largest multinational enterprises like Unilever and DHL. This platform has facilitated a trillion dollars’ worth of transactions since its inception in 2010. This technological difference means that large businesses can use the Dooka Marketplace for their indirect spend. In contrast, those companies would not be able to use other marketplaces built for SMEs and lack procurement discipline and integration. 

Dooka enables African businesses to use the most advanced digital procurement technologies at a very low cost to quickly reach a maturity level more advanced than other countries. This is a “leapfrog” moment.

Qrify + A³I: AI-Powered Customer Journeys:
Products with Qrify become always-on service portals.
Customers scan to report issues, book visits, check warranty, or buy parts - A³I identifies them, understands the context, recommends actions, troubleshoots, and even triggers personalized upsell flows.

Helpdesk & CRM, Reinvented by A³I:
Automate up to 70% of queries. Cut support costs by 40–50%. Improve NPS and CSAT via intelligent routing, resolution, and hyper-personalized engagement.

70,000+ On-Demand Field/Sales Agents:
Tap into our vetted gig workforce—dispatched based on location, skills, SLA urgency, and part availability. Boost first-time fix rates by up to 30%.

Unified Intelligent Platform:
Eliminate fragmented systems. Our A³I-led platform integrates service CRM, FSM, warranty, inventory, payments, analytics, and partner collaboration.

We’re trusted by brands like Voltas, Daikin, Godrej, Bluestar, and Croma—over 10M+ transactions, 100K+ field users, and active in 7 countries.

For CEOs, COOs, and Service Heads:
Lower costs. Faster resolutions. Higher customer lifetime value. Complete control.

Description:
Baton is a marketplace for small business sellers and buyers. 

Baton supports any small business by getting them to a successful sale on the first trusted and transparent platform in the industry. We empower owners with the right information upfront and then match them to serious buyers who see verified company data on our platform.

Managing a small business is complicated. Even though small businesses make up more than half of the US economy, it's hard to get reliable data. How can anyone be expected to sell their small business if there’s no standard for figuring out what a small business is worth?

We built Baton to unlock small business data for everyone. Owners use our platform to instantly get a more accurate valuation using public data and their own financials. 

We believe every small business owner deserves the support they need to take their next step. That journey starts with Baton.
