Name: CarsGuide
Description:
CarsGuide is Australia's leading source for new car reviews, news and advice. Home to the largest and most engaged auto editorial audience, we help serious in-market car buyers make informed choices, compare brands and successfully navigate their purchase journey.

Part of the Gumtree Group and a powerful network of three iconic brands with Gumtree and Autotrader, we're driving impact at scale and reaching more people at all of life's important moments and milestones. Today, we connect people as they buy, sell, research and transact across more than two million live listings and 9,000 car reviews. We reach one in three Australians and see an immense $3+ billion in gross listing volume every month. 

It's the kind of success that ties directly into what we stand for. We aim to be the ultimate destination for anyone looking for an awesome deal, perfect find or new opportunity. Our expert insights and resources help people compare their options, be informed and make confident purchases they can feel good about. And we're proud to contribute to a more sustainable way of living by playing a core role in the Australian Circular Economy as well as delivering informative content on the Australian Electric Vehicle (EV) and broader new-energy vehicle landscape.

But our greatest superpower is our people. We're a smart bunch of problem-solvers who use the latest technologies to reimagine better ways to participate on our platforms. Our diversity brings unique perspectives to all we do, boosting our creativity and helping us tackle complex, real-world challenges.

Every day is a new opportunity to achieve more than you can imagine. It's an exciting time to be a part of our transformation and growth as an Australian-listed and operated company (ASX:MKT).

CarsGuide and the Gumtree Group. Discover a world of opportunity.

Name: Klaravik Sverige
Description:
Klaravik ger företag och privatpersoner möjlighet att köpa begagnade maskiner, verktyg och fordon enkelt, tryggt och till rätt pris. Vårt mål är att förmedla vinnare i alla led. För våra säljande kunder jobbar vi nära med lokal förankring för en ansvarsfull affär. För våra köpare är vi marknadsplatsen som aldrig stannar, alltid med nya relevanta auktioner. Och för samhället bidrar vårt hållbara återbruk till att göra miljön en smula lyckligare. Win-win-win, helt enkelt.

Idag finns Klaravik i Sverige och Danmark och sysselsätter fler än 200 medarbetare i Sverige. I vårt dagliga arbete strävar vi alltid efter att vara nära, enkla och snabba. Nära köparna via webben, nära säljarna via egna säljkåren, nära som i personliga, helt enkelt nära till affären. Det ska vara enkelt för säljarna att sälja, och enkelt för köparna att köpa. Vi är enkla att komma i kontakt med och enkla att ha att göra med. Det ska gå snabbt att sälja och köpa via oss. Genom att vara föregångare och ett föredöme vill vi förändra sättet att handla maskiner, verktyg och fordon. 

Sedan 2022 är Klaravik en del av den holländska auktionskoncernen TBAuctions, en av Europas största onlineauktioner med runt 1200 medarbetare. Koncernen har tillsammans nästan 200 miljoner sajtbesök per år, säljer över 1,6 miljoner objekt och har 750 000 budgivare i 175 länder som sammantaget bidrar til en årlig försäljning på 18 miljarder kronor. I koncernen ingår auktionsvarumärkena Vavato (BE), Klaravik (SE/DK), Troostwijk (EU), Auksjonen (NO), PS Auction (SE), BMA (UK), Surplex (EU) och DAB (DK). Alla med återbruk och cirkularitet som central del i affären.

Name: The Plastics Exchange
Description:
The Plastics Exchange is a real-time marketplace for anonymously buying and selling domestic and international commodity grade resin (HDPE, LDPE, LLDPE, HoPP, CoPP). We offer trading in prime and offgrade resins in railcars, bulk or packaged truckloads and FCL. All orders are for actual delivery. 

We have trading relationships with a large network of major producers, distributors, traders and brokers and typically carry around 25 million lbs of company owned resin warehoused in Houston to aid market liquidity. 

Resin offers are placed online for 1,7, or 14 days and are subject to prior sale and credit approval. We generally maintain 15-25 million pounds of spot offers listed on our trading floor, sometimes more or less depending on market conditions. If you do not see what you want, submit an RFQ or call us and we will find it for you. 

The Plastics Exchange acts as a clearinghouse to complete trades. We are principals, not brokers and handle the credit and logistics. In order to assure the integrity of the market, we guarantee product quality, delivery and payment of every transaction. 

The Plastics Exchange provides in-depth research and news coverage of the resin marketplace. We display historical data, captured from the asking price of our Contract Market, for 9 commodity resin grades as daily, weekly and monthly charts. 

We gather unique market information based on exchange observations along with interactions with producers, brokers, traders, distributors, and processors. This information is compiled and published weekly as Market Updates, available both on our website and by email - simply register to join our distribution list. 

We provide these trading tools as a service to the industry, without charge, to help you make more intelligent buying and selling decisions.

No inflated fees.
No offshore systems.
No trying to be everything to everyone.
Just a clean, smart platform that works—for people, not algorithms.

We designed Quicoo for:
Everyday users who want simplicity and speed | Drivers and couriers who want to earn with dignity.
Small businesses who deserve better logistics without platform pain

And while phase one starts with rides and courier, we’re building toward more—with care. Travel, food, on-demand services and beyond, all in one app, when the time is right.

Quicoo is built by locals, for locals | To restore value to the people who create it.
Not just another app.
A better way to move. A smarter way to deliver.
And a new way forward — for Australia.

Our mission of making healthcare truly inclusive requires a new generation of providers who are genuinely patient-centric and proudly overcome language and cultural barriers.

Name: TrimCheck
Description:
TrimCheck is a comprehensive booking app designed specifically for barbers. Our software is tailored to help independent barbers, whether they're mobile barbers or in-shop barbers, to attract more clients and efficiently manage their bookings. Barbers can create a booking profile via our app, which is then indexed on search engines. This means that when local customers make a "barbers near me" search, they may discover your booking profile and become new clients. Our channel manager feature also enables barbers to increase their online exposure by getting listed on all major booking apps for barbers, through one central listing on the TrimCheck app.

TrimCheck's features for barbers include:

* A verified profile on our consumer app and a web booking page for all barbers.
* The ability to set service prices in any currency and accept various payment methods.
* The option to charge cancellation fees.
* The ability to showcase a portfolio and maximize online exposure.
* The option to offer loyalty programs and subscriptions.
* The ability to combine appointments and walk-ins.
* The ability to manage bookings on multiple platforms from one central app.

For mobile barbers, we have additional features such as the ability to set serving areas and variable distance fees, and to group daily bookings by area.

TrimCheck simplifies the process of managing appointments across various platforms, including Booksy, Fresha, Squire, Thecut, and Styleseat, by offering a centralized system for managing bookings.

Name: Farmsell – Direct Trade. Smarter Future.
Description:
Farmsell – Redefining Agricultural Trade, One Farmer at a Time
Empowering producers. Serving buyers. Transforming trade across Uganda.
In Uganda, over 70% of the population depends on agriculture for their livelihood, yet most smallholder farmers are trapped in unfair systems—facing low prices, delayed payments, exploitative middlemen, and post-harvest losses exceeding 30% in some regions. While many platforms promise market linkage, they often maintain the same flawed logic: connecting farmers to new buyers through old models—leaving farmers with fragmented value chains and little price power.

Farmsell is different.
We believe farmers deserve more than connection—they deserve a smarter, fairer, and fully managed trade system that puts them first.
We serve as the dedicated sales arm for farmers, managing quality assurance, aggregation, packaging, cold storage, logistics, and final delivery to end-buyers. This full-service model ensures:
 Guaranteed offtake
 Fair pricing
 On-time payments for farmers
And for buyers—homes, restaurants, hotels, and schools—Farmsell delivers:
 Fresh, consistent, and traceable produce
 Convenient ordering through the Farmsell App Marketplace
 End-to-end delivery and post-purchase support
We don’t do market linkages. We are the market—plus everything beyond it.

Our Impact So Far
 10,000+ App Downloads
 250,000+ Tonnes of Produce Sold Annually
 2,700+ Farmers Supported (70% Women)
 20% Average Income Increase for Partner Farmers
 500+ Active Buyers (Homes, Restaurants, Schools, Hotels)
 15% Reduction in Post-Harvest Losses
 95% Satisfaction Rate (Farmers & Buyers)
Whether you're a farmer looking for a trusted sales partner or a buyer seeking reliable farm-fresh supply or a donor/funder seeking sustainable impact—Farmsell is your go-to platform.
Farmsell – Direct Trade. Smarter Future.

Description:
Proemtia, demir çelik, alüminyum, ısıtma soğutma sistemleri ve diğer endüstriyel ürünlerin ticaretine aracılık etmek amacıyla İş Bankası Grubu tarafından kurulan ve 500'ün üzerinde satıcı ile 16.000'den fazla alıcısı bulunan Türkiye’nin en büyük endüstriyel pazaryeri platformudur. 

Halihazırda demir çelik, alüminyum, ısıtma ve soğutma sektörlerine ilişkin ürünlerin ticaretine aracılık eden pazaryerimiz, ilerleyen dönemlerde ülke ekonomisi içinde önemli yere sahip olan ve dijitalleşme ihtiyacı bulunan diğer endüstriyel ürün ve emtiaları da kapsayacak şekilde faaliyet alanını ve hacmini genişletecektir.

Proemtia alıcılara, tüm Türkiye genelindeki onaylı satıcıların ürünlerine hızlı erişim, 180 güne kadar vadeli alım imkânı, güvenli tahsilat modeli sayesinde ürünlerini teslim aldıktan sonra satıcılara ödemelerinin aktarılması, rekabetçi ve şeffaf fiyatlar, vadeli alımlarda kur riski yönetimi, lokasyona göre arama ve anında lojistik teklifi alma gibi imkânlar sunuyor. 

Satıcılara da yeni ve hızlı bir satış kanalı sayesinde yeni müşteri ve bölgelere erişim, ürün yelpazesini genişletme, güvenli tahsilat modeli sayesinde ödemelerini 3 iş günü içerisinde doğrudan alma, ürünlerini ve fiyatlarını hızlı bir biçimde sisteme yükleme ve güncelleme gibi avantajlar sağlıyor.

We at Global Trade Plaza understand this and offer a one-stop solution that will help such companies make a profitable business.

Simultaneously, we assure the buyers on our platform have access to a comprehensive and reliable seller base.

In our journey from being a B2B marketplace in India to becoming a global name in the B2B ecosystem, we have assisted several companies in achieving their business objectives and establishing themselves in the overseas market.

"Our vision is to be the ultimate solution to every complication faced by exporters and importers and make international trading simple, safe and quick."
Indian exporters are an integral part of the entire supply chain and through our online B2B portal, we want to make sure that their problems are addressed and solved in the best possible manner. We want to open the doors to safe international trade and make it as transparent, timely and easy as possible.

Description:
MARIHUB is a Dubai-based tech company launched in 2020, specializing in the maritime industry. Today, MARIHUB serves over 200 ships and 2,500 seafarers, delivering an average of 125,000 items monthly across the UAE and beyond.
Through an integrated digital network, Marihub connects ship operators, suppliers, and procurement teams, enhancing efficiency, transparency, and cost-effectiveness. OUR COUNTRIES OF OPERATION:
United Arab Emirates.

OUR MISSION:
Efficiency & Innovation Driven
"To revolutionize ship food provision procurement by leveraging digital innovation, ensuring efficiency, cost-effectiveness, and seamless global supply chain connectivity for the maritime industry."

OUR VISION:
A Smarter, More Connected Maritime Future
"To lead the digital transformation of maritime procurement, ensuring every vessel has access to high-quality provisions through an innovative, efficient, and transparent e-commerce platform."

OUR SERVICES:
Marihub Operating Company FZE currently operates two key business units:

Marihub Online Marketplace (Marine Procurement): A B2B e-commerce platform facilitating the procurement of food provisions and supplies for ships, ensuring efficiency, transparency, and cost-effectiveness.

Marihub Aggregation Solution: A logistics and distribution service utilizing our fleet of trucks, aggregation centers, and warehouses to streamline the supply chain and ensure seamless delivery of provisions to maritime clients.

Name: Atelier Riforma
Description:
Atelier Riforma is an Italian innovative social startup, with the mission of reducing the environmental impact of the fashion industry, by promoting its transition towards a more circular model.

It is complex to efficiently convey (pre- and post-consumer) textile waste to circular processes, infact to date 87% of it ends up in landfills, mostly exported to developing countries.

The two co-founders (Elena Ferrero and Sara Secondo) started in 2019 with a social project on upcycling discarded clothing and, since 2021, they have given a technological breakthrough to the startup, designing and patenting Re4Circular.

Re4Circular is an innovative technology that helps any entity who has deadstock or used textiles to direct each item towards the best form of recovery (e.g. reuse, recycling, upcycling, etc.), according to its characteristics and conditions. 
It is composed by an AI-based classification and digitization technology and a digital platform linked to the circular fashion world (and not only!) that allows to maximize the residual value of any material, making B2B supply and demand meet efficiently.

Description:
Siamo una startup fintech giovane e ambiziosa, che ogni giorno persegue la filosofia del Get. More.

PayBond.com è la piattaforma che unisce il mondo degli investimenti a quello dello shopping attraverso uno strumento di pagamento rivoluzionario: lo Shopping Bond. 

Come funziona?
- Acquisti uno Shopping Bond
- Il suo valore cresce a cadenza regolare secondo le scelte del brand partner
- Lo spendi quando vuoi: subito sfruttando il credito extra immediato o al raggiungimento del valore che desideri ottenere per il tuo shopping.

Il nostro obiettivo è quello di rivoluzionare il modo di fare acquisti con uno strumento che offre vantaggi sia ai Brand che ai consumatori.

I partner ottengono liquidità immediata, visibilità extra e hanno piena libertà nella scelta delle condizioni dell'offerta.
I clienti ottengono un credito extra da spendere presso il partner prescelto. Insomma, comprano per un valore più alto rispetto a quello pagato inizialmente.

Da qui Get. More. 
Ottieni di più, basta aspettare!

•	Identification de fournisseurs vertueux
•	Soumission de leur produit au Lowreka score, notre méthode de score environnemental

ADB Innovation in Focus Awardee 2021 and Bank of the Philippine Islands (BPI) Sinag Spark Awardee 2021

Our global coalition of early-stage believers includes ADB, Silicon Valley VC firms AgFunder and Plug and Play Ventures, family behind Malaysian conglomerate OSK Group, the Singapore-based Atlas Ventures and Accelerating Asia Ventures, the Kakao-backed TheVentures of South Korea, Indonesian impact fund Terazura Investments, Philippine retail giant Waltermart, Australian blue investor Ocean Impact Organization, global impact investors, and Asian family offices.

We envision to fully unlock the $20B potential of the Philippine agri-fisheries by making the agri-supply chain more efficient, equitable for farmers and fisherfolks, and more dependable for buyers. Our capability to bridge the agri-credit gap, as well as provide access to quality inputs, contribute towards the maximization of the sector's peak growth potential.

We are doing this through our end-to-end agri-fisheries value chain innovation, scale-driven market partnerships, and massive smallholder grassroots network.

Join us as we continue this tech revolution in the agritechnology space.

Dijitalleşme ve dönüşümün hızla başladığı 2000’li yılların başında Türkiye’den yurt dışına yüksek katma değerli e-ticaret hizmetiyle başlayan hikayemiz, faaliyet gösterdiğimiz alanların hızla büyümesi ile 2014 yılında Afilli Kozmetik, e-ticarette kişisel bakım ve kozmetik alanındaki uzmanlaşmamızın doğal bir ihtiyacı olarak ise 2016 yılında ESFA Kimya kurulmuştur.

E-ticaret dinamikleri ve dijitalleşme için uzun bir birikim yılı olan 12 yıllık kurumsal tecrübemizin sonucunda E-ticaret, ekolojik teslimat, yazılım ve yenilikçi girişimlerin desteklenmesi gibi farklı sektörlerdeki kapsamlı girişimlerimizle kısa sürede hızla büyüyen bir aile olduk. 2020 yılında ise faaliyet gösterdiğimiz tüm alanları, tek bir çatı altında toplayarak ESFA Grup olarak faaliyet göstermeye başladık.

ESFA Grup, hizmet vermeye başladığı ilk günden bugüne kadar evrensel ve etik değerlerini, topluma karşı sorumluluklarını ve “en iyisini” sunma ilkesini daima koruyor, paydaşları ile şeffaflık ve güvene dayalı iletişimini sürdürülebilir olarak devam ettirmektedir. ESFA Grup, çalışma ortamı, ekip mutluluğu ve güçlü sinerjinin kurum kültüründeki devamlılığı için her zaman “en iyi işveren olma” hedefini sürdürmektedir.

Daima İleri: Sürdürülebilir Katma Değerli Büyüme
ESFA Grup, faaliyet gösterdiği tüm alanlarda kanun ve evrensel etik ilkeler çerçevesinde toplum ve paydaşlarına karşı olan güçlü sorumluklarının bilincinde daima Türkiye’ye yüksek katma değer sağlayan sürdürülebilir büyümeyi hedefleyerek “ideallerinin peşinde” var gücüyle çalışmaktadır.

Name: ISSIMI
Description:
ISSIMI offers members a new collector experience. One built with customer service, trust, and transparency at its core. With over 60 years of combined experience in the specialty car market, ISSIMI’s team is dedicated to taking the opacity out of collecting cars. No more exorbitant fees, vehicles with unknown provenance, or painful transactions.

ISSIMI's primary focus is our clients, we are driven by their needs and requests. Specific cars can be hard to find, individual transactions complicated, and ongoing collection management time consuming. Our suite of services smooths the path for clients to achieve their goals.

In contrast with traditional dealers, brokers, and auction houses, ISSIMI guarantees vehicle quality, offers full financial transparency, and provides turnkey importation and domestic logistics.

ISSIMI specializes in de-risking complex transactions involving exceptional cars. Not only do we locate cars around the world, but we perform the entire process to verify the car’s quality and get it to the buyer's doorstep. Here’s an overview of our process:

Sourcing: We use our extensive network to locate potential candidate cars and perform high level diligence to establish whether they are worth a closer look.

Inspection: We send one of our team members to carefully assess the car, often together with one or more marque experts to provide an even deeper look at the car’s quality. ISSIMI is also able to resolve complex title or ownership situations.

Secure Transactions: We convey offers and negotiate the terms of purchase in a transparent fashion that ensures all parties understand the specifics of the deal.

Import and Domestic Logistics: No matter where in the world the car is located, we can get it to your door and handle the necessary importation formalities along the way.

Name: Trashin
Description:
At Trashin, we are of the belief that carbon is the currency of the future & the world is transitioning to a sustainable lifestyle. We are solving one of the toughest supply chain problems in the world, 'WASTE"! We onboard verified waste collection partners on our app to provide an on-demand, doorstep waste pickup & recycling service; thereby simplifying sustainability for millions of Indians.

In India currently only ~5% of waste is segregated & ~20% is processed while the rest is being dumped in landfills. Also, waste workers involved in collection & processing face social stigma as they are considered to be lower caste. There are more than a million informal waste workers in the country who do not have access to basic necessities and are working in an unsafe environment.

Segregation of waste at source can transform the landscape for recycling in India. This will also reduce the hazards of working with mixed waste and improve working conditions for the waste workers apart from improving recycling rates manifold.

Name: Vico Food Box
Description:
Vico Food Box porta l'Italia a casa tua, ovunque tu sia! 

La nostra storia inizia in Olanda da quattro italiani all'estero. Abbiamo sperimentato di persona quanto possa essere difficile stare lontani da casa, e sappiamo bene che il prodotto preferito ha il potere di migliorare anche la giornata più grigia. Ma come si fa se quel prodotto non è reperibile all'estero? Da questa necessità nasce Vico Food Box, una startup ora al 100% italiana, animata da un team quasi del tutto under 30, con tanta voglia di crescere e costruire in Italia una realtà nuova, sana e stimolante. 

Cosa facciamo? Portiamo letteralmente l'Italia a casa tua! Che tu viva in Europa o in UK, inseriamo nella tua Vico Box i tuoi prodotti preferiti e tutta la nostra passione. Così facendo possiamo accorciare sempre di più le distanze, facendo sentire a casa chi ne ha nostalgia e in Italia chiunque ami il nostro bel paese. Il risultato è parte della nostra missione: sostenere e promuovere il Made in Italy, regalando dei gran bei sorrisi a tutti coloro che scelgono di credere in noi, affidandoci non solo i loro ordini ma il desiderio di sentirsi finalmente a casa.  

Scopri di più sul nostro servizio visitando il nostro sito e non esitare a contattarci, siamo a tua disposizione, pronti a rispondere a qualsiasi curiosità.

Name: GunBroker.com
Description:
GunBroker is the largest online marketplace dedicated to firearms, hunting, shooting and related products. Passionate about guns? GunBroker is a destination for enthusiasts to share our affinity for firearms.

Launched in 1999, GunBroker.com is an informative, secure and safe way to buy and sell firearms, ammunition and hunting/shooting gear online. GunBroker.com promotes responsible ownership of guns and firearms. 

Aside from merchandise bearing its logo, GunBroker.com sells none of the items listed on its website. Third-party sellers list items on the site and Federal and state laws govern the sale of firearms and other restricted items. Ownership policies and regulations are followed using licensed firearms dealers as transfer agents.

---------------

Various federal, state, and local legal statutes regulate the sale and distribution of firearms. It is the responsibility of the buyer and seller to be in compliance with all laws and regulations regarding the purchasing of firearms and related items on our site. As stated in our User Agreement, your breach of these laws is a breach of our user agreement. Underage persons, persons falsely representing themselves, and failing to abide by the applicable laws or the rules of our site will have their user privileges revoked, and may be subject to legal action.

Firearms may only be shipped to a licensed Federal Firearms License (FFL) holder. The Federal Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, and Firearms has created a FAQ about transferring ownership of firearms by unlicensed persons. You can review this information here: http://www.atf.gov/firearms/faq/

GunBroker.com has created a list of FFL holders who are willing to take delivery and manage the transfer of firearms. Check out this list at our FFL Holder Network page. http://www.gunbroker.com/FFL/DealerNetwork.aspx 

Firearms sales are regulated in most places and may be prohibited. Follow all applicable laws. Background checks may be required.

We offer three purpose-built solutions to address the unique needs of each healthcare role:

*Provider Solutions - GraphiteOM: An all-in-one platform for medication procurement and 340B compliance. Providers can manage all orders in one intuitive interface, automate reporting, and stay audit-ready while freeing up staff for patient-focused activities.

*Supplier Solutions - ePortal: A pharma-specific e-commerce portal designed for manufacturers and distributors. Suppliers can deliver a modern, branded buying experience, manage compliance and pricing, and integrate seamlessly with standard EDI connections for fast, effective adoption.

*Marketplace Solutions: Turnkey, co-branded B2B pharma marketplaces for healthcare innovators and trade groups. Launch secure, compliant platforms in weeks, offering competitive pricing, flexible payments, and expanding access to medications, all without operational overhead.

From purpose-built compliance tools and enterprise-grade security to transparent marketplaces, GraphiteRx removes barriers and empowers organizations across the industry to deliver better patient outcomes and create a more transparent, reliable pharmaceutical supply chain.

Name: apadua
Description:
Buying Professional Services presents unique challenges, with fluid specifications, non-recurring needs, and changing internal customers.

Companies of any size, consistently relying on external Professional Services, often find existing procurement solutions ill-suited to their specific requirements. As expenditure for these services can account for 3 to 10% of revenue, efficient procurement processes are essential.

Late involvement of procurement teams, due to unfamiliarity with guidelines, underestimation of standardization benefits, or negative past experiences, further complicates matters. Additionally, many companies face inadequacies in personnel, methods, and technology, with common source-to-contract (S2C) and purchase-to-pay (P2P) solutions proving unsuitable for professional services procurement.

All this creates an urgent need for an innovative solution to address these challenges and empower procurement.

apadua offers a best-of-breed SaaS platform tailored for Professional Services procurement. Designed specifically to address the challenges faced by companies with regular Professional Services demand, apadua bridges methodological and technological gaps, complementing existing sourcing tools.

The platform fosters collaboration between cost center managers and procurement departments, ensuring efficient decision-making. Unlike traditional sourcing solutions, apadua requires no lengthy implementation or extensive staff training, making it accessible and efficient for procurement professionals and internal customers.

By choosing apadua, organizations can leverage an innovative solution that simplifies the complexities of professional services procurement, delivering a seamless and effective buying experience.

Schedule a meeting now to learn more about the apadua way.

Name: Medimap
Description:
Medimap is Canada’s leading digital health marketplace for finding easy access to local healthcare providers. Over 70% of the walk-in medical clinics across Canada currently use our platform to publish their wait times online and hundreds of thousands of patients visit medimap.ca every month to compare availability at clinics in their community. 
 
Founded in 2015, our initial goal was to provide Canadians with an easy way of comparing wait times at walk-in medical clinics in their community to avoid the frustration of driving from clinic to clinic for access to care. Today Medimap has become a trusted resource for over 5 million Canadians who have used our platform to find easier access to care in their community. 
 
Our services include walk-in clinic wait times, on-demand virtual doctor visits, as well as the ability to easily find last minute available appointments for local paramedical services such as massage therapy, physiotherapy and chiropractic clinics. Providers participate in Medimap’s marketplace to reach new patients to grow their practice, fill their last-minute openings, and deliver a better healthcare experience. 
 
Medimap is a private company backed by some of Canada’s leading investors, and we believe we’re still only scratching the surface of what we plan to accomplish. We are a mission-driven organization dedicated to building teams as diverse as the patients and providers we aim to serve. We are a company that prides itself on being highly collaborative, and we believe that diverse perspectives, experiences and contributors make our community and our platform better.

Name: Schibsted Finland
Description:
WHO WE ARE?
Oikotie, Tori, FINN, Blocket, DBA & Bilbasen. Did you spot any familiar names? Then you already know a bit about us at Schibsted Marketplaces! We have a great bunch of over 250 talented professionals in Schibsted Finland while being part of our Schibsted Marketplaces colleagues community in the Nordics and Poland!

Currently, we’re embarking on an exciting journey to become a fully marketplace-focused company. Our mission is to empower people to make smart choices for themselves and future generations. To achieve this, we are committed to staying agile and proactive in the rapidly evolving digital landscape — shaping the future of marketplaces. 

OUR IMPACT
Every day, millions of people engage with our online marketplaces finding their dream job, home, vehicle, or a great second-hand deal. In other words, We are playing a part in the important decisions of people’s lives and have a massive impact on the circular economy together with our 25M users. Yearly we help to save approximately 349 726 tonnes of CO2 emissions with our products in the Nordics. That is what we call meaningful work! We are driven by our core values: Win together, Be fearless, Make a difference, and Be curious. Our values direct us on our burning ambition to make the sustainable alternative the obvious choice by 2035. 

HOW DO WE WORK TOGETHER
We’re all about winning together! We celebrate collective achievements and individual growth. We are fearless, learning from successes and mistakes, driving better marketplaces, and pushing for sustainability. Curiosity unites us as we explore new trends, experiment with AI, and learn from each other.

JOIN US!

Name: CosmoShop GmbH
Description:
Die CosmoShop GmbH mit Sitz in Puchheim bei München ist Entwickler und Hersteller der gleichnamigen Shopsoftware CosmoShop. Das Unternehmen versteht sich als Fullservice E-Business-Dienstleister, der jede Kundenanforderungen bei eCommerce-Projekten umsetzt. Seit 1997, noch unter Zaunz Publishing GmbH firmierend, konzipiert CosmoShop erfolgreich E-Commerce-Anwendungen und realisiert kundenspezifische Programmierungen. Seit 2015 ist CosmoShop zusätzlich zertifizierte Shopware-Agentur, um Projekte noch flexibler an den Bedürfnissen der Kunden auszurichten und die jeweils optimale Basis (CosmoShop oder Shopware) einsetzen zu können.
 

CosmoShop Shopsoftware kommt in verschiedenen Varianten: als Stand-Alone-Lösung für individuelle Installationen sowie mit der Merchandise Edition – einer CosmoShop-Version, die speziell auf die Bedürfnisse von Firmen aus der Werbemittel Branche zugeschnitten ist. Zusätzlich bietet CosmoShop alle wichtigen Dienstleistungen für Shopbetreiber aus einer Hand: von Individualprogrammierung und Design über Hosting bis hin zu Marketing und über unseren Partner cyberpromote auch umfassende Consulting-Services sowie Suchmaschinenoptimierung (SEO). Zu den Kunden von CosmoShop gehören Großunternehmen wie beispielsweise Conrad Electronic, Europa-Park, Allianz Arena München, Vodafone und diverse Universitäten, aber auch zahlreiche mittelständische Unternehmen wie etwa 123Babyland.de, Datatec und Kern & Sohn.

Den Retail-Markt unterstützt CosmoShop mit dem Visual Storemanager, einer Softwarelösung, mit der Handelsketten, Franchisebetriebe und andere Unternehmen mit weitverzweigtem Filialnetz ihre Marketing-Kampagnen und Rollouts umfassend planen und steuern können

Mehr auf www.cosmoshop.de

Branchensoftware: www.werbemittelshop.de

Retail Software / Filialverwaltung / Kampagnen Rollout uvm: www.visual-storemanager.de

Name: SOLU
Description:
Jesteśmy agencją e-commerce, która łączy strategię, design i technologię, aby rosnące marki D2C nie tylko wyglądały świetnie online, ale przede wszystkim sprzedawały. Budujemy kompletne rozwiązania obejmujące:
 analizę rynku i rentowności
 identyfikację wizualną marki
 zarządzanie marketplace
 tworzenie sklepu internetowego
 budowę marki
 reklamy płatne (Google, Meta)

 Współpracujemy z firmami, które chcą czegoś więcej niż przeciętne wyniki. Pomagamy zarówno tym, które dopiero startują w e-commerce, jak i tym, które chcą mocno przyspieszyć. Do tej pory zaufało nam ponad 150 marek, dla których wygenerowaliśmy miliony Euro przychodów i średni wzrost dochodu netto na poziomie +300% w pierwszym roku współpracy.

 Nasi Klienci to m.in. takie marki jak: Marioinex, DEDRA, Supersonic, JUMI, We Love Beds, Aqualogis, Artforma, Coccoliamo, BORNE furniture, Mochtoys.

 Prowadzimy Cię od pierwszego kroku aż po globalną ekspansję:
 przygotowujemy działania zwiększające rentowność
 projektujemy strategie podnoszące konwersję
 tworzymy content, który sprzedaje
 porządkujemy procesy, które hamują rozwój

 Nie robimy „ładnych obrazków dla lajków”. Liczy się sprzedaż i jakość. Każdy ruch opieramy na danych, więc zamiast przypadkowych działań są realne efekty: większe obroty, lepszą marżę, kontrolę kosztów i jasny kierunek rozwoju.

 Nasz zespół to miks specjalistów (UX/UI, marketplace, marketing, analityka), a całością dowodzi prof. dr hab. Dawid Korzekwa, praktyk z 25-letnim doświadczeniem, który łączy naukową precyzję z biznesowym podejściem.

 Działamy globalnie, ale na własnych zasadach i bez korpo-schematów. Wierzymy, że najlepsze efekty powstają tam, gdzie jest zaufanie, partnerstwo i przestrzeń do rozwoju. I tak pracujemy – ambitnie, otwarcie i z pełnym wsparciem dla naszych klientów.

Jeśli chcesz przejść od przypadkowej sprzedaży do strategii skalowalnego wzrostu, umów się na darmową konsultację:
 +48 602 363 899
 hello@sooolu.com

Ürünlerinizi kendi e-ticaret sitenizde satışa sunun, internetten alışveriş yapan milyonlarca müşteriye ulaşın.

Sürekli büyüyen e-ticaret pazarında siz de yerinizi alın. Satışlarınızı artırarak cironuzu katlayın.

-E-ticaret sitenizi kolayca yönetin

Yenilenmiş arayüzü ile kullanıcı dostu altyapıya sahip yönetim paneli sayesinde e-ticaret sitenizi yönetmek çok kolay.

-Tek tıkla Google'da reklam verin

Teknik bilgiye gerek kalmadan Google reklamlarınızı anında kurun, satışlarınızı artırın.

-Instagram ve Facebook'tan satın

Facebook ve Instagram mağazalarınızı anında kurun, ürünlerinizi otomatik aktarın, tek tıkla reklam verin, hemen satışa başlayın.

-Pazaryerlerinde satışa başlayın

Ürünlerinizi pazaryeri mağazanızda da satışa sunun, çift taraflı entegrasyon sayesinde tüm mağazalarınızı tek panelden yönetin.

-E-ticaret uygulama mağazası

Uygulama mağazasında bulunan onlarca uygulama arasından dilediğinizi yükleyin, e-ticaret sitenize yeni özellikler ekleyin.

-Kullanıma hazır site tasarımları

Her sektöre uygun e-ticaret sitesi tasarımlarını tema kütüphanemizde bulabilir, dilediğinizi anında kullanabilirsiniz.

-Kargo maliyetinizi azaltın

Müşterilerimize özel anlaşmalı kargo fiyatlarından yararlanın, indirimli fiyatlarla siparişlerinizi kargolayın.

-Hemen ücretsiz deneyin

Akıllı E-ticaret Paketleri'ni 15 gün ücretsiz deneyin. Kendi e-ticaret sitenizi oluşturun.

Name: Kiraz.co A.Ş
Description:
Biz, Kiraz co teknoloji ve yazılım hizmetleri sanayi ticaret anonim şirketi ekibi olarak Türkiye'deki e-ticaret sektörünün büyümesine ve gelişmesine katkı sağlamak için çalışan bir girişimiz. Küçük ve orta ölçekli işletmelerin ve girişimcilerin çevrimiçi varlıklarını kolayca oluşturmasını ve yönetmesini sağlamak amacıyla kurulan platformumuz, bu işletmelerin müşterilerine sundukları ürünleri fiziksel olarak stoklamak zorunda kalmadan, siparişleri tedarikçilere yönlendirerek satış yapmalarına olanak tanır.

İş modelimiz, işletmelerin stok tutma ve envanter yönetimi gibi zorluklarla uğraşmadan doğrudan müşterilerine ürünlerini sunmalarını sağlar. Bu sayede işletmeler, müşterilerine daha iyi bir hizmet sunarken, aynı zamanda iş süreçlerini de kolaylaştırırlar.

Platform olarak, sadece satış başına %5 komisyon alıyoruz. Bu, başlangıç maliyetlerini minimize ederek girişimcilerin ve işletmelerin e-ticaret yolculuklarına destek olmamızı sağlar. Kullanıcılarımızın başarıları bizim de başarımızdır ve her adımda onlara yardımcı olmak için buradayız.

Bunun yanı sıra, platformumuzda sunduğumuz özellikler ve hizmetler, kullanıcılarımızın daha fazla satış yapmalarına ve müşteri memnuniyetini artırmalarına yardımcı olur. Bizler, girişimcilerin ve işletmelerin çevrimiçi dünyada var olmalarını ve büyümelerini sağlamaya odaklanmış bir ekibiz.

Kısacası, biz Kiraz.co ekibi olarak, Türkiye'deki e-ticaret sektörünün büyümesine ve gelişmesine katkıda bulunmayı hedefleyen, girişimcilerin ve işletmelerin e-ticaret yolculuklarına destek olmaktan mutluluk duyan bir grup insanız. Türkiye'deki küçük ölçekli işletmelerin çevrimiçi satışlarını artırmak ve e-ticaret sektöründeki varlıklarını güçlendirmeye yardımcı olmayı amaçlıyoruz.

Name: Goldsaver
Description:
Goldsaver to nowoczesny sklep internetowy, w którym „po kawałku” kupujesz sztabkę fizycznego złota. W dowolnym momencie, za pomocą kilku kliknięć, nabywasz dowolną ilość kruszcu. 

Gdy kupisz 1 uncję złota (31,1 g), możesz odebrać ją w formie fizycznej sztabki - w 24 salonach Goldenmark w największych miastach w Polsce, u kuriera albo w wybranym paczkomacie lub przechować w skarbcu Goldenmark, z pełnym ubezpieczeniem i bez dodatkowych kosztów. Zgromadzone złoto w każdej chwili, zarówno przed uzbieraniem uncji, jak i po, można także odsprzedać bezpośrednio w sklepie internetowym.

Cenę, w której kupujesz złoto, widzisz w momencie zakupu. Jest ona wyliczana na bazie aktualnego kursu złota z NBP, z uwzględnieniem kosztów produkcji, transportu i ubezpieczenia oraz funkcjonowania sklepu. Nie naliczamy dodatkowych opłat za wysyłkę sztabek ubezpieczonym kurierem ani za płatności elektroniczne. 

Złoto kupujesz za pomocą wygodnych płatności elektronicznych, a wszystkie operacje przeprowadzane są za pośrednictwem bezpiecznych i szyfrowanych połączeń SSL. Każda Twoja wpłata oznacza zakup fizycznego złota przez Goldsavera u dostawcy metali szlachetnych. Każdy Twój zakup potwierdzamy fakturą.

Goldsaver jest częścią Goldenmark - największego w Polsce dystrybutora złota fizycznego na rynku klientów indywidualnych, który w ciągu 13 lat działalności dostarczył Polakom ponad pół miliona uncji fizycznego złota. Goldenmark współpracuje z renomowanymi producentami, posiadającymi akredytację LBMA (London Bullion Market Association), a w ofercie firmy znajdują się metale szlachetne takich firm i mennic, jak niemiecki C.HAFNER, United States Mint czy Rand Refinery z RPA.

Companies can assess material efficiency, carbon footprint, packaging sustainability, and more while gaining access to verified suppliers and peer knowledge.

By breaking down silos across the value chain, Resrcle drives collaboration among brands, manufacturers, and innovators, enabling a regenerative system that turns waste into value. We’re building the ecosystem where circular fashion becomes the norm, not the exception.

Description:
Raveival is the original online marketplace for buying and selling secondhand music festival and rave fashion. We enable festival fashion circularity with Treet, our partner that is helping manage this amazing online resale experience. Together, we are making a more sustainable fashion ecosystem that unites climate innovation and self-expression.

Raveival's mission is to bring the sustainability of thrifting culture to the dance floor. 

To make the selling process easier, Treet provides sellers with pre-paid shipping labels. After buyers have worn an item they bought on Raveival, they can choose to "reRave It", which allows them to list the item directly from their order history. 

All orders made through Treet are covered by Buyer Protection: get the item that was promised in the condition it was promised in, or receive a full refund.

Buyers can choose to add Seel Return Assurance to their order at checkout. Return Assurance gives a 7-day return window on otherwise final sale items. If a buyer is unhappy with the purchase (didn't fit as expected, arrived late, no longer needed), Seel will buy it back for 100% of the purchase price.

Collegandosi al sito bookdealer.it i lettori selezionano il punto vendita in cui effettuare l’acquisto e scelgono tra due modalità di recapito del libro: consegna a domicilio o spedizione con corriere. In alternativa possono decidere di andare a ritirarlo in negozio di persona. La somma spesa andrà direttamente alla libreria.
Facendosi personalmente carico delle consegne, ed entrando quindi in contatto diretto con i clienti, i librai possono far conoscere la propria libreria fuori dal quartiere, mantenendo vivo il rapporto con il lettore e alimentando il commercio di prossimità anche sull’online.

Name: fairdoc
Description:
Fairdoc ist eine digitale Plattform, auf dem Assistenz- und Fachärzte attraktive Interims-Anstellungen in deutschen Einrichtungen des Gesundheitswesens (v.a. Krankenhäuser, Reha-Kliniken und Medizinische Versorgungszentren) finden.

Die fairdoc-Vorteile für Ärztinnen und Ärzte:
- Flexiblere Einsatzplanung / Arbeitszeiten, die sich an Ihre Lebenssituation anpassen. Wie wäre es z.B. mit regelmäßigen Sabbaticals?
- Weniger Bürokratie, als in der Festanstellung. Konzentrieren Sie sich voll auf Ihre Patienten.
- Übertarifliche Vergütung mit zusätzlichen Boni.
- Passgenaue Jobangebote direkt und schnell aufs Handy - keine E-Mail Flut, keine Traumeinsätze verpassen!
- Ausführliche Informationen über den Einsatz, die Einrichtung und Vorgesetzte vor Bewerbung, Zugriff auf Bewertungen anderer Vertretungsärzte.
- Zuverdienst zum festangestellten Job möglich.
- Digitale Abwicklung aller arbeitsvertraglichen Prozesse inklusive Profilerstellung, Bewerbung, Vertragsunterschrift, Einsatzplanung, Zeiterfassung.
- Natürlich betreuen wir Sie auf Wunsch auch jederzeit persönlich.

Da Ärzte in Deutschland nicht freiberuflich arbeiten dürfen, nutzen wir das Modell der Arbeitnehmerüberlassung (auch Zeitarbeit genannt). Ihr Arbeitsvertrag wird direkt mit der GraduGreat GmbH, der Inhaberin der Marke fairdoc, geschlossen. Zur Registrierung im Talentpool brauchen Sie lediglich Ihre Approbationsurkunde.

Onde is your behind-the-scenes AI agent that takes the chasing out of event planning — sourcing venues, vendors, and follow-ups so hosts can focus on what really matters: people, atmosphere, and lasting connections.

We believe every great relationship starts in a great room.
That’s why Onde exists — to make hosting effortless and to help ambitious founders, investors, and creators become unforgettable.

What used to take 10+ hours of emails, calls, and spreadsheets now happens in one conversation.

 More opportunities sparked from every gathering

Whether you’re planning a founder dinner, investor salon, or creative retreat — Onde makes you the host everyone remembers.

We make hosting effortless so you can become unforgettable.

Name: TIME Marketplace
Description:
Welcome to TIME, the marketplace for sharing knowledge through personalized video interactions. 

With TIME, anyone can ask questions and receive tailored video responses.

Or you can accept short video questions, inspire with your video replies, and get paid or give to charity.

What is TIME?
 
TIME is a bite-sized video-based app that allows you to engage with your followers and earn money from the very first interaction. You don’t have to build up a massive following or get a certain number of subscribers before you can monetize your account, it’s monetized from day one, and every time you engage with people in the community, you earn money.  It costs nothing to join, and nothing to operate - it’s a simple, powerful new tool that allows you to earn extra income or raise money for charity by engaging with the people who follow you.

How does it work?

It’s actually really easy. You create a profile on TIME with a photo or video and a brief description of your expertise. You can upload videos from your other social platforms should you wish to give people a greater sense of who you are and what you do. You set a rate per minute (we recommend figuring out how much you’d want to earn per hour and then doubling it so your time on the app is more valuable than off of it), and make yourself available for interactions. The community are then able to send you video questions up to one minute long and you can reply in a video between 1-3 minutes long.  The moment you press send on your reply, the money is transferred to your account (or split between you and your charity of choice, should you chose to fundraise), and the follower receives a personal reply from you with a helpful answer to their specific question. The videos are private unless you, the expert, choose to share them on your profile. If you don’t reply within 7 days, the money is transferred back to the follower with nothing gained or lost.

www.time.stream/invitation

Name: AutoTrack
Description:
AutoTrack is onderdeel van Automotive Mediaventions B.V. AutoTrack.nl is in 2000 opgericht en is ontstaan uit de vraag naar een onafhankelijk advertentieplatform van tweedehands auto's op de Nederlandse markt. Sinds 2004 biedt AutoTrack naast occasions ook een uitgebreid onderdeel nieuwe auto's. Hier kunt u alle nieuwe merken en modellen die in Nederland te koop zijn met elkaar vergelijken op basis van uw eigen wensen en behoeften. Wilt u direct over een nieuwe auto beschikken? Kiest u dan voor Nieuwe auto's op voorraad. Hier vindt u alle nieuwe auto's en demo's die op voorraad staan bij BOVAG Autodealers, veelal aangeboden tegen aantrekkelijke kortingen. 

CheckCheck AutoTrack
AutoTrack heeft een duidelijke missie: u een betrouwbaar advertentieplatform bieden zodat u zorgeloos op zoek kan gaan naar een andere auto. Zelfverzekerd een auto kopen is namelijk niet altijd vanzelfsprekend. Een auto kiezen is vaak het probleem niet. Rood, zwart, of blauw, benzine of diesel, stationwagen of sedan, dat zijn keuzes die u meestal zelf kan maken. Maar om te weten of de auto van uw keuze ook echt goed is, daar is vaak de hulp van een deskundige voor gewenst. AutoTrack is die deskundige en daarmee de enige site waar u zich geen zorgen hoeft te maken over de betrouwbaarheid van de aangeboden informatie van de auto naar uw keuze, gebruikt of nieuw. Waarom? Omdat AutoTrack.nl de informatie voor u checkt. 

Kwaliteitsbeleid
AutoTrack controleert daarom structureel alle auto advertenties voorafgaand aan publicatie op AutoTrack.nl. Dat betekent dat alle objectieve informatie in de advertenties wordt gecontroleerd en waar nodig aangepast dan wel verwijderd. Het doel? Het voor u mogelijk maken om ontspannen tot aankoop over te gaan. Immers, een auto kopen is een belangrijke en waardevolle aanschaf, de kans op negatieve verrassingen willen wij door een strikt kwaliteitsbeleid te hanteren, voor u minimaliseren.

Name: Ivoire Troyes - Boisseau-Pomez
Description:
Quelles sont vos missions ?
Nous sommes les professionnels de l'expertise et de la vente aux enchères de tous types de biens de valeurs ou de collection allant du bijoux, jouets, vins, livres, aux objets d'art et d'antiquité jusqu'aux voitures anciennes mais aussi de tout type de matériel professionnel. Le tout en sécurisant les transactions entre les acheteurs et les vendeurs.
Nous trouvons également de nombreuses solutions aux problématiques de débarras ou vide-maisons dans le cadre des successions ou démenagements.

Comment faire évaluer un bien ?
Très simplement et rapidement sans se déplacer.
Vous nous envoyez des photos par mail et nous vous répondons sous 48 h.
Nous pouvons bien sûr venir expertiser sur place si nécessité, vous possédez peut-être un trésor sans le savoir.
En cas de doute, nous travaillons avec un excellent réseau d'experts indépendants dans chaque domaine et typologie des biens. Une fois la valeur connue, vous décidez (ou pas) de vendre.

Comment se déroule une vente aux enchères ?
Les commissaires priseurs se chargent de tout : réception de vos biens à vendre, authentification et estimation des biens, élaboration du mandat de vente, prise de photos de chaque article, mise en ligne sur nos plateformes de ventes en ligne, promotion de la vente aux enchères sur internet, les réseaux sociaux et la presse spécialisée, organisation d'expositions publiques des biens à vendre, enfin la vente aux enchères elle-même.
Nous réglons nos vendeurs dans le mois suivant la vente.

Les ventes sur internet, quel apport ?
Nous obtenons des résultats de ventes aux enchères très satisfaisants puisque les articles confiés dans nos ventes sont vus par les amateurs acheteurs ou collectionneurs du monde entier grâce à nos plateformes de ventes en ligne performantes!

Name: Wylde Market
Description:
From the outset, we’ve talked about Wylde as being a ‘rebellion’.
 
But it's not the sort of rebellion that requires anyone to glue their hands to a tube train.

This rebellion is significantly more quiet, thoughtful. One where, together, we vote with our feet – and our wallets. And where, collectively, we start to fundamentally change the way food is bought and sold in this country.
 
Because this is a rebellion against big food. 
 
A rebellion against food with no flavour. 
 
Food with no soul.
 
It’s a rebellion against the use of antibiotics and weird ‘animal feeds’, cramped conditions and chemicals. Against food that is produced industrially; contemptuously. 
 
It's against long, inefficient supply chains with each new intermediary adding layers of both margin and carbon, like some sort of dystopian Jenga tower. 
 
It's against food that is ‘of no fixed abode’, anonymously shipped up and down the country, from one vast warehouse to another, all dressed up in bright, colourful packaging to cynically try to kid us that this ain’t in fact so. 
 
And it’s a rebellion against the supermarkets; their predatory practices, their plastified produce and their weirdly over-lit - and unnervingly cold - aisles of depression.
 
But it’s also a rebellion for lots of things too. 
 
For the things that matter.
 
For our planet.
For our producers.
For the power of technology to disrupt, to disintermediate and to liberate.
 
But most of all, it's for the simple, ancient and quintessentially human joy of preparing and then sitting down to eat amazing food with amazing people - and hearing the stories of both.
 
Viva la rebelión!

Mammarancia: tra storia e passione, le arance più buone del mondo.
La storia di Mammarancia ha inizio nella seconda metà del ‘900, alle pendici dell’Etna, tra gli agrumeti di Francofonte. Le sue origini sono indissolubilmente legate a nonno Carlo, che ha passato la vita a curare i suoi alberi come fossero figli.

Proprio dalla sua tenacia e dal suo amore per la coltivazione delle arance è nata Mammarancia: una start up giovane all’insegna della qualità e della professionalità, sempre nel rispetto della tradizione.

Avvolti dal sole e protetti dal vulcano, dai nostri terrazzamenti nascono prodotti genuini, apprezzati e richiesti in tutto il mondo. Si tratta di terreni drenanti che, tra zolle di terra mista a sassi e pietre, cedono l’acqua piovana dolcemente, creando un equilibrio perfetto di penetrazione dei liquidi. Per queste caratteristiche e per le condizioni climatiche che contraddistinguono la zona – a sud dell’Etna – le nostre arance vantano un sapore agrodolce perfettamente bilanciato, una consistenza particolare e un colore inconfondibile.
Mammarancia, un mix perfetto di innovazione e tradizione
Dagli agrumeti terrazzati dell’area di Francofonte dipende l’incidenza dei raggi solari sugli alberi che, unita all’escursione termica, innesca il processo di pigmentazione dell’arancia rossa di Sicilia.

Il rosso brillante che si riscontra nelle sfumature degli spicchi deriva infatti dall’Etna, che rende le notti più fredde rispetto ai giorni caldi e assolati tipici del clima siciliano. Ecco perché solo qui si trova la vera arancia rossa ‘made in Sicily’.

Chi è Mammarancia?
Non sono solo la polpa particolarmente succosa ed il profumo intenso a caratterizzare le nostre arance. Dietro i nostri prodotti ci sono più di 50 anni di esperienza, tra conoscenze e saperi tramandati di generazione in generazione.

Less pomoże Ci zbudować stylową garderobę w duchu minimalizmu. Uporządkujesz przestrzeń wokół siebie, a niepotrzebne ubrania sprzedasz w aplikacji.

KUPUJ ŚWIADOMIE
W Less znajdziesz wyjątkowe ubrania wystawione na sprzedaż przez innych użytkowników aplikacji. Kupujesz tylko to, co najlepiej wyraża Twój styl.

DBAJ O PLANETĘ
Dając ubraniom drugie życie, wysyłasz ważny komunikat: jestem po stronie środowiska. Dzięki takim wyborom jak Twój, zmniejsza się ilość odpadów tekstylnych.

Zacznij działać już dzisiaj, to proste!

Zmiana w stylu życia może wydawać się sporym wyzwaniem (zwłaszcza kiedy nasza szafa pęka w szwach), ale wcale nie musi być trudna. Specjalnie dla nowych użytkowników Less przygotowaliśmy filmy, które ułatwią Ci start. Pomożemy Twojej szafie odetchnąć, a Tobie skomponować spójną garderobę - krok po kroku. 

Zakupy korzystne dla Ciebie i dla Ziemi

Wybierając ubrania bezpośrednio od właścicieli wspierasz kulturę recyklingu i jednocześnie płacisz mniej za modowe perełki. To miłe uczucie, prawda? Zakupy w Less to również:

WYGODA
W aplikacji codziennie pojawiają się nowe ubrania. Szukasz idealnej koszuli? Użyj filtrów i przeglądaj interesujące Cię oferty. Zakupy możesz robić wszędzie i o każdej porze - wszystko załatwisz z poziomu telefonu.

JAKOŚĆ
Istotą Less są zadbane ubrania, które długo posłużą nowym właścicielom. Zależy nam też na jakości samych transakcji - właśnie dlatego możesz kupować od zaufanych sprzedawców. 

KONTROLA
Less zapisuje Twoje zakupy w wirtualnej szafie, dzięki temu możesz z łatwością monitorować stan swojej garderoby. Kupujesz również offline? Wprowadź i te ubrania do aplikacji. Kiedy postanowisz coś wystawić na sprzedaż, zrobisz to w 20 sekund

Name: Les Piscines de Romain - France
Description:
Abracadamall est un centre commercial virtuel éthique et solidaire qui révolutionne l'expérience d'achat en ligne. Conçu pour allier commerce et engagement, notre plateforme regroupe des univers thématiques variés, allant de la piscine au jardin, en passant par la mode, la beauté, la maison et bien plus encore. Chaque univers offre aux clients un accès direct à des produits et services de qualité proposés par des vendeurs indépendants, tout en soutenant des initiatives écologiques et solidaires.

Chez Abracadamall, nous mettons un point d’honneur à valoriser les vendeurs plutôt que les produits. Chaque commerçant possède un espace dédié où il peut interagir directement avec ses clients, créer des relations de confiance, et proposer des offres adaptées à leurs besoins. Contrairement aux marketplaces traditionnelles, nous ne prélevons aucune commission sur les ventes, ce qui permet aux vendeurs de maximiser leurs marges et d’offrir des prix compétitifs.

Notre engagement va au-delà de la simple transaction commerciale. Pour chaque tranche de 100 € d'achat, un arbre est planté à Madagascar, impliquant les familles locales dans un projet de reforestation. Ainsi, chaque achat sur Abracadamall contribue non seulement à l’économie locale, mais aussi à la préservation de la planète.

En tant que plateforme éthique, Abracadamall souhaite également faciliter l’accès à des solutions de paiement responsables grâce à Abracadapay. Cette solution sécurisée permet des paiements en plusieurs fois, tout en garantissant la sécurité des transactions grâce à un compte séquestre.

Enfin, avec des projets d'expansion internationale en cours, Abracadamall ambitionne de s’étendre en Suisse, en Espagne, en Belgique, et bien d'autres pays. Rejoignez une nouvelle ère de commerce en ligne, où chaque achat a un impact positif, et où l'humain et la planète sont au cœur des préoccupations.

Name: TNK | New Orleans Homes for Sale Blogs | AEO
Description:
When you see a neighborhood for the first time, the most important thing often is the way it looks, like the styles of it homes and their overall curb appeal. Some places only reveal their true character after living in them for a while, that's why it's important to learn all you can about the neighborhood you plan to call home.

New Orleans has many densely populated urban neighborhood and homes here are a mixture of owners and renters. The real estate is primarily made up of small studios to four bedroom single-family homes, and other multi-family housing options.

Urban neighborhoods show off a unique kind of curb appeal with stunning visuals that are exhibited in the cities diverse lifestyles. Many neighborhoods evokes images of, copious French doors, Victorian homes, with crisp cantilevered balconies; decorative wrought iron balustrades; and Greek Revival cornices to small colorful shotgun homes; and quaint Creole cottages, with rich and thick mottled plaster walls. 

The commercial real estate is much like stepping into a time capsule: older buildings boasting a captivating blend of history and charm. Where grand buildings with intricate details and classic architectural styles stand as silent witnesses to bygone eras, that seem at peace with their surroundings. Within them are many interesting things going on.

------

Chordal is an agnostic thoroughfare where the world’s great music rights holders transact with the content economy.

Description:

Ce service internet comprend une application mobile et un site internet de réservation de sorties mais aussi de communication.

Le but est de centraliser toutes les sorties possibles dans une ville et de proposer une seule et unique plateforme de billetterie et de communication pour l’intégralité des entreprises de cette ville.

Les entreprises clientes pourront personnaliser entièrement leur page d’établissement et commencer à vendre en quelques clics, elles disposent aussi d’analyses de données poussées, disponible dans leur tableau de bord, les aidant à prendre des décisions et réduisant leur temps de comptabilité. De plus, les entreprises disposent d’un service de communication, qui, à chaque publication, de post, d'événement ou de formule, notifie les utilisateurs abonnées.

Les utilisateurs pourront réserver directement n’importe quelle activité sur le site et valider leur tickets sur place grâce à un QRcode. L’interface AfterWork a été entièrement conçue avec l’aide des entreprises et des utilisateurs, à la manière de la co-conception pour offrir un service optimal pour les clients et les utilisateurs.

Notre plateforme permet de sécuriser l'ensemble des transactions, garantissant aux acheteurs que chaque commande passée respecte les règles de la commande publique dès le premier euro.
 
Grâce à Panachats, les acheteurs publics peuvent non seulement simplifier leurs processus d'achat, mais aussi être assurés que chaque transaction est conforme au Code de la commande publique. Nous avons structuré notre conformité autour de trois axes principaux, garantissant ainsi une transparence et une sécurité totales :
 
Contrôle qualitatif des fournisseurs : Chaque entreprise qui rejoint notre marketplace fait l'objet d'une vérification rigoureuse. Nous nous assurons de leur capacité à répondre aux exigences des marchés publics, et ce contrôle est maintenu en continu tout au long de leur présence sur la plateforme.
 
Conclusion du marché public : Lorsqu'un achat est validé sur Panachats, un véritable marché public de gré à gré est automatiquement conclu avec l'acheteur, matérialisé par un numéro d’engagement. Cela garantit une traçabilité et une conformité parfaite avec les obligations réglementaires.
 
Paiement simplifié : Après la réalisation de la prestation ou la fourniture des biens, le paiement du marché public s’effectue en toute sécurité via ChorusPro, avec une facturation automatique directement intégrée dans la plateforme.
 
Notre mission chez Panachats est de faciliter et de sécuriser les achats publics tout en respectant scrupuleusement la législation. Nous permettons aux acheteurs publics de gagner du temps et d’assurer la conformité de leurs achats tout en offrant aux fournisseurs un accès simplifié et régulé aux marchés publics.

Vision:

At UPGRADE, we aim to be the leading brand in Egypt’s electronics market, driving innovation and setting the standard for affordability and sustainability.

Name: Builder Helper – Collaborative Heavy Equipment Rental Platform
Description:
Builder Helper was born from a simple observation: in construction, millions of dollars sit idle every month in equipment parked in yards, while other contractors pay full price for the exact same machines.

Our mission is clear: turn waste into value. Builder Helper directly connects contractors to rent equipment, whether operated or non-operated. The result: owners turn idle assets into revenue, users gain fast and affordable access to the right machines, and the entire industry becomes more efficient and agile.

Behind Builder Helper is the team at Buildup Recruitment, a firm specialized for over 8 years in talent acquisition for Quebec’s construction ecosystem. We know the realities of the field, the labor challenges, and the financial pressures contractors face. That’s what drove us to build a solution designed for the industry, by the industry.

To bring this vision to life, we partnered with Third Bridge, a cutting-edge technology team that designs and develops our platform. Their expertise in digital products allows us to deliver a robust, user-friendly tool perfectly tailored to contractors’ needs.

Builder Helper is where deep knowledge of the construction sector meets technological innovation. Together, we aim to make collaboration a performance driver for all builders.

Name: Herost - Positive Travel Guide and Toolkit
Description:
Travel Good, Feel Good Do Good 
Positive Travel Experiences Powered by Local Heroes

Herost is an impact platform dedicated to sustainable, regenerative, community-driven tourism. 

Our ambition is to stand as a reference travel guide and toolkit for hosts and travelers willing to have a positive impact on local communities and their environment.

Purpose: to make this world a fairer place to live and explore
Vision: to advance travel as a tool for the sustainable development and well-being of all
Mission: to support responsible travel accommodation, restaurant, activity and tour providers, and to highlight their sustainability engagement in order to connect them with travelers who care about their impacts on people and the planet.

Our values: 
Equality, equity and diversity
Creativity and authenticity
Quality over quantity, value over volume

Herost is promoting travel experiences that are good for people and the planet, with a particular focus on eco-friendly accommodations like eco-lodges, as well as agritourism, wine tourism, spiritual tourism, and wellness activities such as hiking, retreats, forest/sea/spa therapy, yoga, etc.

To boost our awareness-raising and outreach activities, we have implemented a Global Youth Ambassadors program.

Herost is a solution of Millennium Destinations, a non-profit organization and international network of consultants and partners offering consulting and training services for the sustainable development, management, and marketing of tourism destinations, businesses, and experiences.

Contact us to be part of our journey!

How it works:

1) Schedule an Inspection:  Use our online form to schedule an inspection at our purchase center closest to you. We will meet with you at a time that is most convenient for you.

2) Get a free evaluation:Our team of trained professionals will inspect your Property and verify the documents of your property. Once the checks are complete, we will provide you with an estimate evaluation of your property.

3)Sell your Property: Once you accept the offered price for your Property, we will verify your paperwork, prepare the transfer of documents, Provide you with token bounding your papers and make the remaining payment on transfer. Our payments are guaranteed.

Your Property, Our priority.

Name: AuctionVilla Bangladesh
Description:
First-ever C2C auction and offer marketplace in Bangladesh - fast, secure, simplified.

- Auto Bidding at core, user-friendly experience for both sellers and buyers.
- Payment Escrow, ensures secure transactions and transparency.
- Marketplace system, enabling businesses and individual sellers to showcase their products.

With a population of 170 million, Bangladesh is the eighth most populous country in the world, and yet it lacks an online auction platform. This critical market gap inspired us to build AuctionVilla Bangladesh.

Online auctions remain a largely unexplored and underserved market in Bangladesh. Our goal is to harmonize this fragmented market by emerging as the eBay equivalent in the country.

The platform allows users to list products for auction, ranging from brand-new and secondhand merchandise to rare collectibles. Auction winners transact funds securely via a designated deal room.

The re-commerce segment in Bangladesh is growing by a factor of 20, more accelerated than the general retail market - estimated to surpass $2B by 2030.

Considering the conventional resale values offered by retail shops are typically unsatisfactory and often involve various scams, AuctionVilla Bangladesh aims to revolutionize this process.
 
With our auction-based approach combined with secure escrow services, we intend to simplify and safeguard the reselling process for both buyers and sellers.

AuctionVilla Bangladesh is a step forward towards a sustainable and progressive economy.

Name: MAMRAMIM Loan & Note Marketplace
Description:
MAMRAMIM is the first business-to-business mortgage loan & note marketplace. We provided mortgage brokers, lenders, note sellers and note buyers a digitized bidding platform to optimize acquisition and profitability.

The mortgage loan, note, and debt supply chain is fractured and antiquated. The lack of an industry marketplace prevents the ease of restructuring (if not eliminating) these costs. Until now!

The MAMRAMIM ecosystem provides originators of mortgage loans, notes, and debt instruments the ability to bring their exclusive loan/note prospects to a marketplace of lenders and note buyers who are ready to compete for their prospect by offering best rate and terms. 

This is done by streamlining the relationship between the supply and demand sides of the industry and MAMRAMIM is that tool. The prospects are live and are able to be bid on in real-time.

No longer do lenders and note buyers have to wait for a mortgage loan/note to walk through their door. They are now able to go directly to a mortgage marketplace to source loans/notes that meet their lending criteria. 

Consider the MAMRAMIM Loan & Note Marketplace a "live" pricing engine (though we are so much more).

 Traditional pricing engines are a static environment where lenders "hope" the broker picks them to price their loan with. MAMRAMIM is a marketplace of "live" loan and note prospects where lenders and note buyers can proactively (and anonymously) come to compete to win that prospect. The best rate and terms wins! The anonymity within the MAMRAMIM marketplace plays a key role as it allows lenders and note buyers to adjust their pricing in a non-public way. One loan/note acquisition might be more appealing than another which might lend to more aggressive pricing. 

Our digitized marketplace provides Brokers, Lenders, Note Sellers and note Buyers the ability to come together to democratize, stabilize, and elevate the industry.

Whether you're a supplier looking to expand your reach, a buyer in search of quality products or services, or a service provider aiming to scale operations, Try in Second offers the tools and network to help you succeed.  

What Sets Us Apart?

2. Seamless Connectivity
   At Try in Second, we prioritize efficiency. Our user-friendly interface and robust search tools make it easy for buyers to connect with verified suppliers and service providers, saving time and effort.  

3. Trust and Transparency
   Building trust is at the core of our values. We vet our suppliers and service providers to ensure quality, reliability, and integrity. Our transparent processes foster confidence, making business transactions stress-free.  

4. Global Reach, Local Impact
   While we provide global networking opportunities, we also focus on local markets, ensuring businesses can grow both locally and internationally.  

Our Mission  
Our mission is to revolutionize the B2B ecosystem by providing a platform that fosters growth, innovation, and collaboration. We aim to eliminate the complexities of traditional business transactions, empowering enterprises to focus on what they do best—delivering value.

Name: iSupply AU

Offering Indigenous reconciliation supply opportunities for Australian companies.

Driven by an inspirational Yawuru and Karajarri leader from Western Australia, iSupply addresses his concern surrounding the lack of pathways for young indigenous people to embrace traditional culture while combining it with modern world opportunities.  

iSupply will help to ensure that we are creating an economically sustainable future for Indigenous Australians across a diverse range of businesses and opportunities. 

iSupply Australia looks to source the best products and services to bring a superior solution to the reconciliation procurement process.  Servicing as a marketplace-style platform to assemble goods and service providers to support Australian businesses while offering career development paths for aspiring indigenous individuals. 

Whether employed full-time, through an internship or work-experience trials, suppliers to iSupply share the same commitment to providing opportunities to learn, develop and experience.  We collectively believe that learning, experience, developing skills and providing a long-term, sustainable platform of individual growth is the most effective way to progress willing, interested and motivated Australian Aboriginals and Torres Strait Islander people.

Partnering with like-minded individuals from “Out East”, iSupply will provide opportunities beyond the more traditional locations and industries of indigenous opportunity.  Likewise, iSupply will look to provide learning opportunities for our suppliers who have not experienced Australia in its native form.

Name: Interstock - Giełda Dealerska
Description:
Interstock.pl: Giełda Dealerska, która zmienia zasady gry w B2B.

Interstock to zamknięta, profesjonalna sieć, stworzona wyłącznie dla autoryzowanych dealerów samochodowych. 
Mamy jeden cel: zwiększyć Twoją efektywność 
Doskonale wiemy, że w codziennej pracy mierzycie się z wyzwaniami, takimi jak:

•	Wolna rotacja stocku: Auta, które nie pasują do lokalnego profilu klienta, zalegają na placu, generując koszty.

•	Problematyczne Buy Backi: Regularnie powtarzający się temat z niewygodnym odkupem

•	Brak dostępu do unikalnych aut: Ciężko znaleźć poszukiwane pojazdy, które uzupełnią Twój stock, bo obieg B2B jest rozproszony.

Jak Interstock.pl rozwiązuje Twoje problemy?

•	Szybkość i efektywność: Ułatwiamy profesjonalistom błyskawiczne kupowanie i sprzedawanie pojazdów w skali ogólnopolskiej.
Dzięki modułom takim jak Giełda, Licytacje czy Przedsprzedaż, masz pełną kontrolę nad procesem.

•	Maksymalizacja zysku: Nasz model oparty na stałym abonamencie, bez prowizji od transakcji, sprawia, że pełna marża zostaje w Twojej kieszeni. 

•	Nowe możliwości biznesowe: Otwieramy Ci dostęp do sieci dealerów z całej Polski. To, co u Ciebie zalega, w innym regionie może być cennym towarem. W ten sposób zwiększasz swoje możliwości biznesowe i przyspieszasz rotację aut na stocku.

Interstock.pl to narzędzie od praktyków, które działa dla Ciebie. To nowoczesna technologia oparta na przejrzystych zasadach, które mają jeden cel: pomóc Ci w rozwijaniu Twojego biznesu w najbardziej efektywny sposób.

Dołącz do naszej sieci i przekonaj się, jak handel B2B może być prosty, przewidywalny i zyskowny.

Description:
At Emprevo, we back the people who carry the weight of the frontline workforce - HR leaders, Transformation Directors, Allocators, and Workforce Managers.

They’re the ones taking on the Shift Fulfilment Gap, under pressure to:
‣ Fill every shift
‣ Reduce agency costs
‣ Improve engagement 
‣ Do it all faster, smarter, and with fewer resources

That’s why we built Emprevo.

Our mission:
→ To transform how organisations connect with their workforce by simplifying the process, reducing the effort, and supercharging outcomes, all while driving down cost and complexity.

We believe there should be:
•   Less admin
•   More shifts filled, faster
•  Stronger engagement with internal staff and agency partners
•   Real-time insights, not guesswork

As a global leader in enterprise work marketplace technology, Emprevo gives Australian and New Zealand organisations a single, scalable way to:
•   Connect with every worker - full-time, part-time and casual
•   Engage every agency partner and their available staff in real time
•   Fill every shift - quickly, predictably, and at optimal cost

With everyone connected through one central work marketplace, managers can fill every shift, in every location, with the right skills - today, next fortnight, or months ahead.

We call it Emprevo Intelligence (EI) - giving managers the certainty, simplicity, and performance they need to win today’s war for workers. 

Think Airbnb or Uber, but for work. Just like Airbnb connects travellers to available homes, and Uber connects riders to nearby drivers - Emprevo connects managers to their available workforce and agency partners in real time, so every shift gets filled fast and at the right cost.

Now imagine that same marketplace model running inside your organisation, enabling HR and operations leaders not just to fill shifts but to build stronger, more agile workforce communities.

Scalable: Leveraging AI for asynchronous education, resulting in significant cost reductions compared to traditional methods.

A vantagem deste formato que a Processtec atua para os consumidores é o resultado que essa filtragem traz, porque conseguimos localizar e publicar sempre as melhores ofertas, aquelas que possuem os melhores custo x beneficio, economizando tempo de pesquisa e dando praticidade aos clientes.

Sabemos que nossa base de crescimento está na satisfação dos nossos clientes, por isso o respeito às leis, máxima qualidade e agilidade no atendimento, além de velocidade na entrega, garantem esse crescimento a cada ano. Prova disso, é a Processtec possuir ótimos índices de avaliações dos consumidores, selos de qualidade emitidos por empresas que acompanham o comércio eletrônico no Brasil, como por exemplo o Ebit e a ABComm (Associação Brasileira de Comércio Eletrônico), dentro outros. 

Nossa principal missão é oferecer soluções para pessoas que precisam de tecnologia em seu dia a dia, desde o uso doméstico ao corporativo com total qualidade, confiança e velocidade na entrega!

THE WHY
The vision to have a world that is lovable and sustainable is A JUST CAUSE and we, at Bhogya are ready to work hard to slowly advance towards that world. 

Sustainability does not come with a few cosmetic changes in lifestyle. We believe that these have to be addressed at the grassroots level – meaning that the very thought needs to progress towards a better life and better world. For it is the ‘thought’ that differentiates one human being from another and, with better thoughts a better world can be achieved.

In order for one to have good thoughts, experiences are important. By substituting the contrived for the genuine and at the same time inspiring a potentially deleterious appetite for follow-up visits to the real thing, experiences can be enhanced. 

Bhogya Online is all about providing Experiences that Matter. We bring forth ideas that engage, enrich and elevate to make a positive change.

Platform, kurulduğu ilk günden bugüne, üretici ve kullanıcı nezdinde yaşanılan zorlukları ortadan kaldırma hedefine üzerine faaliyetlerine yön vermektedir. 

Sürdürülebilir tarım ile sağlıklı ve uygun fiyata beslenme arasında köprü görevi üstlenen ÇiftçidenEve, çiftçilerin ürünlerini kullanıcılara doğrudan ulaştırarak üreticinin adil gelir elde etmesini, kullanıcının da doğal, taze ürünlere uygun fiyata ulaşmasına katkıda bulunmaktadır.

Bugüne kadar yurt içi ve yurt dışı kaynaklı çeşitli programlarda yer edinmiş ve Borusan Sürdürülebilir Fayda Programı, Hamdi Ulukaya Girişimi, Village Capital Sustainable MENA Program, PWC Social Impact Lab, EIT Food Turkey ve İş Bankası Tarım Girişimciliği’nden destek görmüştür.

Üreticisini merkezinde tutmaya devam eden platform, deprem, yangın gibi doğal afetlerde yalnız bırakmayarak, sağlamış olduğu gönüllü desteklerle sosyal sorumluluk alanında aktif ve önemli görevler üstlenerek çiftçinin umudu olmuştur.

ÇiftçidenEve, kuruluşunun 10. yılında gelecek hedeflerinin ifadesi olarak marka kimliğini yenileyerek ve ekip yapısını güçlendirerek faaliyetlerini sürdürmeye devam etmektedir.

Name: Pearl Edison
Description:
To achieve net-zero emissions, hundreds of millions of systems that consume natural gas in our homes need to go electric. Whether or not these systems electrify will depend on individual “kitchen table” decisions made by millions of families, weighing comfort and convenience, costs (up front and over time), and climate impact. But making these decisions is difficult. Evaluating what to buy, what’s reasonable to pay, and who to trust to install it involves navigating a ton of bad information and complexity.

Pearl exists to make home electrification easy for customers and profitable for contractors - starting with home heating and cooling.

Pearl is a home electrification “concierge” - our purpose-built software platform allows homeowners to instantly generate a value-engineered system design, get a fixed-price quote, and connect with a vetted, qualified contractor to complete the install.

Pearl also saves contractors time and money. Today, they do lots of work - a home assessment, system design, bid preparation, customer education, and more - at risk, before a contract, on a low win rate. Pearl takes care of this, so that contractors spend more time on revenue-generating installs and less time on sales and back-office.

Our goal is a win-win-win - for customers, for contractors, and for the climate.
