Name: OptiDist.com | Independent & Decentralized B2B FMCG TradeTech Ecosystem
Description:
OptiDist transforms FMCG trade by bridging the gap between disconnected systems and modern business needs.

Traditional B2B marketplaces restrict pricing, trade terms, and supplier autonomy, while legacy ERPs only manage internal processes. They fail to connect stakeholders, automate trade flows, or support cross-border transactions. Businesses remain trapped in rigid, fragmented systems that lack real-time connectivity with buyers, sellers, and financial services.

OptiDist changes this. As an independent, decentralized TradeTech platform, it enables businesses to scale, automate, and trade seamlessly while maintaining full control.

Who Benefits?

- Manufacturers and wholesalers – Optimize pricing, inventory, and global distribution.
- Distributors – Reduce manual work and enhance supply chain transparency.
- Retailers, HoReCa, and corporate buyers – Streamline procurement and cost management.
- Importers and exporters – Simplify cross-border trade and mitigate financial risks.
- Brand owners – Strengthen market influence and product visibility.

Stakeholders: Get Involved

- Sellers – Expand market reach and optimize trade.
- Buyers – Secure better procurement terms and streamline operations.
- Agents – Introduce businesses and earn commissions.
- Local partners – Drive regional expansion.
- Third-party vendors – Monetize logistics, fintech, and compliance services.

Financial Flow

- Sellers and vendors pay a percentage-based commission on successful transactions.
- Buyers use the platform for free.
- Agents and local partners earn revenue share.

Why Join?

- More than a marketplace – A trade enabler that preserves business autonomy and profitability.
- Glocal scalability – Adaptable to any market and business structure.
- Tech-enabled and future-proof – AI-driven automation, ERP connectivity, and embedded fintech solutions.

Join the FMCG digital trade movement today!

Next steps: learn more, partner with us, or introduce OptiDist to the right stakeholders.

Description:
ToRetail is a next-generation Global B2B Trading Platform powered by AI-agents and Agent-to-Agent commerce model.

The challenge

For most small and medium-sized manufacturers — especially in developing countries — international trade remains complex and inaccessible. Language and cultural barriers, limited export experience, technical constraints, and costly intermediaries prevent many from entering global markets. Meanwhile, buyers worldwide seek unique products but face challenges in discovering suppliers, placing cross-border orders, and securing local delivery.

Our solution

ToRetail is redefining how businesses connect and trade globally:
AI-powered digital assistants for every participant — from creating product listings and generating descriptions to searching, negotiating, and closing deals, with seamless support in 100+ languages.

Commission-free B2B model — suppliers keep their margins, buyers access the best direct prices.

Integrated export services ecosystem — a one-stop solution covering all aspects of export/import, giving small companies the same competitive edge as large enterprises.

Our vision

We aim to become the new global leader in the FMCG market by merging international trade best practices with cutting-edge AI technologies. Our mission is simple yet ambitious: to make the global marketplace open, transparent, and accessible to every entrepreneur — regardless of size, geography, or experience.

We welcome cooperation, partnerships, and investment. Currently in the pre-seed fundraising stage, we invite you to connect with us for a presentation and further details.

The future of trade is smart, transparent, and international. With ToRetail, the future begins now!

0% Commission Home Rentals (like Airbnb)

Car Rentals on a weekly or monthly basis

City-to-City and Local Courier Services

Act with Integrity
We prioritise honesty, fairness, and respect in every aspect of our business. Acting with integrity means doing the right thing, even when no one is watching. Empowerment

We would like to inform you about the new online Marketplace Project that we will establish based on the Micro Export business model, in which we will contribute to the export of your brands and products to our neighboring countries. (Iraq,Syria) 

Who are we;
• Our story started in 2018 as Anatolia Express Logistics Services (https://www.anatoliaexpress.com/tr) to provide the best, most convenient and high quality door-to-door logistics service for Iraq and Syria. As of today, Anatolia Express has become the largest transit logistics company in the region.

• Our goal is to be the biggest of our country in micro export with the best e-commerce marketplace and logistics infrastructure where Turkish products and brands are offered to neighboring countries.

• We support the digitalization of our vendors, empower local producers, and advocate for women's participation in the digital economy and production.

• Our aim is to make our country's products and brands accessible to the nearby geography through our strong logistics infrastructure and micro-exports,

Our brand has been registered as “wezzomart” by the Turkish Patent Institute.
The name of our Online Marketplace has been registered as https://www.wezzomart.com/ and will be activated in October-2022.

Our Business Model;
Micro Export business model will be used.
Micro export; It is called an export model that enables export shipments abroad to be made electronically by authorized cargo companies. This export model facilitates the sale of products in small sizes and low weights abroad today.

Omtanke virker bare bedre.

Dialog i et fællesskab med engagerede nysgerrige potentielle kunder skal læres. Vi klæder dig på, så din læring og udbytte bliver højt. Du vil til gengæld opnå kundeindsigt der batter.

Tredje trin er læringen
Det handler om Bang for the buck.

Marketing er dyrt. Og særligt hvis budskaberne ikke virker. Så er det penge ud af vinduet. Sådan er det ikke her. Med Taiwa får du adgang til den bedste læring. Den fra kunderne.

Name: Thyim
Description:
About Us 

At Thyim, we’re here to help fast, fuss-free, and with a bit of fun along the way. Whether you’re stuck on the side of the road, battling a kitchen disaster, or your dog’s decided to dive into the nearest mud puddle…we’ve got you. 

We connect you with Helpers; real people nearby who step in and save the day (or at least your afternoon). No accounts. No quoting. No “please hold.” Just help, in 15 minutes or less. 

The idea for Thyim was sparked by our founder, R.M., after she found herself stranded for four hours on a freezing Michigan highway, waiting for roadside assistance that never arrived. That day, and a conversation years later with a 92-year-old woman who was left waiting so long she had an accident, transformed a frustrating “what if” into reality. Because getting help should be simple, fast, and safe. 

Today, Thyim makes it easy for neighbors to help neighbors with life’s messes, mini-crises, and those “I just need a hand” moments. Because when life throws curveballs, someone should be there to catch them. 

Mission: Everyday people helping everyday people in 15 minutes or less. 

Vision: We imagine a more cohesive world where everyone helps each other, no matter the need. 

Values: 
 Quickness – Help when you need it. 
 Compassion – Real people helping real people. 
 Quality Service – Done right, not just done. 
 Understanding – We get it. Life’s messy (sometimes literally). 
 Safety – Every Helper is background-checked and rated (your mom would approve). 

 Need a hand? Get help in 15 minutes or less, no account needed. Download the app now! www.thyim.com  

* Currently available in Lansing, MI | Saginaw, MI | Detroit, MI | Tulsa, OK | Oklahoma City, OK

Name: Tolery

Tolery est la seule plateforme française de fabrication de pièces industrielles à la demande et créée par des experts du métal, pour simplifier les processus de devis, commande et d'approvisionnement en pièces métalliques de grande qualité et optimisée pour les petites, moyennes et grandes séries.
Plus qu'une plateforme, nos équipes et experts techniques passionnés et engagés vous conseillent et vous accompagnent dans la fabrication de vos pièces sur-mesure de tôle et tube en acier, inox et aluminium, de A à Z.

Notre mission : vous permettre de chiffrer et commander instantanément vos pièces métalliques sur-mesure de grande qualité fabriquées par les meilleures tôleries françaises, proches de chez vous, au meilleur prix et de bénéficier d'experts dédiés pour vous accompagner au quotidien !

Mais Tolery c’est avant tout un projet familial, fort d’un groupe passionné et spécialisé en tolerie fine et industrielle depuis plus de 25 ans, la tôle on connait et on est attaché à nos valeurs :

- Environnement : Nous croyons à l’innovation au service de l’environnement. Avec nos tôleries partenaires, nous sommes engagées dans une démarche RSE, permettant ainsi de maximiser les productions et de réduire le gaspillage de matières avec une politique "zéro déchet". Nous privilégions également les circuits courts pour diminuer l'empreinte carbone.

- Savoir-faire : Nous accordons une grande importance au savoir-faire unique et local de nos tôleries partenaires : le Made in France. C’est ce savoir-faire qui rend exceptionnelle la qualité de production de vos pièces métalliques sur-mesure. Nous sommes fiers de nos tôleries partenaires.

- Service : Notre volonté est de vous offrir la meilleure expérience utilisateur possible pour réaliser vos devis instantanés et passer commandes simplement en ligne. Nous vous accompagnons et conseillons également de A à Z sur l'ensemble de vos projets pour vos pièces sur-mesure.

Name: VENSUQ
Description:
Our vision is to create transparency between both end-users. Chemical Importers in India and Overseas Suppliers.

We've been in the sector for ten years, and the lack of transparency is a bit of a barrier to expanding the network; a traditional process is good, but it's more time-consuming. 

Vensuq's vision is sure to simplify communication with the marketplace, where all registered Indian chemical buyers and overseas suppliers communicate directly on a one-to-one basis on the portal itself.  

The first thing that comes to mind is, "How much will it cost me to use this portal?"

Name: bandit app
Description:
*𝗗𝗶𝘀𝗰𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗻𝘂𝗲𝗱 𝗶𝗻 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟰*

Put simple, bandit was a social marketplace - comparable to TikTok Shop (before it existed) with "buy-together" superpowers (word-of-mouth virality to merchants, group deals to consumers).

---
𝗖𝗢𝗡𝗖𝗘𝗣𝗧

More than 500 quality brands got to showcase their products to thousands of new potential customers and sell B2B-like volumes but D2C (margins). Consumers did the marketing by inviting others to fill up the group deals in within 48h (urgency).

On the other side, consumers could discover new quality products in a TikTok-like feed and have the thrill while rushing to fill up the groups (payments were reserved, if groups were unsuccessful - reverted).

---
𝗦𝗧𝗢𝗥𝗬

Built with a "billion or nothing" mindset by a capable team (serial founders, ex-Revolut, Zalando, Bolt, Meta, Uber, etc.), we raised €1.6M Pre-Seed (#2 largest in Norway!) and launched bandit's B2B2C marketplace. During 4-months beta:

• 60 quality merchants onboarded
• 25,000 users joined (0.5% of pilot market; no paid ads)
• 14,000+ orders placed (€300K GMV)
• Partnered with Carrefour (€85Bn Ann. Rev.) & Zall Group (€16Bn Ann. Rev.)

bandit became the fastest growing marketplace globally to date. Despite being piloted in a small market - Norway (5M people).

---
𝗗𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗦𝗜𝗢𝗡 𝗢𝗙 𝗖𝗟𝗢𝗦𝗨𝗥𝗘

Within 2 months, the founders pitched to 140+ VCs (80+ inbounds from the likes of Accel, General Catalyst and Felix Capital) while runway was burning down and business was being neglected.

The growth slowed down, angels still wanted to start the Seed party but not VCs. It wasn't good enough.

We closed down, took the learnings & moved on.

Hope to see you on the other side,
with  from bandits.

Name: Xchange.Loans
Description:
RECAPITALIZING ASSETS, OPPORTUNITIES AND COMMUNITIES 

Non-performing loan sales have always been a major challenge in the commercial real estate finance (CREF) industry. However, the longer a debt languishes, the more likely a property will become a detriment to its surrounding community. Selling a distressed CRE loan to a qualified investor can mean the difference between neighborhood blight and economic vitality.  Moving distressed debt off your books can also add value to M&A events, particularly for banks being acquired. 

These are just a few of the reasons we built the world’s only secure, open, online marketplace for buying and selling non-performing CRE loans. We believe that accelerated, technology-enabled loan sales offer the greatest benefit to CRE lenders and the communities they serve. The vast majority of CRE loans come from the middle-market [AC4] which deserves an efficient platform for selling non-performing loans at the optimal price to the broad universe of interested buyers. 

We aren’t brokers, and we’re not an auction—we’re YOUR loan sale marketplace.

DESIGNED FOR LENDERS
Xchange.Loans helps lenders maximize the recoverable cash value of their non-performing commercial real estate loans. Most of our loan sale listings go from listed to closed in less than 60 days—for recoverable cash up to 125% to UPB. No seller fees and NO more broker commissions! Lenders can choose our full concierge service - XL Exclusive- or our Do-it-Yourself, subscription-based listing solution- Lender Direct -to access all the benefits of our platform.  Not sure which type of loan sale is right for you??? Try our free automated loan valuation tool XL VALUE.

Our proprietary technology is backed by state-of-the-art data security. We provide certainty of execution through open listings, vetted buyers, custom marketing campaigns, data security, bid optimization and outreach to our network of +60,000 investors.

Hedge funds, venture capital firms, private equity firms, real estate firms and other fund managers have a single technology to service their investors throughout the entirety of the investor relationship. Eleven gets fund managers out of spreadsheets and disparate software, and keeps investors focused in one centralized marketplace to learn about the company, shop offerings, transact and interact with the team. 

Investors have one login to access their world of private investments and transact.

At Eleven, we believe that a more connected industry is a more accessible, scalable, and transformative one. We're not just solving for today’s complexity—we're building for what’s coming tomorrow.

Let’s turn your operations, engagement, and growth up from a perfect 10 to Eleven – and beyond. Get in touch at platformeleven.io to get started today.

بدأت ليسول في عام 2022 كمنصة متخصصة في عرض العقارات عبر الإنترنت، حيث حققنا نجاحًا ملحوظًا في تقديم تجربة رقمية سلسة لبيع، شراء، وتأجير العقارات في مصر. بناءً على هذا النجاح وفي إطار سعينا لتلبية احتياجات مستخدمينا، قمنا في عام 2024 بإضافة قسم السيارات إلى منصتنا. نحن ندرك أن العقارات والسيارات يشكلان جزءًا أساسيًا من حياة الأفراد اليومية، لذلك نعمل على تقديم منصة شاملة تسهل عملية بيع وشراء وتأجير العقارات والسيارات على حد سواء، مما يجعل من ليسول الوجهة المثلى لتحقيق تلك التعاملات بسهولة وشفافية. 

Founded in 2022 in Cairo, Egypt, Lesoll began as a premier online marketplace specializing in real estate, offering a smooth and efficient digital experience for buying, selling, and renting properties. After achieving success in the real estate sector, we have now expanded our platform in 2024 to include cars, recognizing the importance of both real estate and vehicles in people's daily lives. At Lesoll, we are committed to transforming the real estate and automotive markets in Egypt by providing an innovative, user-friendly platform that caters to both property and car transactions.

Name: AGRI-CHAIN CONNECT PROTOCOL
Description:
For too long, the smallholder farmers who feed our world have been left behind, trapped in a cycle of poverty by unfair prices, volatile markets, and a lack of direct market access. This system not only stifles their potential but also creates an unstable and inefficient global food supply chain.

Agri-Chain Connect was founded on a simple, powerful vision: to transform agriculture from a daily struggle for survival into a thriving, predictable, and fair business for every farmer.

What We Do

We are a revolutionary global marketplace that directly connects smallholder farmers with buyers around the world. Our platform empowers farmers to offer their future and ready harvests to a global audience, allowing them to lock in fair prices, secure a stable income, and plan for the future with confidence.

For buyers, we provide unprecedented transparency and reliability. Our platform offers the ability to source high-quality produce directly from the farm, monitor crop progress, and build a resilient and ethical supply chain from the ground up.

Our Impact

By removing the traditional barriers and intermediaries, we are creating a more equitable and efficient agricultural ecosystem. Our work leads to:

Empowered Farmers: Transitioning from price-takers to entrepreneurs with control over their business.

Stabilized Incomes: Providing farming families with the financial predictability they need to invest and grow.

Transparent Supply Chains: Giving buyers and consumers a direct line of sight to the source of their food.

Reduced Waste: Better planning and direct market access significantly cut down post-harvest losses.

We are not just building a platform; we are cultivating a new era for global agriculture.

Join us in fostering a world where every harvest is valued fairly and every farmer has the opportunity to prosper..

Name: TicketPrice.AI
Description:
TicketPrice.AI is an AI-powered pricing intelligence platform built specifically for ticket brokers and marketplaces operating in the secondary live events market.

In today’s ticket resale landscape, brokers face shrinking margins, high inventory risk, and pricing decisions based on limited historical data or gut instinct. Dynamic pricing exists—but it’s largely reactive and built for primary sellers (teams, venues, promoters), not for brokers managing high-volume portfolios in real-time.

We’re solving this gap.

We help brokers answer the hardest question in the secondary market:
“What should I pay or list this ticket for—right now, into the future—and why?”

Our platform analyzes thousands of data points per event, including:

- Real-time factors 
- Sentiment & demand signals 
- Historical price behavior 
- Reseller portfolio size

From this, our AI generates Buy, Hold, or Sell recommendations, along with future price forecasts that allow brokers to optimize inventory and minimize risk.

And we do this with explainable AI—brokers can see why a recommendation was made, not just blindly follow a black-box system.

Furthermore, we actively participate in events with pop-up shops to increase our brand presence. We are proud to be part of the growing movement towards sustainable fashion, and our success is evident through our rapidly growing social media following. In Lithuania, we have amassed 60 thousand Facebook followers and 30.5 thousand Instagram followers, while in Poland, we have gained 35.5 thousand Instagram followers.

Join RENT BOUTIQUE today and become part of the sustainable fashion revolution.

Empower yourself to look good while making a positive difference!

Name: SELLidea - Buy and sell ideas!
Description:
SELLidea est une plateforme internet internationale d’origine française créée en 2021 (numéro SIRET 901 205 112 00013).

Notre vision est de développer et améliorer notre vie quotidienne par les bonnes idées de chacun!

Pour cela, nous mettons en relation ceux qui ont des idées et ceux qui en cherchent:

Toute personne peut gratuitement publier une idée sur SELLidea.biz avec l’objectif de la vendre sans commission
Il peut s’agir d’un concept abouti on non, d’une idée technique ou non, d’une idée brevetée ou non, d’une amélioration, d’une idée qu’on a en tête depuis longtemps sans avoir jamais osé en parler, …

Seules les caractéristiques générales de l’idée sont publiées afin de ne pas dévoiler publiquement la totalité de l’idée.

Toute personne peut consulter et acheter une idée par l’intermédiaire de SELLidea.biz
Cette personne peut être un créateur d’entreprise qui cherche une idée à développer, une entreprise existante qui cherche à se développer, une association qui veut réinsérer des personnes par le travail, un particulier qui cherche une réponse à un besoin, l’Etat ou une collectivité locale qui souhaite faire progresser la sécurité, l’écologie, ou le bien-être des habitants,…

Afin de connaitre tous les détails de l’idée dans le but de l’acheter, cette personne devra régler un droit de 9 € afin d’obtenir les coordonnées du vendeur de l’idée. En privé et sans l’intervention de SELLidea, cet acheteur pourra échanger avec le vendeur et acheter l’idée pour l’appliquer.

Nous proposons aussi un lien vers le site de l’INPI afin d’établir un droit d’antériorité pour son idée via l’enveloppe en ligne e-SOLEAU.

Nous faisons continuellement la promotion des idées à vendre sur nos pages LinkedIn, Facebook, X (Twitter), Instagram, Quora, Pinterest

Name: Anne Ekspres
Description:
Her yeni gün tanımadığımız ve hikayesini dinlediğimiz bebekler ve annelerle tanışmak bizlere heyecan veriyor. Annelerin ihtiyaçlarını dinleyerek onlara yeni ürünler sunmak yepyeni markalarla onları tanıştırmak, aynı zamanda ihtiyacı olan anne ve bebeklere , çocuklara fayda sağlamak fikrinden yola çıkarak kurduğumuz bebekekspres.com 
2017 yılında Ataşehir’de ilk mağazası ile birlikte internet mağazası olarak kuruldu ve kendi hikayesini yazmaya başladı bile. 

Kurucusu bir anne olan anne ekspres mağazamızda kendi bebeklerimiz ve çocuklarımız için kullanmayı tercih etmediğimiz hiçbir ürüne mağazamızda veya internet sitemizde yer vermemekteyiz. Ürün yelpazemizi oluştururken ebeveynlerimizin taleplerine göre ve güvenilir markalar ile tedarikçi ortağı olmaktayız. Türkiye’nin her yerine, yılın her günü her saati hizmet veren sitemiz www.bebekekspres.com ülkemizde yer alan birçok marka ile sizlere binlerce ürün seçeneği sunuyor.  

Online mağazamız https://anneekspres.com/ üzerinde ürünlerin detaylı açıklamaları, fotoğrafları , videoları ile ürünler hakkında detaylı bilgiye sahip olabilirsiniz. Ürünler ile ilgili aklınıza takılan tüm sorular için uzman ekibimizi arayarak bilgi alabilir veya mağazamıza gelerek bebeğinizin ilk alışveriş sepetini birlikte hazırlama fırsatını yakalayabilirsiniz. Bebeğinizin ihtiyaçlarını kredi kartınıza taksitle , kapıda ödeme veya havale seçenekleriyle online mağazamızdan alabilirsiniz. Online mağazamızdan verdiğiniz tüm siparişler 1-4 iş günü içerisinde kargoya verilir ve güvenle adresinize teslim edilir. Aldığınız tüm ürünler %100 orijinal ve garantilidir. 

Sizlere kaliteli , hızlı ve güvenilir alışveriş hizmetini sunmayı prensip edinen ekibimiz sizlerle tanışmayı sabırsızlıkla bekliyor.

Sellers are left with two options: lose up to 20% of their car’s value through dealers, or brave cluttered marketplaces packed with hidden dealerships, lowball offers, and zero transparency.

We’re changing that.

Carabia puts the power back in the hands of people. We’re building smart tools that help sellers get what their car’s really worth — and help buyers find certified cars with plenty of life left in them.

Name: Epibox
Description:
Vos légumes frais et locaux, livrés directement au bureau ! 

 EpiBox, c'est l'innovation au service de l'alimentation saine et locale. Nous sommes une startup dynamique, spécialisée dans la livraison de paniers de légumes frais directement dans les entreprises. Notre mission est de rapprocher les consommateurs urbains des producteurs locaux, en favorisant une alimentation plus saine et un circuit-court.

 Nous collaborons étroitement avec des maraîchers locaux, sélectionnés pour leurs proximités et leurs produits. Chaque semaine, ces partenaires créent des paniers de légumes frais, variés et de saison, que nous livrons directement dans les entreprises. Ce modèle logistique décentralisé nous permet de minimiser les intermédiaires, garantissant une fraîcheur inégalée et un soutien direct à l'économie locale.

 Offrez à vos collaborateurs l'accès à une alimentation saine et pratique, directement sur leur lieu de travail. Nos paniers sont un excellent moyen d'encourager des habitudes alimentaires saines et de soutenir le bien-être des employés.

 50% des producteurs français partant à la retraite dans les dix prochaines années, la nécessité de revitaliser et de rendre attractifs les métiers de maraîcher et de producteur est plus pressante que jamais. EpiBox s'engage dans cette dynamique en offrant une alternative équitable et attrayante aux circuits de distribution traditionnels, séduisant ainsi la nouvelle génération de producteurs.

 Nous sommes engagés envers la durabilité, le soutien aux producteurs locaux et la promotion d'une chaîne d'approvisionnement responsable. Chez EpiBox, nous croyons que de petits changements dans nos habitudes alimentaires peuvent avoir un grand impact sur notre santé et notre planète.

"Liaison locale, alimentation globale : Epibox, votre lien avec l'agriculture saine."

Name: Blockparty
Description:
The bedrock of fan economics is shifting. PoS fees are predicated on a single transaction assumption that hurts artist-fan interaction.

Soon, fans will become accustomed to trading and redeeming tickets for exclusive perks. The age of gamified purchasing environments is here to stay. We are entering an era of equitable consumer rewards underpinned by privacy-focused interoperable data.

Institutional ticket distributors will leverage our innovations to reduce risk, remove bots, and fundamentally evolve business models.

History will reflect on the single transaction assumption as an age of myopia that failed to efficiently monetize fandom. 

We're developing institutional-grade infrastructure that quantifies fandom through consumer environments for more equitable, profitable fan economics. When we talk about UGC and gamification, it is because we sincerely believe in a future of recurring engagement purchasing environments. 

Our mission is to mend artist-fan interactions through a market of quantified fandom, while considerably increasing profits.

FOR BUYERS

FOR SUPPLIERS

- Enhance your brand visibility: Build your brand and establish strong relationships with buyers.

Our Mission: To facilitate a sustainable and efficient global food system by connecting buyers and suppliers and empowering businesses to thrive.

Name: Shyzarsueglobal PLC
Description:
Launched in 2021, Shyzarsueglobal is a thriving platform that champions emerging designers, independent labels, and creative entrepreneurs. More than just a marketplace, it is a vibrant community dedicated to supporting small businesses and giving them a space to flourish. Built By Sellers For Sellers!

Today, Shyzarsueglobal proudly features shops, offering more than 25,000+ products across 100 categories and representing respected independent brands from around the globe. From exclusive designer pieces to rare collectibles, the platform curates a truly diverse selection that caters to discerning customers seeking originality and quality.

What sets Shyzarsueglobal apart is its commitment to empowering sellers. New sellers can showcase and sell their products for the first 2 months without paying fees or commissions, ensuring they keep 100% of their earnings while directly reaching a global audience. After the initial two-month period, the platform transitions to a success-based commission model:
20% commission on a buyer’s first order
This covers the marketplace’s role in driving customer acquisition.
10% commission on repeat orders from the same buyer
This rewards the seller for retaining customers and building brand loyalty.

Key Differentiator:
Unlike standard marketplaces (such as Amazon or Etsy) that apply a flat commission rate to every transaction, this model adjusts fees based on the type of order. Sellers keep more of their revenue once they convert first-time buyers into loyal customers.

Seller Benefits:
Full profit retention in the first two months, creating a strong launch period.
Lower long-term commission rates on repeat sales, increasing profitability over time.
Alignment of incentives: the platform only succeeds when sellers succeed.

Почему профессионалы выбирают MINEPROFF?

Во-первых, мы предоставляем наиболее нужную и важную информацию обо всех важных событиях в отрасли.
Во-вторых, наш портал нацелен не только на информирование, но и на решение наиболее важных задач профессиональной деятельности. С помощью нашего портала возможно:
- получать новые знания по необходимой тематике,  проверять уровень своих знаний и делиться ими с другими профессионалами
- находить необходимую информацию о компаниях сектора: их потребностях, правилах работы, истории, планируемых событиях и т.д.
- предлагать и искать решения для всех, кто работает в горнодобывающей отрасли по всему миру
 
Кто такой "профессионал" и почему важно быть профессионалом?
По версии MINEPROFF, формула профессионализма это умение находить эффективные решения, во-первых, и постоянное развитие, во-вторых.
Соответственно, две главных причины быть настоящим профи:
1) Профессионалов никогда не увольняют. Ни одна компания, ни один руководитель никогда и ни за что не откажется от человека, способного быстро находить и внедрять эффективные решения.
 
2) Профессионалам всегда больше платят и всегда ждут в каждой компании.
 
Краткая история MINEPROFF
Идея портала, который бы смог объединить в себе образовательный, новостной, справочный разделы, доску объявлений и другие, возникла в 2016 году.
В течение трёх лет мы работали над технической частью портала, устанавливали связи с образовательными учреждениями, компаниями отрасли и её профессионалами, чтобы предложить то решение, которое смогло бы решить стоящие перед нами задачу.
 
Миссия MINEPROFF: повысить эффективность горнодобывающей промышленности.
 
Добро пожаловать на MINEPROFF!
MINEPROFF - BE PRO!

Name: Kaffea-X, Inc.
Description:
Kaffea X was created as a solution to the main challenge facing the specialty coffee industry, i.e., commercial and economic fairness; and pricing transparency is at its core.


The specialty coffee industry operates without price discovery mechanisms, often resulting in larger players setting prices that do not reflect the real market dynamics, mostly to the disadvantage of the smaller players, including the farmers of all sizes. The industry also lacks a universal product identification taxonomy for easy classification and comparison of the hundreds of varieties of specialty coffee and their origins. 

In a market where information is asymmetric and where visibility is limited to an already volatile ‘C’ basis, any attempt to address economic and trade fairness will always be a temporary fix such as the expensive and complex individual Fair-Trade Certification. One of the many costs of lack of transparency is bureaucracy that yields questionable and short-lived results.

We will provide clear, real-time bid and offer pricing insights as well as related market and risk data, to level the playing field and allow all who wish to transparently buy and sell spot specialty coffee to be a part of this future.

Who we serve: 

- Residential interior designers & home stagers seeking unique, story-rich, verified pieces

What makes us different:

- Living-creator-first curation (not mass listings)

- Japan-based sourcing and coordination from Hokkaido (Sapporo)

We believe art and culture connect hearts and minds—and that the most meaningful collections begin when we choose to support living creators and the traditions they carry forward.

Our collection of 600,000 rubies and sapphires from Greenland's permanently closed historic mine, a finite supply with 3.8 billion years of geological provenance. Unlike traditional collectibles, each stone offers complete blockchain transparency, professional storage, and instant global liquidity.

Our ESG & Impact
- Direct partnerships with Greenland communities ensuring fair economic benefit
- Transparent supply chain from mine to vault with zero intermediaries
- Environmental stewardship through closed-loop mining practices
- Full blockchain traceability supporting sustainability reporting requirements
- Third-party ESG compliance documentation available

Each investment is backed by physical assets stored in institutional-grade Bangkok vault facilities with comprehensive insurance coverage. Our partnership with NBX provides regulated trading infrastructure with institutional custody standards. Blockchain ownership records eliminate authentication risk and provide immutable provenance documentation.

The digital certificates enable fractional exposure opportunities and global liquidity previously unavailable in luxury collectibles markets.

Through our NBX partnership, we offer qualified investor access, professional-grade security protocols, and regulatory compliance frameworks. Investors can maintain digital ownership or redeem the physical Gemstones.

This is a sustainable wealth preservation solution, with measurable community impact and geological authenticity. 

From Bedrock to Blockchain.

Unique Feature: The platform introduces the ability for founders to create additional sub-projects, known as child and grandchild projects, under a main parent project. Description:
Na Ritualiza, unimos ciência cosmética, tecnologia e sustentabilidade para desenvolver soluções inovadoras em personalização de cosméticos. 

Plataforma de Personalização de Skincare
Desenvolvimento da primeira plataforma brasileira de personalização de skincare, que formula produtos a partir das características e preferências individuais dos clientes. O projeto evoluiu de MVP em incubação para uma solução proprietária, integrando ciência cosmética, automação de recomendações de ativos e feedbacks de uso, com foco em consumo sustentável.

Desvenda App – Tudo sobre Cosméticos
Inovação em consumo sustentável criação do aplicativo que lê rótulos de cosméticos e traduz as informações para o consumidor final, conectando ciência, transparência e sustentabilidade para incentivar escolhas de consumo mais conscientes. Além de validação científica e de mercado – condução de proofs of concept (PoCs) para testar a viabilidade de soluções digitais e biotecnológicas, tanto em termos técnicos (IA, automação laboratorial, modelagem de dados) quanto de aceitação de mercado (pesquisa e interação com consumidores voluntários e análise setorial).

Projeto Tecnova III – Microbiota da Pele Pesquisa inédita no Brasil financiada pelo Tecnova III (FAPESC/FINEP), com o objetivo de personalizar cosméticos a partir da análise do microbioma cutâneo. O projeto prevê a coleta e sequenciamento da microbiota, criação de banco de dados de ativos naturais e uso de inteligência de dados para desenvolver formulações personalizadas, com potencial de patente e escalabilidade internacional.

Name: PUMP'SKIN
Description:
Pump'Skin est la 1ère gamme de cosmétiques bio au potimarron créée par deux spécialistes de la santé et de l'agriculture bio. Face aux défis des pollutions environnementales, le Dr. Eraud et Philippe Desbrosses ont créé la gamme Pump'Skin : sa haute concentration en extraits actifs booste les défenses naturelles de la peau, lui conférant jeunesse et énergie. Le potimarron utilisé dans la formulation Pump'Skin est unique : la variété a été sélectionnée par Philippe Desbrosses à la Ferme-Conservatoire Sainte Marthe Sologne.
En créant Pump'Skin, le Dr. Eraud souhaite sensibiliser les consommateurs sur l’importance d'utiliser du bio et des composants efficaces pour la santé de la peau ! Après plusieurs études et un appui scientifique de haut niveau qui confirme et révèle les exceptionnelles vertus cosmétiques du potimarron, le Dr. Eraud multiplie les tests concluants.
Le potimarron d'Hokkaïdo a été importé en France par George Oshawa, fondateur de la macrobiotique dans les années 50/60. Le potiron doux d'Hokkaïdo qu'on retrouve dans la gamme Pump'Skin est cultivé en France, à la Ferme-Conservatoire Sainte Marthe Sologne.

Name: YallaFid
Description:
Application pour smartphone disponible sur plusieurs plateformes créée par une startup Africaine 
L'application comporte énormément de services pour simplifier la digitalisation de processus de vente.
Accès principalement sur les programmes de fidélités cette application a pour but d'apporter un réel soutien pour les enseignes de taille moyenne ou petites tailles afin de les rendre visibles sur la Toile.
Pour vous expliquer les motivations du projet on se doit d’analyse le contexte du marché actuel.
Tout commence par les programmes de fidélités existants chez les enseignes les plus prestigieuses en Tunisie. Ce sont des programmes qui récompensent le client pour ses achats, qu’il soit reconnu et gagne ainsi des cadeaux des remises ou des services.
Ce système est souvent limité à quelques entreprises de grande taille, qui sont capables d’investir dans des programmes de fidélité et qui peuvent se procurer des compétences pour gérer les plateformes informatiques.
Les petites entreprises Tunisiennes éprouvent des difficultés pour valoriser leurs clients et préserver ainsi leurs parts du marché.
ce qui représente environ 78% du faisceau économique Tunisien? 
Quel avenir pour ces entreprises dans un monde digital ?
Pour gagner en visibilité sur la toile certaines entreprises se sont inscrites dans une démarche digitale imposant des budgets colossaux en devise comme les réseaux sociaux ou des plateformes de vente en ligne 100% étrangères et qui imposent des frais de gestion allant de 12% à 15% du CA réalisé, éventuellement ces hausses se répercutent directement sur le consommateur final.
On constate actuellement une forte dépendance à quelques places de marché connues par les consommateurs mais qui imposent des contraintes assez difficiles et des sacrifices budgétaires.
Combinant ces deux problématique le rêve YALL FID a vu le jour.
L’application accessible à tous quelques soit le niveau de maitrise des outils informatiques.

The loss for publishers is estimated to be, in the best case, near 16 billions of dollars for 2020.

Name: Second Degree
Description:
Second Degree is an AI-powered P2P Recruiting Platform that helps companies find and hire talent faster than traditional recruiting anywhere in the US & Latam.

Here's a quick overview of how our platform operates: 
1. Companies post their open positions on our platform as Job Profiles, so they get access to our Network of Professional Recruiters (users).
2. Our users share those Job profiles with their network, and those candidates decide if they want to apply or not. Since our users are all over US, Canada, and Latam, we can generate a pipeline of candidates throughout all those areas. 
3. We do an internal pre-vet to ensure companies only receive qualified candidates. 
4. Companies run their own interview process and decide whether they want to hire the candidate or not. 
5. If they decide to hire, they are charged a hiring fee. No upfront payment & No exclusivity. We share 70% of that fee with the recruiter that made the connection. 

Companies & the Perfect Candidates are always at a Second Degree, no matter how far away they are from each other.

Our mission is simple but powerful:
to democratize access to genuine African products while empowering local producers and communities.

Unlike generic marketplaces, BaobabMart focuses on traceability, quality, and cultural context. Every product we list is carefully selected, verified, and sourced with intention—so customers know exactly what they are buying, where it comes from, and why it matters.

What Makes BaobabMart Different

• Authentic African sourcing – no mass-produced replicas
• Natural & organic focus – food, wellness, and beauty you can trust
• Handcrafted excellence – real artisans, real stories
• Africa-based operations – sourcing at the origin, not the surface
• Global delivery – serving customers in the US, UK, Europe, Canada, and beyond

We serve both individual buyers seeking genuine African products and bulk buyers, retailers, and businesses looking for reliable African sourcing partners. Whether you are purchasing for personal use, resale, manufacturing, or cultural appreciation, BaobabMart is built to support you with consistency and transparency.

More Than a Marketplace

BaobabMart is also an educational and cultural platform. Through our content, product storytelling, and community engagement, we highlight the history, use, and cultural significance behind African products—bridging the gap between tradition and modern global commerce.

We believe Africa should be known not only for its resources, but for it

Description:
La nostra società nasce con l’obiettivo di realizzare una linea di integratori alimentari che permetta di sfruttare l’esperienza e le competenze scientifiche delle promotrici e si caratterizzi per un approccio olistico alla salute ed una vocazione ecologica.
Partendo dalla produzione iniziale di integratori alimentari, grazie alla collaborazione di nutrizionisti di funzione vengono sviluppati protocolli di integrazione alimentare, che integrano diversi prodotti e/o dosaggi, in grado di trattare sia soggetti che utilizzano gli integratori per benessere o per potenziamento sportivo sia soggetti con determinate patologie (es. diabetici), protocolli differenti, per diverse esigenze e caratteristiche: minori, adulti (maschio e femmine), anziani e sportivi. 
Tali protocolli possono essere affiancati a sessioni di consulenza nutrizionale o psicologica organizzate dall'azienda che propone professionisti di provata esperienza e competenza nelle diverse branche dell’integrazione, nella psicologia alimentare e altri campi medici.
La produzione ha uno spiccato orientamento alla salvaguardia ambientale, sia per quanto riguarda il packaging (completamente riciclabile), sia per il sistema logistico che, prevedendo la spedizione direttamente dal fornitore, permette di saltare un passaggio nella catena logistica con un evidente risparmio energetico.

Name: Agroasys
Description:
Agroasys is an agri-trade marketplace platform designed to modernize how agricultural commodities move. By connecting suppliers, buyers, and logistics providers through a secure digital ecosystem, Agroasys replaces fragmented, paper-based processes with a single platform for sourcing, contracting, and settlement. At its core are legally enforceable Ricardian contracts that capture both the human-readable and machine-readable terms of a deal, enabling instant verification, traceability, and automated compliance. Integrated payment rails built on blockchain technology deliver faster, low-cost settlements, while advanced data pipelines provide real-time visibility of inventory, pricing, and delivery status. This combination ensures trust, transparency, and efficiency at every stage of the trade cycle.

For suppliers, Agroasys opens access to larger markets, secure payments, and verified demand for fortified and biofortified crops. For buyers, it guarantees quality, provenance, and regulatory compliance. While for logistics partners, it simplifies coordination and documentation. Backed by partnerships with globally recognized organizations and guided by a team experienced in agriculture, technology, and trade, Agroasys is positioned to create a scalable, resilient, and inclusive agri-trade infrastructure across the world.

Name: Shankar Digital
Description:
Welcome to Digital Marketing Pro: Share your Thoughts & Ideas Group. 

Digital marketing refers to the practice of promoting products, services, or brands using various online channels and digital technologies. With the advent of the internet and the increasing reliance on digital platforms, businesses have recognized the need to establish a strong online presence and engage with their target audience through digital marketing strategies.

One of the key advantages of digital marketing is its ability to reach a global audience. Unlike traditional marketing methods that are limited by geographical boundaries, digital marketing allows businesses to connect with potential customers around the world. Through channels such as search engines, social media platforms, email marketing, and websites, companies can showcase their offerings to a wide range of consumers, irrespective of their location.

Search engine optimization (SEO) plays a crucial role in digital marketing. It involves optimizing websites and content to improve their visibility in search engine results. By incorporating relevant keywords, creating high-quality content, and enhancing the user experience, businesses can increase their organic search rankings and attract more targeted traffic to their websites.

Social media marketing is another integral component of digital marketing. Platforms like Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn, and YouTube provide businesses with opportunities to engage with their audience, build brand awareness, and drive traffic to their websites. Through targeted advertising, content creation, and community management, companies can effectively communicate their message and establish meaningful connections with their customers.
#digitalmarketing #digitalmarketinggroup #digitalmarketingpro

A terme, tu pourras :

	-  Découvrir plein d'activités proches de chez toi

Our mission is clear: to reduce the gap between skilled IT professionals and rewarding employment opportunities, thereby fostering growth and innovation in Nigeria's IT industry.

At its core, Apex Technologies serves as a comprehensive matchmaking service, connecting companies of all sizes with IT professionals seeking temporary contract opportunities. Whether it's a short-term project or a long-term engagement, our platform streamlines the process of finding the right talent precisely when it's needed. Through advanced algorithms and personalized matchmaking, we ensure optimal matches based on skills, experience, and project requirements.

What sets Apex Technologies apart is our commitment to quality networking. We understand that successful partnerships are built on trust, reliability, and compatibility. That's why we prioritize the human element in our matchmaking process, considering factors such as company culture and objectives to facilitate mutually beneficial collaborations. Additionally, Apex Technologies serves as a knowledge hub, offering resources and support to both companies and IT professionals, empowering them to thrive in an ever-evolving tech landscape.

Apex Technologies caters to a diverse array of stakeholders within Nigeria's IT ecosystem. We serve as a strategic partner for large corporations seeking specialized expertise on a temporary basis, as well as small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) looking to access skilled professionals without the overhead costs of traditional hiring. Simultaneously, Apex Technologies empowers IT professionals of all backgrounds – from seasoned veterans to aspiring newcomers – by offering a platform to showcase their talents and explore exciting opportunities.

Name: Shipeq
Description:
A unique B2B marketplace for buying and selling used, reconditioned, surplus and obsolete marine and offshore equipment, machinery and spare parts sourced from recycled ships and offshore vessels. Shipeq connects ship recycling yards, verified sellers and traders with ship owners, ship managers and verified end users in need of critical, hard-to-find and obsolete parts. These spare parts may be considered SCRAP by some, but for others they are GOLD, critical and valuable that keep propellers turning.

The purpose of Shipeq is to increase the visibility and sale potential of marine and offshore equipment, machinery and spare parts originating from ship recycling yards in Turkey, India, Bangladesh, Pakistan and other countries.

Only verified companies are allowed to list and sell products on Shipeq. All sellers are subject to a strict verification process: Sellers must provide official registration documents and certifications approved by the relevant authorities in their country of registration and physical office visits are conducted to confirm their existence and operations.

Inventory listings are updated every two weeks, ensuring buyers always have access to the most accurate and up-to-date listings.

Ship owners operating older fleets often struggle to source older model marine equipment, machinery and obsolote spare parts that are critical for keeping their vessels in operation. Procuring older model marine equipment or obsolete spare parts from OEMs or licensed manufacturers is expensive and subject to long lead times, resulting in costly operational delays or even forcing vessels into lay-up. Shipeq provides a reliable alternative source for procuring obsolete and hard-to-find spare parts at fair prices and with shorter lead times.

Name: Shop Kart
Description:
Shopkart: Revolutionizing E-commerce for Buyers & Sellers 

Welcome to Shopkart, where we're on a mission to tackle an often-overlooked problem in the world of online shopping. We understand the challenges faced by sellers who encounter high commission percentages imposed by e-commerce platforms, while simultaneously striving to offer competitive and affordable prices to buyers (customers).

The landscape has shifted, with customers transitioning from local stores to the convenience of online shopping. Their primary focus is finding the best affordable goods to maximize their savings. However, sellers find themselves grappling with unrealistic platform commissions, leaving them with meager profits.

At Shopkart, we're changing the game. We're building a platform that prioritizes affordability for customers while maximizing sellers' profits by slashing excessive platform margins. We believe that fair and transparent pricing benefits everyone involved.

But that's not all. We go above and beyond by taking care of logistics, ensuring a seamless experience from order placement to delivery. Our goal is to provide a comprehensive solution that empowers both sellers and customers in the ever-evolving e-commerce landscape.

Now, you may be wondering, how do we sustain our operations? We operate on a small and reasonable commission percentage from sellers, ensuring a win-win situation for all parties involved. Additionally, our in-house product offerings further contribute to our revenue streams.

Join us on this exciting journey as we reshape the e-commerce industry. Together, we can create a fair and thriving marketplace that benefits everyone. Visit our website today to discover the Shopkart difference.

#Shopkart #EcommerceRevolution #FairAndAffordable

Name: Categorize by Gálata
Description:
O principal objetivo da ferramenta é levar o cliente o mais rápido possível para o whatsapp para não perder seu contato. Por esse motivo não pedimos dados do cliente, endereço, pagamento, estoque, frete, pois se o mesmo fechar o navegador antes, o contato será perdido e nem saberá disso.

A ferramenta é um facilitador para compartilhar com apenas um link todos seus produtos e serviços para não precisar enviar PDF e um monte de fotos. Padroniza e agiliza o recebimento de pedidos com a descrição e quantidades corretas. Cadastro de vendedores, representantes ou revendedores para receberem seus pedidos direto no whatsapp deles sem precisar criar novas contas, ou seja, um catálogo pode ter vários números vinculados.
 
O cadastro de produtos é ilimitado e o que muda nos planos é a quantidade de itens que será exibido no catálogo. Se estiver usando o plano FREE, por exemplo, pode ter 50 produtos cadastrados, mas somente 10 serão exibidos. Ao contratar qualquer plano o número de itens que poderão ser exibidos vai aumentando, assim como de vendedores inclusos sem custo adicional.

Pode contratar e cancelar os planos a qualquer momento sem fidelidade ou carência. O plano FREE é completo com todos os recursos disponíveis das versões pagas.

Welcome to VERSTX, Pakistan's pioneering Medical Ecommerce Marketplace dedicated exclusively to the medical sector. Our platform is designed to bridge the gap between medical sellers, brands, and buyers, offering a unique online space where local and imported, new and used medical equipment can be easily bought and sold. At VERSTX, we understand the challenges faced by sellers in reaching their audience, especially when limited to platforms like WhatsApp. That's why we have created a solution that allows you to set up your online store, display your products, and manage sales with ease.

Our Story and Mission

VERSTX was born out of a vision to revolutionize how medical equipment is bought and sold in Pakistan. We noticed a significant gap in the market, where sellers had no dedicated platform to showcase their products effectively. Our mission is simple: to make medical equipment, whether new or used, easily accessible to all. We aim to empower sellers by providing them with a transparent, user-friendly platform that not only promotes their products but also supports them in every step of the sales process.

A Vision for Tomorrow

As the first dedicated medical marketplace in Pakistan, VERSTX is setting new standards for the industry. Our mission is to make medical equipment accessible to all, and we’re constantly evolving to meet the needs of our sellers and buyers. Soon, we’ll introduce flexible installment plans, ensuring that every healthcare provider can access the equipment they need, when they need it.

Join the VERSTX Revolution

VERSTX isn’t just a marketplace; it’s a revolution in how medical equipment is bought and sold. Join us, and be part of a community that values transparency, innovation, and growth. Together, we can transform the medical industry in Pakistan and beyond.

Name: Famooshed
Description:
Famooshed is an online virtual farmers market that is partnering with local independent food producers, farmers, dairies, growers, distillers, brewers, fishermen, bakers, butchers and allotment gardeners to provide a platform to sell their produce directly to the local community. 

Our platform connects food producers to customers within their communities and beyond using our geo-location search feature. Our mission is to support local British farmers and businesses by empowering customers to shop locally grown, sustainable produce sourced directly from field to fork. Having spoken with lots of independent business owners, we understand that a lot of small businesses are finding it difficult to gain traction selling online and creating their digital presence.
 
We've responded to this problem by creating a comprehensive platform designed to help merchants effortlessly sell directly to their customers. On Famooshed, merchants can create their own market stall, upload their products, and manage their orders using our intuitive merchant portal and mobile

Our online marketplace enables local shoppers to search for products by their geolocation on the mobile app that will display local merchants by food type, enabling you to order online directly from their online store. 

Supermarkets provide our communities with produce sourced from worldwide vendors, so Famooshed is looking to partner with British food suppliers to provide fresh and quality produce to shoppers within hours of it being produced, picked and packed.

We aim to support our local merchants with a portal that enables them to sell and market their produce directly to their community within a selected distance from store by offering either their own delivery drivers or utilising our network of independent delivery boys.

Our merchant partners and delivery boys can sign up to our platform and utilise the power of our marketplace to start selling their produce and delivering directly to our shopper’s table.

Name: CardTrader
Description:
CardTrader Zero is the first global marketplace for collectible cards with a centralized logistics model designed to make buying and selling easier, faster, and smarter — for everyone.

For sellers, it means no more packing dozens of individual orders or dealing with scattered shipping requests. With CardTrader Zero, you simply ship one consolidated package per week to our central hub. From there, we handle the rest: sorting, repackaging, and delivering your cards to customers around the world. You focus on selling — we take care of the logistics.

For buyers, it means no more paying multiple shipping fees or waiting for cards from different sellers to arrive at different times. With CardTrader Zero, you can shop from hundreds of sellers worldwide and receive everything in one simple delivery. One payment, one tracking code, one clean experience.

We’ve removed the friction that’s traditionally been part of trading cards online — the hassle of chasing down orders, dealing with inconsistent packaging, or calculating multiple shipping costs. Whether you're a collector, a competitive player, or a store looking to move inventory, CardTrader Zero gives you a streamlined, professional solution.

It’s not just a marketplace — it’s a network. A system built to scale with your passion, powered by technology, and designed for a global community that loves cards as much as we do.

CardTrader Zero: one shipment, one global marketplace, zero complications.

Name: Auktionshuset DAB
Description:
Auktionshuset dab er et 100% online auktionshus med domicil i Hasselager, syd for Aarhus.

Vores online auktionsplatform er en af de førende i Danmark med fokus på konkurs- og overskudsauktioner i alle brancher. Med afdelinger i Nord- og Sønderjylland samt på Sjælland kan vi dække hele landet med spændende auktioner.
Det hele startede i 1970 som Dansk Automobil Børs med auktioner over biler, landbrugsmaskiner og konkurser under ét tag. Det blev siden delt op, og deraf kom Auktionshuset dab.
I dag huser Auktionshuset 15 medarbejdere, som varetager vurderinger, markedsføring, kundeservice, salg og lagerhåndtering.


Hvad tror vi på... 
Vi er et auktionshus, som hele tiden flytter sig i forhold til teknologiens udvikling og kundernes behov. Et stort kundefokus er derfor også noget, der ligger vores hjerter meget nært, og vi stræber hele tiden efter løsninger, der er skræddersyet til den enkelte kunde eller samarbejdspartner.

Menneskerne bag Auktionshuset har indgående viden om auktionsbranchen, og vi er dermed i stand til at håndtere hele salgsprocessen fra start til slut topprofessionelt.

Pakkeløsninger eller faste, firkantede aftaler ligger ikke i vores dna. Fra det øjeblik vi har kontakt med dig, udformer vi sammen den løsning, der passer allerbedst til lige præcis din situation.
Vi kan varetage hele processen fra, at varerne bliver vurderet, til markedsføring og oprydning af udleveringsstedet. Det er dig, der bestemmer, hvor meget eller hvor lidt, vi skal involveres i dit salg, og hvis du foretrækker, at vi kommer og afhenter alle varerne og sælger dem fra vores adresse i Hasselager, Broager eller Sorø, står vi gerne til rådighed.

Hos os er alle specialister inden for hvert sit område. Med teamwork sikrer vi at effektivisere og udvikle nye processer, så vi er på forkant med branchens udvikling, og kan tilbyde kunder og samarbejdspartnere konkurrencedygtige løsninger.

Die Grundlage unseres Erfolgs bilden jedoch nicht nur unsere Technologien, sondern die engagierten Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter unseres Teams. Mit ihrem Know-How, ihren Ideen und ihrer Motivation bringen sie sich täglich aktiv in das AERA-Geschehen ein, das von Teamgeist und gegenseitiger Wertschätzung geprägt ist. Kreativität und Spaß an der Arbeit stehen bei AERA ganz weit oben; dabei verlieren wir aber das Ziel der größtmöglichen Perfektion unserer Anwendungen nicht aus den Augen. Obwohl wir stark wachsen, haben wir den besonderen Start-Up Charakter nicht verloren. 

Wir bilden Talente aus, übertragen Verantwortung und fördern unsere Mitarbeiter, wo immer möglich. Auf unserem Campus im Großraum Stuttgart/Ludwigsburg leben wir flache Hierarchien und eine offene Kommunikation. 
Als unabhängiges, inhabergeführtes IT-Unternehmen agieren wir selbstständig, ohne Fremdmittel und kennen den Markt und die Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden genau.

Name: Filmo
Description:
Filmo is a global live shopping and social commerce platform for fashion, beauty and luxury vintage brands. It operates across North America, Europe, Asia, Australia and the Middle East, connecting Meta and e-commerce into a single, commerce-grade system designed to convert video into revenue.

Filmo was built around a consistent gap in the market: brands were already producing livestreams, try-ons and styling content across Instagram, Facebook and their own sites, yet conversion remained manual and fragmented. Most solutions either made one channel shoppable and left the rest as content, or created a second store with disconnected inventory, reporting and operations. The result was predictable: buyer friction, weak attribution and an internal workload that scaled faster than sales.

Filmo solves this by adding a live-shopping layer on top of social and the existing store. From one environment, teams can plan shows, run live operations and drive checkout. Meta lives and replays become shoppable from the first “shop” comment through to order, while a single e-commerce backend keeps products, orders and inventory aligned across social, the brand site and the Filmo marketplace.

Our focus is straightforward: help brands turn live and replay video into a measurable, repeatable revenue channel, with the same level of control, attribution and reliability expected from the online store and paid media.

Filmo is female-founded and built by operators with deep experience across marketplaces, product and growth, supporting live commerce teams across North America, Europe, Asia, Australia and the Middle East.

Download Filmo: https://linktr.ee/filmo.app

At the moment, our primary focus is on eCommerce-related affiliate marketing, connecting Amazon, Shopify, and eBay sellers with a vast audience of potential buyers. However, our vision doesn’t stop there. With plans to expand beyond eCommerce, AffilX aims to become the go-to platform for everything affiliate—hence the name Affil'X, representing the unlimited possibilities our platform offers.

At AffilX, we use advanced AI technology to automatically select and promote products across our network of sites, giving sellers unparalleled visibility and reach. L’idea di Sidro & Cider viene a due giovani laureandi, Cesare Giovanetti e Cesare Marescotti. Amanti del buon cibo, della buona cucina e degli aperitivi, durante i loro “viaggi del gusto” si sono resi conto che in Italia manca completamente la cultura del sidro. Da qui, con passione e determinazione, dopo attente analisi del mercato e del prodotto, hanno deciso che era ora di colmare questa lacuna.

Creano una startup, Italianorchards srls, per importare e distribuire il sidro in tutta Italia e nel frattempo fondano il marchio Sidro & Cider. Non un semplice e-commerce per la vendita di sidro in Italia, ma un nome sotto cui fare cultura: sul web con un sito, e sul territorio con eventi, fiere e molte altre iniziative.

Scrapiy (Scrap-it-Yourself) is a platform that provides education and tools to repurpose and upcycle products.

We are enhancing the Circular Economy by extending the life cycle of products that would otherwise be discarded. Through Upcycling and Repurposing, we provide the opportunity to extend the life cycle of products, reduce the use of resources and open new product channels while strengthening brand equity and community relationships. 

The Circular Economy requires that the established mindset of brands and the consumer be changed. This can only be achieved by new ideas designed to extend the life of a product. Our Collaborating Creators instruct on upcycling. Our Partner Brands promote the need and ability to attain this goal. Our Affiliated Businesses implement projects that the do-it-yourself community can’t manage. Scrapiy’s evolving journey across multiple industries is achieved by inspiring prosumers to innovate – building the Creators Economy for Upcycling.

Name: Malakyt
Description:
Malakyt is a web-based platform that connects independent service providers in the beauty and fashion industries with customers online. As a curated digital marketplace, Malakyt.com empowers skilled individuals to showcase their talents and build a visible, engaging portfolio that attracts new clients.

The platform presents all the essential information a customer needs to confidently choose a service provider, packaged in a visually striking yet easy-to-navigate format. By combining affordable access with smart digital marketing features inspired by social media, Malakyt has positioned itself as one of Africa’s premier platforms for beauty and fashion services.

The name Malakyt is inspired by malachite, a radiant green mineral found throughout Africa and beyond. Known as the “Stone of Transformation”, malachite symbolizes the positive change Malakyt aims to spark within the South African and broader African economy.

Historically, malachite’s vibrant pigment was treasured by ancient African civilisations, most notably the Egyptian Queen Cleopatra, who famously used it as eye shadow to protect her eyes from the desert sun. Rooted in such rich heritage and symbolism, Malakyt represents more than just a tech solution, it’s a transformational journey driven by African excellence, creativity, and legacy.

Name: Partsfy
Description:
Somos a Partsfy, uma força motriz no universo automotivo, dedicados a simplificar e revolucionar a jornada de aquisição de peças. Com uma plataforma de orçamentação e compra inovadora, reunimos uma ampla gama de fornecedores, garantindo opções diversificadas para nossos clientes. Mais do que uma simples plataforma, trabalhamos incansavelmente para elevar a rentabilidade das compras.

Nossa abordagem é baseada na utilização de tecnologia de ponta, otimizando o fornecimento de peças nas oficinas e evitando os erros e atrasos frequentes nas compras tradicionais. 

Acreditamos firmemente que muitos dos desafios cotidianos nas compras podem ser evitados. Queremos erradicar atrasos nas entregas e os problemas na localização de peças, garantindo que a aquisição de peças não seja mais um gargalo que prejudique a produtividade das oficinas.

Somos movidos pela praticidade, transparência, facilidade, simplificação e eficiência. Mensalmente, entregamos mais de 35 mil peças e viabilizamos transações que totalizam mais de R$4 milhões dentro da plataforma. Com quase 1000 distribuidores ativos e mais de 500 oficinas lucrativas cadastradas, estamos transformando a maneira como o mercado de autopeças opera.

Nosso propósito é claro: oferecer facilidade e eficiência em cada transação, desbravando a complexidade do mercado de autopeças. Somos o parceiro que guia, facilita e celebra cada conquista na jornada automotiva, proporcionando clareza em um cenário muitas vezes desafiador.

Seja parte da revolução automotiva com a Partsfy. Junte-se a nós e simplifique sua jornada de aquisição de peças hoje mesmo.

Name: Apollinaire - le magasin français
Description:
Nous sommes Caroline et Virginie, deux entrepreneures pleines d’enthousiasme qui avons à cœur de rendre la mode fabriquée en France visible et désirable !

Convaincues de l’importance de s’habiller de fabrication française depuis quelques années, nous nous sommes rendues compte qu’il n’existait pas un lieu sur le web où trouver une offre complète et stylée de mode fabriquée en France.
Et pourtant, la France regorge de marques de fabrication française, créatives, de qualité́ et stylées qui méritent tant d’être vues et reconnues !

Apollinaire, le magasin français, est une place de marché de vêtements et accessoires pour Femmes, Hommes et Enfants uniquement dessinés et fabriqués en France.
Mais c’est aussi des propositions de style, des coups de cœur, des envies, mais toujours de la fabrication française et des marques époustouflantes aux histoires incroyables !   


Notre ambition : Réunir les plus belles marques de fabrication française avec du style et de la qualité afin de pouvoir offrir aux consommateurs la possibilité de s’habiller de fabrication française, sans sacrifier leur allure et toujours dans la joie et la bonne humeur, malgré des convictions sérieuses !

Notre devise : Tout seul, je vais vite, ensemble on va loin !

Apollinaire, le magasin français est né... bienvenue dans l’aventure !

Name: Poleasingowe.pl sp. z o. o.
Description:
Poleasingowe.pl to internetowy serwis, który specjalizuje się w obsłudze sprzedaży sprzętu poleasingowego, powindykacyjnego oraz pojazdów poflotowych. Naszym głównym celem jest ułatwienie korzystnego zakupu używanych pojazdów, maszyn oraz urządzeń. Dajemy im drugie życie, a naszym klientom oferujemy pierwszorzędną okazję do nabycia dobrej jakości sprzętu w doskonałej jakości i cenie. 

Działamy na polskim rynku od blisko 15 lat, od 2009 roku. Poleasingowe.pl to miejsce, w którym zgromadziliśmy ponad 35 tysięcy aktywnych oferentów, a co więcej, organizujemy ponad 70 tysięcy aukcji rocznie. Nasz portal odwiedzany jest ponad 3 miliony razy miesięcznie. 

W Poleasingowe.pl kładziemy nacisk na nowoczesne rozwiązania informatyczne, które gwarantują pełne bezpieczeństwo. Jest to niezbędne w sytuacji, gdy ruch na platformie aukcyjnej przypomina ruch na najbardziej popularnych autostradach.

Proces sprzedaży odbywa się w systemie aukcyjnym. Aby brać udział w licytacji, wystarczy się zarejestrować. Kupujący widzą propozycje cenowe innych oferentów, co ułatwia precyzyjne ustalanie maksymalnej kwoty do zapłacenia za daną rzecz.

Name: ROGO
Description:
Rogo is an app that helps you rent on the go. 

ROGO allows you to post your own items as rentals so others can rent from you! It is a peer marketplace that connects rental vendors & renters to one another for a simple and fun rental experience. 

What is ROGO? An app that helps you rent for your event, no more buying things you only need for a day - rent instead! 

How does it work? We operate by two terms, vendor & renter. A vendor is the owner of items posted, a renter is the one who rents them out! 

Who can be a vendor? Anyone with event items! We created this platform so that your event items in the garage can create a string of income for you. Alternatively, if you are a rental shop you can also use the platform to maximize your inventory. 

Why should I be a vendor? If you want extra cash flow, want to save for a special occasion or maybe just help your savings account out a bit - being a vendor is a FUN & simple way to do so! ROGO is the one stop shop for renters to find all their rental needs so it's an easy way to gain new customers for your items. 

How much does it cost? The app is a free download but we keep our business running by taking a 15% per transaction from our lovely vendors.

What do renters pay? Renters pay the set rental fee, no hidden fees! 

WANT MORE? We would love for you to stay in the loop! Download the app and get added to our email list or simply subscribe via our site. 

Announcement: We are LIVE on the app stores! Download ROGO today!

RISPETTO PER L'AMBIENTE
Per noi “sostenibilità” è molto più di una parola: è un valore che ispira le nostre scelte. Ogni gesto conta. Crediamo in un futuro sostenibile e lo costruiamo un passo alla volta. Perché prendersi cura dell’ambiente significa prendersi cura di tutti noi.

TECNOLOGIA
Risolvere, migliorare e connettere. Selezioniamo l’eccellenza  e ricerchiamo soluzioni pratiche ed innovative. La tecnologia è il nostro miglior alleato per semplificare il quotidiano e migliorare in modo intelligente il nostro mondo, giorno dopo giorno.

DESIGN
Ogni dettaglio conta. Ogni linea, ogni materiale scelto con cura dà vita a un ambiente che racconta la sua storia e accoglie chi lo vive per trasformare lo spazio in emozione. Vogliamo prodotti che non solo funzionano, ma ispirano e arricchiscono l'ambiente in cui si trovano. Non si tratta solo di bellezza, ma di creare armonia.

Name: Dagsverk
Description:
Vårt mål er å forvandle jobbsøking og rekruttering fra en tids- og ressurskrevende prosess fylt med hindringer til en sømløs opplevelse for både jobbsøkere og arbeidsgivere. 

Dagsverk ble grunnlagt basert på personlige erfaringer i jobbsøker- og rekrutteringsprosesser, som viste oss et landskap preget av bratte oppoverbakker, skarpe svinger og uventede hindringer. Et utfordrende terreng å navigere. 

Vi var overbevist om at ved å tenke nytt kunne vi forvandle dette landskapet til en vakker og lett arena for jobbsøking og rekruttering. 

Resultatet er en nyskapende jobbportal som elegant matcher jobbsøkere med stillingsannonser, og gir en skreddersydd liste over fremragende og interessante kandidater og jobbmuligheter. Det nye landskapet inneholder blant annet spennende funksjoner som: 

For jobbsøkere: 

Rask tilgang til relevante jobber: Vi fjerner søknadsbrevet! Vis din interesse for en stilling og start dialogen. 

Inkognito: Utforsk dine muligheter uten å avsløre din identitet. 

Rettferdige matchinger: Det første en arbeidsgiver ser er at du er en utmerket match. Alder, navn og kjønn er ikke inkludert i matchingen. 

For arbeidsgivere: 

Finn kvalifiserte kandidater raskt: Uten søknadsbrev reduseres det manuelle arbeidet. Bruk heller tiden på å bli kjent med de utmerkede kandidatene. 

Støtt intern mobilitet: Utfør en intern matching i bedriften eller konsernet før du publiserer stillingsannonsen eksternt. 

Proaktive rekrutteringsstrategier: Finn kandidater på minutter og ta kontakt. Alternativt kan du bruke headhunting for å finne passive kandidater som er åpne for nye muligheter. 

Registrer deg her og fortell oss hva du synes!
https://dagsverk.no/

Name: Link Your Sales Solution
Description:
B2B SALES HAS CHANGED. We are in a post-advertising and digital  era, and the age-old sales funnel no longer works in this social and mobile age. The buying process is no longer linear. Buyers don’t just enter at the top of the funnel. Instead, they come in at any stage, cut the line, maybe skip stages, stay in a stage indefinitely, or even move back and forth between stages. So how do we accelerate the sales process for our clients? 

AT LINK WE INTERSECT WITH BUYERS AT ANY STAGE. And we never interrupt them. Interrupting a buyer with a sales message is no longer a sound sales strategy. Buyers dismiss such non-informative disruptions. We believe in building relationships with buyers, enabling them with relevant content, research, case studies, and specific solutions. Offering client branded content which moves buyers in a desired direction. And delivering results to our clients. That’s how we close business for our clients.

WE ARE A B2B SALES OUTSOURCING AGENCY AND LEAD GENERATION ACCELERATOR. Helping clients grow. Creating and managing lead generation, customer acquisition, and retention initiatives. Eliminating client costs and hassles of hiring and training teams and actively taking on client investment challenges to build client-facing sale operations. From initial approach through to close

WE RECOGNIZE CLIENTS WORK HARD TO EARN A BRAND REPUTATION. We respect that and we collaborate with them to align sales strategies and plans with their goals, not ours. And this is important, we never compromise a brand’s integrity to just make a sale. We know what a good deal looks like, and we know how to activate its beginning and accelerate its closings. To us, everything is linked to a client brand.

We talk about #saas, #engagement, #innovation, #digitalbusiness, and #businessoptimization

With Lattice Of Africa, builders and their agents tap into a digital platform that makes it easy to manage the sale of your new build properties, streamlining the journey from reservation, financing through to documentation. 

Buyers who use our platform get access to a pre-vetted projects with embedded due diligence and financing to help them securely acquire properties online, with confidence. They also get access to our network of bank and non-bank financing partners to match them with customized financing products.

For institutional investors, we help de-risk real estate investing by providing direct and pre-vetted early access to some of most exciting new development opportunities on the continent. 

Our technology-driven, integrated approach means that we can influence product development, project financing and quality control, ultimately reducing the costs of both market-rate and affordable housing, as well as the associated transaction costs.

Otomobil, ağır vasıta, motosiklet, karavan, iş makineleri, tarım makineleri ve deniz araçlarına yönelik yedek parçaları tek çatı altında buluşturarak sektördeki tedarik zinciri verimliliğini artırıyoruz.

Platformumuz, B2C kanalda uçtan uca dijital çözümler sunarak bireysel kullanıcıların yedek parça ihtiyaçlarını hızlı, güvenilir ve kolay erişilebilir şekilde karşılamaktadır. Veriye dayalı altyapımız sayesinde, kullanıcı davranışlarını analiz ederek kişiselleştirilmiş deneyimler sunuyor ve müşteri memnuniyetini en üst düzeye çıkarıyoruz.
Türkiye’nin büyük ve parçalı yedek parça pazarında yenilikçi iş modelimizle lider konumdayız. Orta ve uzun vadede, bölgesel ve küresel genişlemeyi hedefleyerek YEDEKNOKTA’yı dijital yedek parça ticaretinin merkezi haline getirmeyi amaçlıyoruz.

Name: gogolf
Description:
gogolf es el primer marketplace digital desarrollado por golfistas mexicanos que transforma la manera de encontrar y reservar salidas en los mejores campos de golf del país.

Con gogolf, cualquier jugador – ya sea socio o no socio de un club – puede descubrir la oferta de golf en México y reservar fácilmente en línea sus salidas sin necesidad de contactar directamente al campo. gogolf simplifica el proceso de reservación, facilita la planificación de rondas y mejora la experiencia de los jugadores.

Beneficios para los campos:

1. Mayores ingresos: Incremento en las reservaciones en días y horarios específicos, respetando siempre los momentos prioritarios para los socios del club.

2. Mayor visibilidad: Publicidad en una plataforma de alcance nacional, apoyada con estrategias de marketing digital enfocadas en impulsar las reservaciones.

3. Sin costos adicionales: Sin cuotas fijas. gogolf únicamente retiene un porcentaje del green fee por cada reservación concretada. Si no hay reservaciones, no hay costo.

4. Sin interferir en los procesos: No se requiere modificar el sistema o software actual del club. gogolf opera de manera independiente sin afectar la operación diaria.

En gogolf, estamos comprometidos con democratizar el golf en México, facilitando a todos los jugadores el acceso al deporte y apoyando el crecimiento y visibilidad de los campos asociados.

Únete a gogolf y forma parte del futuro del golf en México.

VEGOLO S.A.P.I. de C.V. Todos los derechos reservados.
