Name: Aapnimandi
Description:
Welcome To AapniMandi (A Unit of GILL SANDHU WEB PRIVATE LIMITED)

The traditional and Basic marketing system of fruits and vegetables is unfavourable for farmers as a major share of the consumer rupee is pocketed by the traders. The farmers used to get low prices for their produce whereas the consumers had to pay higher prices for poor quality products available in the markets. The “Aapni Mandi ( A Unit of GILL SANDHU WEB PRIVATE LIMITED)” started the “farmers’ market” in 2021 with a view to give a boost to the small farmers around cities so as to provide direct access to the consumers, by eliminating the middlemen. It is also known as the “Aapni Mandi” because it belongs to both the farmers and the consumers who can mutually help each other

Basic infrastructure facilities like online market yard, lighting, etc. are provided by the “Aapni Mandi” Farm-level extension services of the relevant departments are also pooled in, securing the benefit of the ongoing Government scheme to “Aapni Mandi” farmers. The benefits include input subsides, better quality seeds, and loans at reasonable rates of interest from the Bank. “Aapni Mandi” scheme provides self-employment to the producers and also removes the social inhibition among them for the retail sale of the produce. “Aapni Mandi” is being organized in about 50 cities and towns of the State including Chandigarh. An evaluation study has shown that “Aapni mandi” has really proved a blessing for the farmers particularly the small farmers and a boon to the consumers.

simply aapni mandi will be an easy way to connect the small-town farmers to local cities, city to big cities, and to big cities all over the country.

This is our dream project when our farmers Fully united on Aapni Mandi and connected with each other then Under Govt Guidelines we will Try for them and will bring them to the international market for sales and purchases in open mandi so farmers can sell their produce own price directly to the buyers.

Name: Termoidraulica RV
Description:
Nato da un'idea e dalla volontà di migliorare, il nostro e-commerce fonda le sue radici nel settore della termoidraulica in cui operiamo da oltre 30 anni.

L'idea di percorrere nuove strade e di raggiungere clienti lontani dalla nostra Orvieto, ci ha portato a inserirci nel mondo del commercio elettronico, prima grazie ai marketplace come eBay ed Amazon, e poi realizzando uno store tutto nostro. 

Non abbiamo avuto difficoltà a trasmettere nell'ecommerce tutta la nostra esperienza maturata in questi anni. Per questo abbiamo deciso di ampliare la nostra gamma di prodotti concentrandoci sul mondo del trattamento acqua. Addolcitori, filtri per acqua, osmosi inversa e microfiltrazione sono solo alcuni esempi di quello che offriamo nel nostro store. Ma c'è una cosa che ci teniamo ad offrire ai nostri clienti, la nostra capacità di ascoltare i clienti, consigliare loro i prodotti giusti, non necessariamente i più cari, ma quelli più adatti alle proprie esigenze. Per questo la rete dei nostri tecnici è sempre a disposizione online e al telefono per rispondere a tutte le domande sui nostri prodotti, affinché la scelta d'acquisto possa essere sempre corretta e ponderata.

Prodotti, cortesia, disponibilità, ma non solo. Quello su cui puntiamo è un servizio post-vendita in grado di rispondere in maniera veloce e puntuale per qualsiasi evenienza.

Potremmo raccontarvi che i nostri prodotti sono i migliori che possiate trovare ma non lo faremo. Sarete voi a giudicare il nostro servizio ed i nostri prodotti e impareremo da ogni feedback che ci darete perchè un'e-commerce non è niente senza gli utenti che lo popolano.

Siamo già arrivati al primo restyling del nostro store perché ci teniamo che il cliente si senta a suo agio mentre scorre i prodotti e decide quale acquistare. Un'esperienza prima di un acquisto. E' questo quello che vogliamo che diventi il nostro store.

Grazie a voi tutto questo è possibile.

Chiara e Pasquale

Name: handwerker.ch | Handwerker Plattform AG
Description:
Das ist handwerker.ch
Die Premium Plattform für fundierte Entscheidungen im Handwerk und Bau
handwerker.ch ist das führende Rating-, Monitoring- und Vergleichsportal für Handwerks- und Baubetriebe in der Schweiz.
Wir analysieren, bewerten und zertifizieren über 8'000+ Betriebe – neutral, datenbasiert und transparent.
Ob Kunde, Fachkraft, Bauherr oder Investor: handwerker.ch liefert die Grundlage für bessere Entscheidungen. 
 
 Das Herzstück: Der Schweizer Baubranchen Index (SBI)
Im Zentrum steht der Schweizer Baubranchen Index (SBI) – das datengetriebene Markt- und Monitoringmodell von handwerker.ch.
Er misst Qualität, Sichtbarkeit, ESG-Fitness und Transparenz – täglich aktuell.
Mit dem SBI 500 veröffentlicht handwerker.ch in Echtzeit die Top 500 Betriebe der Branche – öffentlich einsehbar, nachvollziehbar und unabhängig bewertet.
 
 Unsere Verantwortung als vertikale Branchenplattform der Schweizer Bauwirtschaft
Als führende Schweizer Plattform für Handwerk und Bau bietet handwerker.ch nicht nur Ratings, Rankings und Zertifizierungen, sondern auch einen Zugang zu relevanten Informationen und Entwicklungen aus der Welt der Technologie. 
Unsere Rolle als vertikale Branchenplattform ist es, komplexe Trends wie KI, Robotik, Digitalisierung und GreenTech verständlich zu vermitteln – spezifisch zugeschnitten auf Handwerksbetriebe, Bauunternehmen, Planer und Partner der Schweizer Immobilienbranche.

Wir kombinieren Marktmonitoring, Branchen-Insights, Datenintelligenz und Content, um die Entscheider in der Branche fit für die Zukunft zu machen – nicht als Leadvermittler, sondern als vertrauenswürdige Instanz im Ökosystem Bau & Handwerk.

El DPP es una iniciativa de la UE, formando parte del Reglamento sobre diseño ecológico de productos sostenibles (ESPR) y la Estrategia de Economía Circular. La implementación del DPP comienza en 2026/2027, priorizando inicialmente algunos sectores, y extendiéndose a otras categorías en los próximos años. Un pasaporte digital de producto (DPP) es un registro electrónico que acompaña a un producto durante todo su ciclo de vida, proporcionando información detallada sobre su origen, composición, uso, mantenimiento y reciclabilidad. Tiene como objetivo mejorar la transparencia, la trazabilidad y la sostenibilidad, facilitando la economía circular al permitir a consumidores y empresas acceder a datos clave para tomar decisiones informadas.  Además de la obligación del cumplimiento normativo, los DPPs suponen también una oportunidad para fortalecer la confianza del consumidor, abrir nuevos modelos de negocio y cumplir con sus compromisos de sostenibilidad. BAKPASS, es una plataforma SaaS basada en blockchain, que permite a empresas de todos los tamaños crear, gestionar y auditar Pasaportes Digitales de Producto (DPPs), garantizando trazabilidad, cumplimiento normativo europeo  y confianza del consumidor.

2. BAKARTS.
Actualmente, la mayoría de las certificaciones dependen de métodos tradicionales, propensos a fraudes y errores humanos. BAKARTS es una solución para la generación y gestión de pasaportes digitales de obras de arte y artículos de lujo. Representa un avance en la forma en que se valida la autoría y la unicidad de los objetos exclusivos. Al utilizar tecnologías blockchain, el pasaporte garantiza la inmutabilidad y la transparencia de los datos, permitiendo a los verificar la autenticidad de cada objeto de manera instantánea y segura. Aporta valor también en los crecientes mercados de venta secundaria: certificación y trazabilidad.

Description:
Kokomo – Fleuriste en ligne
Des bouquets soignés, livrés partout en France.

Kokomo est née d’un constat simple : offrir des fleurs, ça devrait être facile.
C’est avec cette conviction que l’entreprise a vu le jour à Cambrai, dans les Hauts-de-France, avec une volonté forte : moderniser l’envoi de fleurs en ligne tout en gardant une approche artisanale et humaine.

 Une histoire de proximité et de fiabilité
À l’origine, Kokomo était une petite structure familiale. En quelques années, elle a su évoluer pour devenir une référence de la livraison florale en France. Chaque bouquet est conçu à la main dans notre atelier, puis expédié dans toute la France en 24h.

Notre mission ?
Rendre l’envoi de fleurs aussi fluide qu’émotionnel. Que ce soit pour un anniversaire, un remerciement ou un simple “je pense à toi”, nous mettons tout en œuvre pour que le geste soit simple, sincère et marquant.

Aujourd’hui, Kokomo continue de grandir avec une ambition : faire de chaque bouquet un moment de joie.

Stop wasting countless hours and paying exorbitant markups and placement fees. Fetch streamlines hiring exceptional talent - consultants and employees - at little to no cost. Fetch is completely free for FTE roles and a simple 4.5% platform fee (per party) for consulting roles.

Fetch started out as fetchConsultant with a simple premise - whenever there is a role for which the client interviews the consultant directly, there is unnecessary margin accreting to the consulting firm, often well in excess of 40%. This incentivizes firms to obfuscate bill and pay rates, overstate the quality of their consultants and inflate the value their firm provides.

Fetch gets rid of this paradigm in its entirety, and we decided to extend our full suite of features to FTE hiring as well. The Fetch platform enables:
	• Clients to post opportunities and instantly notify 100s of certified professionals
	• Applicants to apply directly (or refer and earn) and name their own rate*
	• Clients to quickly screen, interview and onboard hires
	• Consultants and clients to manage engagements, contract extensions and time/expense entry*
	• Fetch serves as the intermediary*
		○ Contracts with the client for efficiency and liability protections
		○ Contracts with the consultant via 1099 to maximize tax deductions and retirement savings
		○ Pays the consultant monthly (regardless of invoicing status)**
		○ Invoices the client**

* Only applicable to consulting roles
** A 4.5% platform fee is added to the invoice and deducted from the payment

Through virtual galleries, online exhibitions, and interactive workshops, artists can connect with patrons and peers worldwide, breaking down barriers that often hinder artistic dissemination. Enrich the World:
Beyond commerce, We are committed to enriching communities through art. By facilitating collaborations between artists and cultural institutions, and supporting initiatives that integrate art into public spaces, it aims to make art an integral part of everyday life. Such endeavors not only enhance the aesthetic quality of environments but also foster social cohesion and cultural vitality.

In today’s digitally connected world, Aestheticommerce proves how art can unite, inspire, and transform. By connecting creators with audiences and embracing art’s universal language, it fosters a more inclusive and vibrant global culture.

Name: Rajaeen
Description:
Rajaeen, derived from the Arabic word 'راجعين' meaning 'we shall return,' embodies the collective hope of refugees to one day reclaim their homelands.
Established with a profound purpose, Rajaeen seeks to empower refugees, particularly women, by offering employment opportunities rooted in the rich tapestry of handcrafted products and heritage. 
OUR MISSION
At Rajaeen, we believe in preserving tradition while fostering economic independence. Our mission is twofold: to equip refugees with the skills and resources to produce exquisite handmade goods and to connect them with a global audience through our online marketplace.

OUR VISION 
Our vision extends beyond commerce; it's about catalyzing positive change on a global scale. Through Rajaeen.com, we aspire to:

Educate individuals worldwide about refugee causes, fostering empathy and understanding.
Amplify refugee voices by providing a platform for them to share their stories and experiences.
Empower refugees by enabling them to earn a sustainable income through their craftsmanship.
Provide a transparent avenue for individuals to support refugees ethically and securely.
Our commitment to this vision is reflected in our hands-on approach. We directly engage with refugees, facilitating every step of the production process, from skill-building workshops to product promotion. Each artisan has a voice; their stories are integral to our platform, enriching the connection between creator and consumer.


Looking ahead, we envision expanding our impact by establishing training centers in regions like but not limited to Jordan, south of Turkey, West Bank, and Gaza. These centers will serve as empowerment hubs, equipping refugees with practical skills and the means to access markets worldwide.

 

JOIN US IN OUR MISSION TO CREATE SUSTAINABLE LIVELIHOODS FOR REFUGEES. TOGETHER, WE CAN TURN HOPE INTO TANGIBLE OPPORTUNITIES FOR THOSE SEARCHING FOR A BRIGHTER TOMORROW.

Description:
ineda is an innovative and disruptive platform that enables consumers who know what they want and are ready to buy, to connect with suppliers offering an extensive range of products creating a win, win for both the consumer and the Australian supplier. The consumer places a bid, gets an idea

Instead of suppliers trying to convince consumers to choose and buy their product, with ineda, the consumer selects the product, ‘bids’ for what they want and the supplier has the choice to move stock and do the business and thus create cash flow.

ineda’s new generation Marketplace allows consumers to create the deal at the price they are willing to pay, ensuring they can get the best possible deal.

ineda could not be delivering a better solution to maximise your purchasing power and to take control of your shopping experience at a better time against the head winds of high inflation, high interest rates and a looming recession. This is a time where every dollar counts. 
ineda’s next generation Marketplace allows you to create the deal at the price that you’re willing to pay. This is a win, win for consumers getting the best price and the supplier moving stock in their business.

Sometimes it is just simply by pure necessity that you need to replace your fridge, toaster, washing machine, dryer, oven and cooktops often when you least expect it. Of course, this unplanned expense never comes at a good time when the cost of living is rising, wage growth is stagnant and
interest rates and inflation are spiraling out of control making it very hard for everyday people to budget. To make every dollar count during this process for the consumer and for the supplier needing to move goods and create cash flow in their business, ineda is an ideal solution.

It’s a Win, Win for Australian consumers and Australian
businesses.”

Name: Rayonnages.com
Description:
Rayonnages.com est un précurseur dans le secteur du stockage professionnel.
Notre plateforme ne se contente pas de suivre les standards du marché : elle redéfinit les règles en plaçant la transparence, la confiance et l’efficacité au cœur des échanges.

Né de la volonté d’aider chaque professionnel à maintenir ses infrastructures de stockage en parfait état après un contrôle périodique, Rayonnages.com s’attaque à un véritable défi : rendre accessible, dans les meilleures conditions de temps et de coût, les pièces nécessaires à la mise en conformité des installations.
Face à la diversité des fabricants, à la complexité des références et à l’obsolescence des équipements, notre mission est claire : simplifier l’accès aux bons produits, tout en garantissant qualité, fiabilité et traçabilité.

Pourquoi sommes-nous un précurseur ?
Parce que nous avons compris que :
	•	Le secteur doit aller au-delà des belles paroles pour offrir des solutions concrètes et vérifiables.
	•	Les clients doivent pouvoir comparer les offres facilement et en toute transparence, avant même de demander un devis.
	•	Il est temps de changer le modèle de vente traditionnel, souvent opaque, lent ou incomplet.
	•	La vente à distance doit inspirer confiance, avec des informations claires, des vendeurs identifiables et des produits traçables.
	•	Un accès centralisé au plus large catalogue de pièces détachées et d’accessoires pour le rayonnage est indispensable pour tous les acteurs du secteur.

Rayonnages.com est bien plus qu’une plateforme de mise en relation :
C’est une marketplace spécialisée, conçue par des professionnels, pour des professionnels, au service d’une logistique plus fluide, d’une économie plus circulaire, et d’une planète plus durable.

Nous soutenons les circuits courts, la réparation, la réutilisation et la réduction de l’empreinte carbone.
En rejoignant Rayonnages.com, vous participez à une transformation réelle, locale, responsable.

Name: Nerdbeak
Description:
Nerdbeak, Inc. builds Nerdbase – a multi-vertical marketplace engine for collectibles.

Nerdbase lets us spin up domain-specific marketplaces in days, not years. Each community gets its own “home” while we run everything from a single backend.

Live today
• Nerdworth – flagship vertical for slabbed art cards. Price tracking, offers, and curated drops for high-end artists, with 1,000+ items cataloged and $4M+ in tracked market volume.

Verticals in the pipeline (domains reserved, OS ready):
• Slabsworth – TCG & sports slabs, built for real “what’s it worth?” answers at the slab level
• Yoyoworth – yo-yo collectors: throws, editions, and colorways across every major brand
• Figworth – action figures and collectible toys, with completeness tracking across lines, parts, and accessories
• Skateworth – inline & aggressive skates: boots, frames, and parts for people who actually skate
• Sugrworth – candy toy collectibles (PEZ, dispensers, character candy toys) with stem codes, feet variants, and series-level tracking

Under the hood, all verticals share:
• Unified listings, checkout, drops, auctions, and consignment flows
• AI vision + embeddings for slab scanning, price history, and set completion
• A cross-vertical ecosystem for accessories (stands, cases, storage, supplies) that integrates once and reaches every marketplace

Nerdbeak is led by founder Ricky Eckhardt, a 0→1 marketplace engineer who’s shipped 7 marketplaces, powered $100M+ GMV (Fitted Retail, BookOutdoors, GoCamp), and taken one to exit.

We’re building the OS for collectibles – one brain powering a thousand vertical markets.

Description:
Paleosan è una piattaforma di e-commerce nata con lo scopo di mettere a disposizione, per chiunque ne abbia esigenza, prodotti in grado di supportare la salute, la fertilità ed il benessere del proprio cane.

Nello specifico i prodotti sono rappresentati da complementi alimentari, relativi sia alla sfera riproduttiva che a quella che riguarda la salute dell’animale domestico, ma anche da un dispositivo tecnologico, il Multibiberon, che rappresenta la soluzione ideale per vivere la fase dell’allattamento in maniera naturale, semplice e sicura, pensata e progettata su misura per i cuccioli.

La qualità dei complementi alimentari, accuratamente selezionati, è dimostrata dai benefici che apportano alla vita dei cani, come l’incremento del consolidamento osseo, l’aumento dell’elasticità tendinea e la fortificazione delle articolazioni (CementArt). Altri prodotti invece sono fondamentali nell’ambito della fertilità e della riproduttività: aiutano e sostengono l’animale in questa delicata fase, migliorandone le prestazioni.

Un servizio di trasporto eccellente, con pagamenti sicuri e spedizioni in 24/48 ore nei giorni lavorativi, consente di ricevere i nostri prodotti, in Italia ed all’estero, in maniera comoda, sicura e vantaggiosa, con il servizio di spedizione gratuito per ordini sopra i 150€.

Paleosan garantisce una soluzione, attraverso prodotti e servizi di alta qualità, per affrontare e superare i problemi di fertilità del cane, oggi sempre più frequenti, senza tralasciare la salute ed il benessere quotidiano dell’animale domestico. Un modo pratico e agevole, senza distanza e confini, per prenderti cura del tuo compagno a quattro zampe.

Paleosan, benessere per il tuo cane!

Name: Slayfest Fishing
Description:
We believe fishing is fishing! Whether it’s fly fishing, tenkara, ice fishing, bass fishing, trout fishing, shark fishing, noodling, or spearfishing - the list goes on forever. 

The idea of Slayfest Fishing started on the banks of the rivers in the hot southern Oregon summers. Montana is where the idea became reality, and a lifelong passion for fishing began to evolve. In 2023, the YouTube series “Chasing Water” began, encouraging others to explore fishing opportunities around them, and we dropped our first line of Slayfest hats (our original goal starting in 2021). 

However, one thing has always remained the same - it wasn’t about catching fish or selling apparel, but the journey and adventure of getting lost on any river, lake, pond, creek, or ocean in the world. Anglers can take the sport too seriously, gatekeeping at times - that is why we are on the mission to remind everyone that FISHING IS FISHING no matter what skill level or style.

Name: Mrdigital Pvt Ltd
Description:
Elevating Education: The Promise of Skill-Based Learning
In the dynamic landscape of modern education, skill-based learning emerges as a beacon of innovation and practicality. This transformative approach shifts the focus from traditional rote memorization to the cultivation of tangible, market-ready skills. It intertwines academic rigor with real-world applications, crafting a curriculum that is both engaging and profoundly relevant.

Skill-based education thrives on its commitment to experiential learning, where students gain hands-on experience and master competencies that are directly applicable to their future careers. This methodology not only enhances employability but also fosters a sense of confidence and autonomy in learners. By bridging the gap between theoretical knowledge and practical application, skill-based education prepares students to navigate and excel in an ever-evolving job market.

Institutions that champion this model are often characterized by their vibrant, interactive classrooms, state-of-the-art facilities, and robust industry partnerships. These elements work in harmony to provide a holistic learning experience that is both enriching and empowering. Students are encouraged to think critically, solve problems creatively, and collaborate effectively – skills that are invaluable in any professional setting.

Moreover, the skill-based education industry is adaptable, constantly evolving to meet the needs of emerging industries and technological advancements. It is a forward-thinking approach that recognizes the importance of lifelong learning and continuous professional development.

In essence, skill-based education is not just a pedagogical strategy; it is a movement towards a more practical, inclusive, and future-ready educational paradigm. It celebrates the unique talents and potentials of each learner, paving the way for a workforce that is skilled, versatile, and resilient.

The SWD team collectively enjoy over 30 years of experience in developing website code, data management and design. They always say necessity is the mother of invention and that's absolutely the case here. I have been creating websites and working online databases since the early 90's. It was always just for fun, and at that time computers for me represented the future. Over the years I've kept my hands in what was new and cutting edge. In my career, I always maintained sites for my companies. First in aviation, then my science equipment store, and by a strange path, Spider Climbing Magnetic Climbing Systems. And so we come full circle, because that's where I found the necessity to try and help my customers in the entertainment industry understand and develop their company websites. Over the last 10 years my circle of clientele has grown to the point where it become a full-time passion. We don't have to speak to our success at Spider Web Development, our clients do that loud and clear. As a result, I have developed a process that has proven itself over and over again, all across the country.

Unlike other web developers, when you partner with SWD you can count on the fact that we will tell you everything you need and want to know about your project, and how things work. If you want to do it yourself; Amen to that. I'll tell you anything you want to know about coding, best practices and just plain good advice for free. If want us to do it then I'll charge you... Try getting that kind of support from any other web developer. My business has been based on that concept from the start and it has served me well. I love it when a new client comes to me for their first website or maybe it's been a long road of dissatisfaction with other companies and they're just looking for a little truth and character.

Creemos que el reacondicionado no es un plan B. 
Es el nuevo estándar para una tecnología responsable.
La economía circular, bien entendida, tiene el poder de transformar el consumo tecnológico. Pero su potencial ha sido diluido por modelos poco exigentes, por proveedores sin garantías y por discursos sin fondo.

¿Qué hacemos?
Ofrecemos una forma sencilla y segura de trabajar con reacondicionado. 
Sin stock. Sin complicaciones. Solo dispositivos que han pasado controles certificados, listos para usarse y respaldados por procesos claros.
Ayudamos a puntos de venta a ampliar su catálogo sin asumir riesgos. Damos a las empresas acceso a tecnología que cumple con sus estándares. 
Y acompañamos a quienes valoran la trazabilidad y quieren consumir de forma más responsable.
No reacondicionamos. Conectamos. Hacemos que el reacondicionado sea accesible, facilitamos su venta y adquisición.

¿Quieres formar parte del movimiento PHOWI por el consumo sostenible? Conoce una nueva forma de acceder a tecnología: clara, segura y con impacto positivo.

¿Tienes una tienda o vendes online? 
Te ayudamos a ofrecer reacondicionado sin riesgos, sin stock y con garantías reales.

Hablemos de cómo mejorar juntos el acceso a tecnología responsable.

Name: huntive.club
Description:
Huntive is an AI-powered franchise discovery platform that connects entrepreneurs with franchise opportunities. Its core offerings are built around two primary user groups: entrepreneurs and franchisors, and it aims to streamline the franchise process for both.

Core Offerings for Entrepreneurs
AI-Powered Matching: The platform's central feature is an AI that analyzes over 50 data points, including budget, experience, and lifestyle, to match entrepreneurs with the most suitable franchise opportunities. It provides a compatibility score to help users make informed decisions.

"Kredit" Program: This exclusive program offers verified users up to $10,000 in free, annual working capital to help fund their new business. It's a key financial incentive not found on other platforms.

Direct Communication: Huntive eliminates the need for a franchise broker by allowing entrepreneurs to communicate directly with franchisors, saving time and commission fees.

Robust Tools: The platform provides a suite of tools for research and analysis, including side-by-side franchise comparisons, financial calculators (ROI, profit projections), and a central document library for important files like Franchise Disclosure Documents (FDDs).

Core Offerings for Franchisors
AI Lead Qualification: Franchisors benefit from the same AI technology, which filters and qualifies leads to present them with a list of ideal candidates, significantly increasing conversion rates.

Zero Commission: Unlike traditional franchise models, Huntive does not charge a commission on franchise fees, allowing franchisors to retain 100% of their earnings.

Direct Access: The platform gives franchisors direct access to a pool of pre-vetted, qualified candidates.

Advanced Analytics: Franchisors can use analytics and performance tracking tools to monitor the success of their listings and refine their recruitment strategies.

"Get $10,000 every year: Kredit is also offered to franchisors.

‘Likhaan’
\ lik-ha-an \ (noun)

Likhaan means “a place to create in” and it is a word from the Filipino language of the Philippines.

Name: Urjafarms
Description:
Trace OStock Global Private Limited (www.urjafarms.com/marketplace) is India's 1st Free, for All, B2B Marketplace of Certified Organic Agricultural Commodities such as Pulses, Spices, Grains, Vegetables, Fruits, Processed Foods, Seeds, and Herbs. We play the role of marketing managers for farmers (for free) who have adopted organic farming practices and help them sell their organic produce. When it comes to the buyers, we act as their purchase managers and help them locate certified organic agricultural produce (for free).

Our mission at Trace Ostock Global Private Limited is to,
1. stand against Cancer and other hazards caused by the produce of chemical farming & to supply produce which is not just ‘poison-less’ but also nutritious for health
2. create ‘access to nutritious food’ for people
3. encourage farmers who have adopted farming practices like Organic Farming, SPNF, Traditional Farming, etc. by selling and distributing their produce within the society
4. spread awareness among consumers & farmers
5. promote all farming practices that do not harm the land by affecting its fertility.

We started this business back in 2018. Initially, we were a B2C company. As we gained experience of 3+ years, we learned that India lacks a supply aggregating system when it comes to certified organic agricultural commodities.

Name: KaterBlue Ltd.
Description:
KaterBlue is a leading maritime services platform specialising on yacht charters & motor boat rentals, yacht holidays and yacht and luxury  yacht sales. The platform provides services in 32 countries and is expanding exponentially. 
Private and commercial yacht and boats owners can list their boats and services on the platform to increase their services visibility to a global audience and therefore increase their booking rate.    Individual boat owners offset their annual boat running costs with income derived from KaterBlue charters and thus make their boat ownership less expensive, or even profitable.  
KaterBlue offers boats for every budget. Small privately owned boats are offered at a very competitive rate and are typically 20%-40% less than offered by commercial outfits. Large luxury boats and superyachts are typically run by professional maritime services providers with an extensive and a professional crew ranging from deckhand, chef, stewardess,  to mates and captains. The boat owner, or operator can chose to provide their service with or without a skipper and other crew and the user can do a deal directly with the owners. This service allows those who do not have a skipper license to enjoy a sailing, or motor yacht holiday and to organise this within only a few minutes. The KaterBlue platform is the perfect way to rent in a friendly and safe environment and to discover the charm of owners and their boats. If you have any questions give us a call, use our chat bot or send us an email. We will be delighted to serve you.

Name: MTRY & CO
Description:
At MTRY & CO., we believe great food owns the meal — the ham that calls everyone back home, the burger that pulls neighbors off the porch, the steak that silences the table. That’s why we built MTRY: to put unforgettable flavor in your hands, with proteins you can count on.

We’re rooted in farm traditions, raising crops and livestock in Southern Minnesota while chasing the kind of flavor that makes people linger at the table. That pursuit led us beyond our own farm, building a Producer Circle of trusted farmers and skilled butchers whose dedication and craftsmanship define the standard for premium proteins.

Alongside them, our Small Batch Shop brings family-crafted recipes scaled with care and drawn from our own farm pork. It’s where we experiment, taste-test, and refine until the flavor makes people stop and ask, “Where’d you get this?” Today, that includes thick-cut, dry-cured bacon in standout varieties like Raspberry Chipotle, Cracked Pepper, and Classic Dry Cure.

From home cooks to business gifting, stadium concessions to retail shelves, MTRY delivers proteins bold enough to steal the table — built for people who know that when the food is unforgettable, the moment is too.

Small Farm Dedication & Expert Butcher Craftsmanship | Big Flavor Delivered

Name: Happiest Community
Description:
Happiest Community is home for every soul who has had enough of the rat race, pretending, and chasing at work, in society, and online.

This problem is bigger than any one industry, platform, or generation. Loneliness, burnout, stress, and disconnection are the norm everywhere.

The systems where we live, work, shop and socialize are no longer serving us well. That is why we are building a new ecosystem we all need more than ever.

Happiest Community is a values-led community where we connect, work, shop, learn, grow, love, and live the Happiest Way, rooted in timeless human values, guided by science, ancient wisdom and your own heart.

It began with one person’s search for a life of meaning and joy. Years of living across cultures, from megacities to monasteries, and exploring both science and ancient wisdom revealed a simple truth. No matter where we come from, ultimately we all long for the same things - love, belonging, meaning, peace, prosperity, and happiness.

That is why we’re building an ecosystem of values-led online and physical spaces that help you live the Happiest Way in daily life. Not by escaping the world, but by changing how we show up in it. Not all at once, but step by step.

We are starting small and practical, with platforms that touch everyday life.

Happiest Work is a values-aligned work platform.

Happiest Connect is a social network for the Real You.

Happiest Lifestyle is a purpose-driven shop.

Over time, together, we will build more spaces for daily life - health, shared living, organic food, ethical finance, conscious travel, and more, always guided by values first.

Happiest Community is not a trend, a campaign, or a hobby.

It is a foundation, a community, and an ecosystem.

A home for the Real You.

If this resonates with you, you are already part of it.

Name: Wedding Smart SRL
Description:
Wedding Smart è un Marketplace innovativo che accelera e semplifica acquisti e vendite tra sposi e fornitori in modo intelligente e innovativo tramite intelligenza artificiale (AI), realtà virtuale (VR) e  realtà aumentata (AR).

Wedding Smart nasce dalla visione audace e innovativa del suo Founder & Project Manager, Danilo Romano, che già nel 2016 immaginava un modo per semplificare e rivoluzionare l’interazione tra sposi e fornitori nella wedding industry — un mercato dal valore di oltre 7 miliardi di euro in Italia, in continua crescita.

Quella che inizialmente poteva sembrare un’idea folle del Founder è oggi una realtà concreta, destinata a trasformare profondamente la wedding industry. Insieme al suo socio, Salvatore Giambrone, nonché co-founder e affermato imprenditore specializzato in progetti di nicchia, stanno ridefinendo le regole del settore. Con il supporto di un team d’élite, si stanno affermando come game changer, rivoluzionando processi e modelli di business tradizionali per creare un nuovo standard di riferimento nel mercato.

Il progetto Wedding Smart è stato selezionato per lo Start Up Program di AcceleraHub, divisione di élite di IG Investimenti Group, che supporta startup ad alto potenziale attraverso percorsi di accelerazione e sviluppo strategico. Wedding Smart è attualmente in fase di preparazione per una campagna di equity crowdfunding che ci consentirà di espandere ulteriormente il nostro progetto e consolidare la nostra presenza sul mercato.

A breve lanceremo anche un modello di franchising innovativo, guidato da wedding planner certificati attraverso la nostra Academy, che potranno operare sia tramite la piattaforma digitale sia in punti fisici affiliati sul territorio nazionale e internazionale.

Dopo un primo investimento iniziale di 90.000 euro da parte dei soci, siamo pronti per scalare rapidamente e diventare il punto di riferimento globale nella digitalizzazione e innovazione del settore wedding.

Name: Campus Concierge
Description:
At Campus Concierge, we understand that college students spend too many hours every week juggling tasks they wish someone else could quickly handle, whether it's a last-minute grocery run, help moving into the dorm, or urgent 3D printing assistance. Traditional gig platforms are either too expensive or unreliable, and campus group chats rarely yield immediate results.

That’s why we built Campus Concierge, a hyper-local, peer-to-peer marketplace exclusively designed for individual college campuses. Our platform instantly connects students in need with fellow students who have the right skills and availability, all verified through university emails. Need something done quickly? Just post your request, select the task category, and get matched with a reliable peer within minutes. Want to earn extra cash between classes? Opt-in as a provider, choose the tasks you enjoy, and set your own schedule and rates.

Campus Concierge is on a mission to streamline college life by turning everyday campus needs into quick, seamless transactions between students. We believe in fostering community, creating convenience, and building trust within campuses. We’re dedicated to making campus life easier, one task at a time.

Join us in creating a more connected, productive, and stress-free campus experience.

By connecting you directly with local independent retailers, Makeke enables you to discover unique and genuine products recommended by real people. Say goodbye to paid influencer marketing and hello to a community-driven shopping experience that celebrates local businesses.

Tworzymy niestandardowe narzędzia i integrujemy systemy (BaseLinker, Apilo, Subiekt Nexo itp.) w celu automatyzacji procesów sprzedaży. Dzięki temu możesz efektywniej zarządzać zamówieniami, stanami magazynowymi i danymi klientów, koncentrując się na strategii rozwoju biznesu.

Pełna obsługa 360°
Nasza oferta obejmuje także działania marketingowe, SEO, wsparcie w kampaniach reklamowych i budowanie wizerunku marki. Dzięki wieloletniemu doświadczeniu w handlu zagranicznym doskonale rozumiemy specyfikę różnych rynków, co pozwala nam skrócić czas wdrażania i zwiększyć skuteczność sprzedaży.

Jeśli szukasz zaufanego partnera w zakresie sprzedaży międzynarodowej, Eurosell zapewni Ci kompleksową obsługę na każdym etapie – od przygotowania oferty aż po finalną dostawę towaru do klienta. Pozwól nam zadbać o Twój sukces na globalnych rynkach.

Name: Cyber Tapri
Description:
As the world's changing right before our eyes, preserving culture and everything good about it has become one of the most important driving forces for us at Cyber Tapri. Cyber Tapri is all about celebrating our roots as Indians and bringing the essence of India to everyone's home by serving/ delivering the authentic desi- be it our out-of-this-world chai premixes, edible regional snacks, or sustainable and practical goodies like our innovative hydroponic planter, bamboo, and terracotta clay products.

Not just that, when we say celebrating our roots, we mean celebrating with our great Indian artisans, potters, and artists by providing them a platform to sell, auction, and market their products or masterpieces, to be precise, without any middleman income margin cuts.
Cyber Tapri is a thought that came to our mind a long time back. Why can't we bring the nostalgia of local tapri/thela to your home with Indian lost traditional items which are about to become extinct due to plastic and industrialisation? Cyber Tapri all products fall in one category, which is MADE IN INDIA, MADE BY INDIAN AND MADE FOR INDIA.

Indian Local Tapri/Thela varies a lot when offering or selling the products. But one thing is expected you can't get these items over any eCommerce or big shops quickly, as they are unique and have some unique selling points which have been built or sold by these local people. It's hard to find.

Cybertapri Chai is a premix type. We have tried and tested this premix for over 2 years to bring it to the right taste and aroma. Not to exaggerate, we tested this premix with more than 350 people across Delhi, Pune and Bangalore of different ages and sex of people. All of them have just one word, excellent taste, and aroma. 

The idea is not to sell the Tea over the platform as Tapri is where people go and have some snacks like Matri, papdi, snacks etc with Tea and Candies(from the good old days)

Name: Club Trade BV
Description:
Sporten wordt, net als sportkleding, steeds duurder. Kinderen groeien snel uit hun kleding of stoppen plotseling met hun sport. Sportkleding blijft dan vaak ongebruikt in de kast liggen, terwijl deze nog prima een ronde mee kan. Het verkopen van sportkleding op internet is een optie, maar het kan lastig zijn om een koper te vinden, vooral als deze niet bij dezelfde vereniging zit. Bovendien zal iemand uit Maastricht waarschijnlijk niet geïnteresseerd zijn in een clubtenue van iemand uit Groningen. Dit is waar Club Trade in beeld komt.

Voordelen van Club Trade:
• Eigen Pagina: Uw vereniging of club krijgt een eigen unieke pagina op Club Trade. Hierdoor zien uw leden alleen sportkleding die van uw vereniging is. Zij hoeven niet eindeloos door het algemene aanbod te scrollen om te vinden wat ze zoeken.
• Lokale Handel: Doordat de kopers en verkopers bij elkaar in de buurt wonen, hoeven er minder pakketjes te worden verstuurd. Dit is niet alleen handig, maar ook beter voor het milieu.
• Duurzaamheid: Sportkleding die via Club Trade wordt hergebruikt, helpt de productie van nieuwe kleding verminderen, wat uiteindelijk leidt tot minder gebruik van grondstoffen.
• Financiële Ondersteuning: De verkoper ontvangt direct 90% van de verkoopprijs op zijn rekening, Uw sportvereniging ontvangt 5%. Op deze manier wordt uw eigen club indirect gesponsord.

Description:
Lumber Marketplace was launched in 2023 with a simple idea: to create an online marketplace tailored to hardwood lumber professionals. With a commitment to tradition and a vision for the future, we strive to be the trusted bridge that connects lumber sellers and buyers, enhancing their capacity to be profitable for generations to come.

Our mission is ambitious: to revolutionize an entire industry through technology, while embodying Christian values, and putting in the kind of hard work that not only changes the landscape of an entire industry but also sets a new standard for what tech companies can achieve in Tennessee.

Mission Statement
At Lumber Marketplace, we're committed to revolutionizing the lumber industry. By seamlessly connecting buyers and sellers, we aim to benefit all, offering unparalleled value and service, all while staying true to our unwavering principles.

Vision Statement
To uphold the pillars of Faith, Family, and Work in transforming the lumber trade, fostering growth for our community, partners, and all who engage with us.

Our Guiding Principles
1. Simplify Everything: We are dedicated to streamlining the lumber trade, making it easier for businesses to buy and sell with confidence. Through innovative technology and simplified processes, we strive to save the industry time and money.

2. Build Trust: We prioritize trust in every interaction. Secure transactions and transparent dealings are at the heart of what we do. Sensitive user data is kept confidential from everyone, including our industry founders, safeguarding buyers’ and sellers’ privacy.

3. Respect Tradition: We are committed to preserving the heritage and time-honored practices of the hardwood lumber industry. Our mission is to respect the industry's rich tradition while embracing modern innovation.

Name: Nftcar.io - reduce your carbon footprint to 0 with 100% carbon reduction verifiable NFT-s.
Description:
Converting high-pollution cars to carbon credit with NFT-s, with purpose of reducing global carbon footprint. Our solution is to buy a high-pollution car. Scrapping it in a way that none of the parts will be reused and generate a 3D version and an NFT (BNB Chain powered digital certification) of the car. 

NFT come with the following:

Proof of scrapping (certificate and video)
Certificate of the vehicle possession (a certificate that proves  that cars will be removed from the government registry and all the fines have been paid)

Currently, we provide 2 types of calculators to calculate your carbon footprint:

1. Car carbon footprint calculator

The calculator calculates your carbon footprint based on mileage and your car fuel consumption. It will calculate how many NFTCars NFTs you need to buy to reduce your carbon footprint to 0.

2. Flight carbon footprint calculator

Flight carbon footprint calculator is allows you to calculate your carbon footprint based on the air kilometers your travel. NFTs are calculated using logic that if scrapped cars will be on the roads next 10 years, then how much CO2 they will emit to the air. 1 NFT = 1.25 tons/CO2 reduced.

Healthcare doesn’t fail patients inside the clinic.
It fails them in the 92% of life that happens in the Presence Gap — where high-stakes care decisions are made without expert clinical guidance.

That gap is where CareCrowd operates.

CareCrowd is the first physician-led advocacy platform built to eliminate decision drift — the silent deterioration of outcomes that occurs between visits. It matches patients and families with trained physician advocates who intervene in real time, before uncertainty turns into risk, cost, or irreversible harm.

This is not navigation.
This is not concierge.
This is clinical intelligence applied to the part of healthcare that has never been intelligently protected.

CareCrowd is building the operating system for physician-led advocacy — restoring medical agency to the moment it matters most: right before the drift begins.

Built by physician leaders and category designers, CareCrowd is defining what comes after access — real-time clinical protection beyond the exam room.

Name: Gartentechnik.com
Description:
Gartentechnik.com folgt konsequent einer Brick and Click-Strategie: Über zentrale Portale werden dezentrale, individuelle Websites von etablierten, stationären Fachhändlern mit regionalem Einzugsgebiet online beworben. Produkte und Dienstleistungen können dort abgerufen und angefragt werden. Transaktionen erfolgen weitestgehend auf klassischem Wege im lokalen Kontext.

Die Geschäftsmodelle des Fachhandels zum Interessenten und Kunden werden vollständig abgebildet und verbinden für letztere die Bequemlichkeiten des Onlinehandels mit den Vorteilen von Beratung und Service vor Ort. Internet und stationärer Handel werden zu einem kombinierten, wirksamen Kanal. Oder kurz: Online werben, vor Ort verkaufen.

Jeder Fachhändler betreibt mit Gartentechnik.com eine vollständig unabhängige Internetpräsenz unter seinem (Domain-)Namen: Die Präsentation, inklusive aller Inhalte, etwa Produkte, Angebote, Preise, wird ausschließlich durch den Händler definiert.

Das grundsätzliche Onlinemarketing für jede Händlerwebsites erfolgt mittels der überregionalen Gartentechnik.com-Angebote. Ob allgemeine Postleitzahlensuche, Gebrauchtmaschinen oder Mietgeräte: alle Wege führen zum Fachhändler.

Im Speziellen betreut Gartentechnik.com das Onlinemarketing für jede Händlerwebsite im regionalen Kontext über allgemeine Suchmaschinen, Branchendienste, Netzwerke, Webfeeds, Newsletter und Verlinkungen im Internet.

Description:
Navigator.az saytına xoş gəlmisiniz!

Navigator.az Azərbaycanda şirkətlərin, malların və xidmətlərin kataloqudur.

14 ildir ki, şirkətlər və fərdi sahibkarlar tərəfindən təklif olunan mal və xidmətlərlə maraqlanan ziyarətçilərə istinad məlumatlarını uğurla təqdim edirik.

Biz şirkətlər və təşkilatlar haqqında məlumatların sistemləşdirilməsi və aktuallığını yoxlamaq üçün çox böyük işlər görmüşük. Navigator.az saytını Azərbaycanda 1 nömrəli kataloqa çevirməyə imkan verən hər bir şirkətlə şəxsi əlaqəmiz oldu.

Məlumatların işlənməsi və təşkili üçün istifadə etdiyimiz meyarlar saytın ziyarətçilərinə kataloqun səhifələrində təqdim olunan şirkətlər və onlar tərəfindən göstərilən xidmətlər haqqında təsdiqlənmiş məlumatları əldə etməyə imkan verir.

Saytın bütün strukturu ziyarətçiyə nəinki lazımi məlumatları tapmağa, xəritədə axtarılan müəssisənin yerini görməyə, onlarla tez bir zamanda əlaqə yaratmağa imkan yaratmışıq. Biz ziyarətçiyə öz üstünlüklərinə əsasən ən yaxın şirkətləri seçməklə vaxta qənaət etməyə kömək edirik.

Yaxın gələcəkdə Azərbaycan şirkətlərinə öz mal və xidmətlərini həm daxili, həm də beynəlxalq bazarlarda təqdim etməyə kömək edəcək xeyli sayda yeni funksiyaların istifadəyə verilməsini planlaşdırırıq.

Siz dəyərli istifadəçilərimizə xidmətimiz ilə bağlı hər hansı fikir və şərhə görə minnətdar olacağıq.

Bütün komandamız adından sizə uğurlar və ən yaxşısını arzulayırıq!
 
Hörmətlə, Navigator.az kollektivi

Name: freshtrade solutions (Schweiz) AG
Description:
freshtrade hat sich zum Ziel gesetzt, den lokalen und nachhaltigen Anbau von Lebensmittel in der Schweiz zu fördern. Dabei stellen wir die Vermeidung von Foodwaste ins Zentrum, indem wir den Fokus bereits auf die Produktion legen und neue Möglichkeiten in der sofortigen Vermarktung der Produkte bieten. Zudem soll der Konsum sämtlicher Produkte bewusst und nachhaltig geschehen.

Unser Beitrag: Bessere Planungsmöglichkeiten, sekundenschneller Handel und weniger Foodwaste!

Aus eigener Erfahrung wissen wir, dass auf der ganzen Lieferkette von Produzent bis zum Detailhändler durch kurzfristige Änderungen im Bestell- Lieferrhythmus, Mehrmengen in grossen Volumen ohne Abnehmer entstehen oder fehlende Artikel nachgefragt werden.

Ausserdem schafft freshtrade zusätzliche Verkaufskanäle und ermöglicht es, gezielte Bedarfsanforderungen in einem breiten Netzwerk anzufragen. Die Ware soll jederzeit seinen gewünschten Abnehmer finden. 

freshtrade ist das erste B2B-Food-Chain Ökosystem der Schweiz. 
Mit unserer digitalen Plattform bieten wir eine zentrale Lösung, mit welcher von der Anbauplanung, über den Handel bis hin zur Logistik der grösste Teil der Wertschöpfungskette abgewickelt werden kann.  

Dies geschieht in Echtzeit, integriert sich nahtlos ins Tagesgeschäft und schafft Wettbewerb unter sämtlichen Marktteilnehmern.

«freshtrade: Bessere Planung, mehr Handel, weniger Foodwaste.»

Name: Bookkeepie Romania
Description:
Bookkeepie România conectează contabilii cu clienții ideali și ajută IMM-urile să găsească contabilul potrivit pentru afacerea lor.

 PENTRU FIRMELE DE CONTABILITATE:
- Filtrare granulară a clienților potențiali
- Sistem avansat de setare a prețurilor
- Primiți cereri doar de la clienții potriviți profilului Dvs.

 PENTRU IMM-URI:
- Găsiți rapid contabilul potrivit
- Transparența prețurilor și serviciilor
- Verificarea calității și experienței

—
FAQs | ÎNTREBĂRI FRECVENTE

PENTRU IMM-uri
1. Ce este Bookkeepie România?
Bookkeepie România este prima platformă de matchmaking din România care conectează afacerile cu contabilii potriviți.

2. Cum funcționează procesul de căutare?
Completați un formular simplu cu nevoile afacerii dvs., iar algoritimul nostru identifică contabilii care se potrivesc criteriilor dvs. Vedeți prețurile estimate și puteți contacta direct contabilii selectați.

3. Cât costă să folosesc platforma?
Serviciul este complet gratuit pentru firmele în căutare de contabili. Plătiți doar serviciile contabile pe care le contractați direct cu contabilul ales.


PENTRU CONTABILI
1. Cum mă înregistrez pe platformă?
Completați formularul de înregistrare cu informațiile despre firma Dvs., serviciile oferite și prețurile practicate. Echipa noastră verifică informațiile și activează profilul în maxim 24 de ore.

2. Cum funcționează sistemul de filtrare?
Puteți seta criterii precise pentru clienții pe care îi doriți: domeniul de activitate, mărimea companiei, complexitatea serviciilor, zona geografică. Primiți cereri doar de la clienți care corespund acestor criterii.

Per i retailer, Ipriceit significa nuove opportunità di business, clienti reali e nessun costo fisso. Per i buyer, la possibilità di accedere ai brand che amano a condizioni personalizzate, in un ambiente sicuro e riservato.

Ipriceit è la risposta a un mercato che cambia: un luogo dove tecnologia e fiducia si incontrano, e dove il valore non si impone, si costruisce insieme.

Name: Prompti
Description:
The company partners talented people with potential sponsors based on possible professional outcomes. Simply put, sponsors fund talented individuals, from any field/profession, providing stability in early professional development, for participation in future incomes.

Prompti is a one-of-a-kind online marketplace where sponsors and talented individuals can negotiate and contract working relationships, where sponsors financially support prospects in exchange for participation in future income.

For example, take a young golfer turning professional. A sponsor could cover travel and living expenses young golfers have as they qualify for the Korn Ferry, PGA, or DP tours. Once on tour and cashing checks, the sponsor receives a percentage of those earnings. Initial investment, percentage of income, length of contract, etc., are all pre- determined before contract is secured. For a musician it might be money to cut an album or touring costs. A content creator may need development money, marketing money or capital for new business ventures.

Technology and the market acceptance of parallel peer-to-peer fintech and wagering models now makes the potential success of such a venture more viable and attractive to many parties.

And the beauty of Prompti is that it’s not just a meeting place. Legal, financial, and technical aspects of contractually bringing these two groups together are in place on the Prompti website. Step-by-step tutorials of any aspect of promoting and making a deal are available online as well, for either prospects or sponsors.

Prospects have the ability to promote their offers and careers through featured content, while sponsors can promote through active contracts or largest offers registered on the site in real time.

Prompti is the power of potential, the power of partnership, the power of people, the power of promotion, the power of profitability.

*Our Impact:*  
 Over 5,000 Users acquired 
 Over 150 Kabadiwalas empowered
 10,000+ successful pickups  
 Tons of waste diverted from landfills  
 Increased recycling awareness in thousands of homes and businesses

*Join Us:*  
Kabadi Man is building a more sustainable India, one scrap at a time. Whether you’re a home, a business, or a kabadiwala, you have a role in transforming waste into opportunity. Join us in creating a cleaner, greener future for everyone.
